repositoryPart.detectedStack: PHP (^7.3.0); frameworks: doctrine/doctrine-orm-module, zendframework/zend-cache, zendframework/zend-component-installer, zendframework/zend-filter, zendframework/zend-i18n-resources, zendframework/zend-log

group.reason: interno do controle de versão Git (histórico/hooks/packs)

file.content:
### JetBrains template # Covers JetBrains IDEs: IntelliJ, RubyMine, PhpStorm, AppCode, PyCharm, CLion, Android Studio and Webstorm # Reference: https://intellij-support.jetbrains.com/hc/en-us/articles/206544839
# User-specific stuff: .idea/workspace.xml .idea/tasks.xml .idea/dictionaries .idea/vcs.xml .idea/jsLibraryMappings.xml
# Sensitive or high-churn files: .idea/dataSources.ids .idea/dataSources.xml .idea/dataSources.local.xml .idea/sqlDataSources.xml .idea/dynamic.xml .idea/uiDesigner.xml
# Gradle: .idea/gradle.xml .idea/libraries
# Mongo Explorer plugin: .idea/mongoSettings.xml
## File-based project format: *.iws
## Plugin-specific files:
# IntelliJ /out/
# mpeltonen/sbt-idea plugin .idea_modules/
# JIRA plugin atlassian-ide-plugin.xml
# Crashlytics plugin (for Android Studio and IntelliJ) com_crashlytics_export_strings.xml crashlytics.properties crashlytics-build.properties fabric.properties
nbproject ._* .~lock.* .buildpath .DS_Store .idea .project .settings config/development.config.php config/autoload/*-development.php config/autoload/local.php config/autoload/*.local.php !public/vendor/README.md data/cache/* !data/cache/.gitkeep data/log/* !data/log/.gitkeep data/DoctrineORMModule/* !data/DoctrineORMModule/Proxy/.gitkeep data/DoctrineModule/* !data/DoctrineModule/cache/.gitkeep

### JetBrains template # Covers JetBrains IDEs: IntelliJ, RubyMine, PhpStorm, AppCode, PyCharm, CLion, Android Studio and Webstorm # Reference: https://intellij-support.jetbrains.com/hc/en-us/articles/206544839
# User-specific stuff: .idea/workspace.xml .idea/tasks.xml .idea/dictionaries .idea/vcs.xml .idea/jsLibraryMappings.xml .idea/magento2plugin.xml
# Sensitive or high-churn files: .idea/dataSources.ids .idea/dataSources.xml .idea/dataSources.local.xml .idea/sqlDataSources.xml .idea/dynamic.xml .idea/uiDesigner.xml
# Gradle: .idea/gradle.xml .idea/libraries
# Mongo Explorer plugin: .idea/mongoSettings.xml
## File-based project format: *.iws
## Plugin-specific files:
# IntelliJ /out/
# mpeltonen/sbt-idea plugin .idea_modules/
# JIRA plugin atlassian-ide-plugin.xml
# Crashlytics plugin (for Android Studio and IntelliJ) com_crashlytics_export_strings.xml crashlytics.properties crashlytics-build.properties fabric.properties
.vagrant/ .vagrant/ vendor/ config/development.config.php data/cache/* !data/cache/.gitkeep data/DoctrineModule !data/DoctrineModule/cache/.gitkeep data/DoctrineORMModule !data/DoctrineORMModule/Proxy/.gitkeep phpunit.xml composer.lock

image: docker:stable
services: - docker:19.03.5-dind
before_script: - apk add --update curl jq python3 py-pip - pip install awscli
stages: - deploy
production: stage: deploy script: - docker build -t api.sigoclinicas.com.br . - docker tag api.sigoclinicas.com.br:latest 304789899667.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/api.sigoclinicas.com.br:latest - $(aws ecr get-login --no-include-email --region us-east-1) - docker push 304789899667.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/api.sigoclinicas.com.br:latest - aws ecs update-service --region us-east-1 --cluster $AWS_ECS_CLUSTER --service api-AppProduction --force-new-deployment environment: name: production only: - master
staging: stage: deploy script: - docker build -t api.sigoclinicas.com.br . - docker tag api.sigoclinicas.com.br:latest 304789899667.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/api.sigoclinicas.com.br:homolog - $(aws ecr get-login --no-include-email --region us-east-1) - docker push 304789899667.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/api.sigoclinicas.com.br:homolog - aws ecs update-service --region us-east-1 --cluster $AWS_ECS_CLUSTER --service api-AppHomolog --force-new-deployment environment: name: homolog only: - homolog
development: stage: deploy script: - docker build -t api.sigoclinicas.com.br . - docker tag api.sigoclinicas.com.br:latest 304789899667.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/api.sigoclinicas.com.br:dev - $(aws ecr get-login --no-include-email --region us-east-1) - docker push 304789899667.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/api.sigoclinicas.com.br:dev - aws ecs update-service --region us-east-1 --cluster $AWS_ECS_CLUSTER --service api-AppDevelopment --force-new-deployment environment: name: development only: - develop

Description: 'Jobs4You Stack' Parameters: EnvType: Description: Environment type. Default: prod Type: String AllowedValues: - prod - test ConstraintDescription: must specify prod or test. ClusterStackName: Type: String Description: Cluster Stack name Default: zeus Endpoint: Type: String Description: Service endpoint Default: sigoclinicas.com ListenerRulePriority: Type: Number Description: Listener priority Default: 1 DatabaseHost: Default: addpix.caiwleyd7asi.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com Type: String Description: Database Host DatabaseUser: Default: sigoclinicas Type: String Description: Database account name DatabaseName: Default: sigoclinicas Type: String Description: Database account name DatabasePassword: NoEcho: true Type: String Description: Database account password VPC: Description: The VPC that the ECS cluster is deployed to Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC::Id' Default: vpc-2df0b554 AllowedPattern: '^(?:vpc-[0-9a-f]{8}|)$' ConstraintDescription: VPC Id must begin with 'vpc-' or leave blank to have a new VPC created DesiredCount: Type: Number Description: The number of simultaneous tasks that you want to run on the cluster. Default: 2 MaxCount: Type: Number Description: The max number of simultaneous tasks that you want to run on the cluster. Default: 4 AcmCertificateArn: Description: >- The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of an AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) certificate. Type: String AllowedPattern: 'arn:aws:acm:.*' HostedZoneId: Type: String Description: Hosted Zone Id Default: ZM47UCITET7HV ImageTag: Description: Docker image tag Type: String Default: latest Conditions: CreateProdResources: !Equals [ !Ref EnvType, prod ] Resources: LogGroup: Type: 'AWS::Logs::LogGroup' Properties: LogGroupName: !Ref 'AWS::StackName' RetentionInDays: 7
BucketIAMGroup: Type: AWS::IAM::Group Properties: GroupName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}_bucket_group' Policies: - PolicyName: 'BucketPolicy' PolicyDocument: Version: 2012-10-17 Statement: - Effect: Allow Action: - 's3:ListAllMyBuckets' Resource: 'arn:aws:s3:::*' - Effect: Allow Action: - 's3:ListBucket' - 's3:GetBucketLocation' - 's3:ListBucketMultipartUploads' Resource: !GetAtt - AssetsBucket - Arn - Effect: Allow Action: - 's3:AbortMultipartUpload' - 's3:DeleteObject' - 's3:DeleteObjectVersion' - 's3:GetObject' - 's3:GetObjectAcl' - 's3:GetObjectVersion' - 's3:GetObjectVersionAcl' - 's3:PutObject' - 's3:PutObjectAcl' - 's3:PutObjectVersionAcl' Resource: !Join - / - - !GetAtt - AssetsBucket - Arn - '*' - Effect: Allow Action: - 'cloudfront:GetCloudFrontOriginAccessIdentityConfig' - 'cloudfront:ListCloudFrontOriginAccessIdentities' - 'cloudfront:GetStreamingDistributionConfig' - 'cloudfront:GetInvalidation' - 'cloudfront:CreateInvalidation' - 'cloudfront:GetDistribution' - 'cloudfront:GetStreamingDistribution' - 'cloudfront:ListTagsForResource' - 'cloudfront:ListInvalidations' - 'cloudfront:ListDistributions' - 'cloudfront:GetCloudFrontOriginAccessIdentity' - 'cloudfront:ListStreamingDistributions' - 'cloudfront:GetDistributionConfig' - 'cloudfront:ListDistributionsByWebACLId' Resource: '*' User: Type: 'AWS::IAM::User' Properties: Groups: - !Ref BucketIAMGroup - SESGroup AccessKey: Type: 'AWS::IAM::AccessKey' Properties: UserName: !Ref User
AppBucket: Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket' Properties: BucketName: !If - CreateProdResources - !Sub 'app.${Endpoint}' - !Sub '${ImageTag}.app.${Endpoint}' AccessControl: PublicRead WebsiteConfiguration: IndexDocument: index.html ErrorDocument: index.html DeletionPolicy: Delete AppBucketPolicy: Type: 'AWS::S3::BucketPolicy' Properties: Bucket: !Ref AppBucket PolicyDocument: Statement: - Sid: PublicReadForGetBucketObjects Effect: Allow Principal: '*' Action: 's3:GetObject' Resource: !Join - '' - - 'arn:aws:s3:::' - !Ref AppBucket - /* AssetsBucket: Type: 'AWS::S3::Bucket' Properties: BucketName: !If - CreateProdResources - !Sub 'assets.${Endpoint}' - !Sub '${ImageTag}.assets.${Endpoint}' DeletionPolicy: Retain

TargetGroup: Type: 'AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::TargetGroup' Properties: VpcId: !Ref VPC Port: 80 Protocol: HTTP Matcher: HttpCode: '200-299,300-399' HealthCheckIntervalSeconds: 10 HealthCheckPath: / HealthCheckProtocol: HTTP HealthCheckTimeoutSeconds: 5 HealthyThresholdCount: 2 LoadBalancerListenerRuleHttp: Type: 'AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::ListenerRule' Properties: Actions: - Type: forward TargetGroupArn: !Ref TargetGroup Conditions: - Field: host-header Values: - !If - CreateProdResources - !Sub 'api.${Endpoint}' - !Sub '${ImageTag}.api.${Endpoint}' Priority: !Ref ListenerRulePriority ListenerArn: !ImportValue 'Fn::Sub': '${ClusterStackName}-LoadBalancerListenerHttpId' LoadBalancerListenerRuleHttps: Type: 'AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::ListenerRule' Properties: Actions: - Type: forward TargetGroupArn: !Ref TargetGroup Conditions: - Field: host-header Values: - !If - CreateProdResources - !Sub 'api.${Endpoint}' - !Sub '${ImageTag}.api.${Endpoint}' Priority: !Ref ListenerRulePriority ListenerArn: !ImportValue 'Fn::Sub': '${ClusterStackName}-LoadBalancerListenerHttpsId'

ContainerName: !Ref 'AWS::StackName' ContainerPort: 80 TargetGroupArn: !Ref TargetGroup PlacementStrategies: - Type: spread Field: 'attribute:ecs.availability-zone' - Type: spread Field: instanceId ServiceRole: Type: 'AWS::IAM::Role' Properties: RoleName: !Sub 'ecs-service-${AWS::StackName}' Path: / AssumeRolePolicyDocument: | { "Statement": [{ "Effect": "Allow", "Principal": { "Service": [ "ecs.amazonaws.com" ]}, "Action": [ "sts:AssumeRole" ] }] } Policies: -     // If a string key is provided, the listener will consider that a module

    'module_listener_options' => [
        'module_paths' => [
            './module',
            './vendor'
        ],
        // Using __DIR__ to ensure cross-platform compatibility. Some platforms --
        // e.g., IBM i -- have problems with globs that are not qualified.
        'config_glob_paths' => [realpath(__DIR__) . '/autoload/{,*.}{global,local}.php'],
        'config_cache_key' => 'application.config.cache',
        'config_cache_enabled' => true,
        'module_map_cache_key' => 'application.module.cache',
        'module_map_cache_enabled' => true,
        'cache_dir' => 'data/cache/',
    ],
];

About this directory: =====================
By default, this application is configured to load all configs in `./config/autoload/{,*.}{global,local}.php`. Doing this provides a location for a developer to drop in configuration override files provided by modules, as well as cleanly provide individual, application-wide config files for things like database connections, etc.

<?php /** * @license http://opensource.org/licenses/BSD-3-Clause BSD-3-Clause * @copyright Copyright (c) 2014 Zend Technologies USA Inc. (http://www.zend.com) */
/** * Global Configuration Override * * You can use this file for overriding configuration values from modules, etc. * You would place values in here that are agnostic to the environment and not * sensitive to security. * * @NOTE: In practice, this file will typically be INCLUDED in your source * control, so do not include passwords or other sensitive information in this * file. */
return [ // ... ];

version: "3.3" services: sigoclinicas-api: build: context: . dockerfile: Dockerfile args: BUILD_ENV: "DEVELOPMENT" ports: - "8080:80" expose: - "9000" links: - sigoclinicas-db:db - sigoclinicas-cache:cache volumes: - ${PWD-.}:/var/www environment: XDEBUG_CONFIG: "remote_host=${REMOTE_HOST}" AWS_CREDENTIALS_KEY: "[REDACTED_SECRET]" AWS_CREDENTIALS_REGION: "us-east-1" AWS_CREDENTIALS_SECRET: "UPcrVjytGGN8xCxhZcuY+2AHtRLh/nMHgdS7mSuv" AWS_S3_ASSETS_BUCKET: "dev-assets.sigoclinicas.com.br" EMAIL_CONTATO: "contato@sigoclinicas.com.br" EMAIL_CONTATO1: "sigoclinicas@gmail.com" sigoclinicas-db: image: mysql:5.6 volumes: - ${PWD-.}/assets/mysql:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d environment: MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: "root" MYSQL_ROOT_HOST: "%" ports: - "3306:3306" expose: - "3306" sigoclinicas-cache: image: memcached:alpine expose: - "11211"

# # Use this dockerfile to run apigility. # # Start the server using docker-compose: # # docker-compose build # docker-compose up # # You can install dependencies via the container: # # docker-compose run apigility composer install # # You can manipulate dev mode from the container: # # docker-compose run apigility composer development-enable # docker-compose run apigility composer development-disable # docker-compose run apigility composer development-status # # OR use plain old docker # # docker build -f Dockerfile-dev -t apigility . # docker run -it -p "8080:80" -v $PWD:/var/www apigility # FROM php:7.3-apache
ARG BUILD_ENV="PRODUCTION"
RUN apt-get update \ && apt-get install -q -y git zlib1g-dev libmemcached-dev libicu-dev libxml2-dev zip msmtp \ && docker-php-ext-configure intl \ && docker-php-ext-install iconv opcache intl bcmath exif fileinfo gettext pdo_mysql soap \ && pecl install igbinary \ && docker-php-ext-enable igbinary \ && curl -fsSL 'https://pecl.php.net/get/memcached' -o memcached.tar.gz \ && mkdir -p /tmp/memcached \ && tar -xf memcached.tar.gz -C /tmp/memcached --strip-components=1 \ && rm memcached.tar.gz \ && docker-php-ext-configure /tmp/memcached --enable-memcached-igbinary --enable-memcached-json \ && docker-php-ext-install /tmp/memcached \ && rm -r /tmp/memcached \ && curl -sS https://getcomposer.org/installer \ | php -- --install-dir=/usr/local/bin --filename=composer --version=1.10.16 \ && rm -rf /tmp/* /var/tmp/* \ && apt-get clean \ && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* \ && usermod -u 1000 www-data \ && groupmod -g 1000 www-data
RUN if [ "$BUILD_ENV" = "DEVELOPMENT" ]; then \ pecl install xdebug; \ docker-php-ext-enable xdebug; \ echo "xdebug.remote_autostart = 0" >> /usr/local/etc/php/conf.d/docker-php-ext-xdebug.ini; \ echo "xdebug.remote_enable = 1" >> /usr/local/etc/php/conf.d/docker-php-ext-xdebug.ini; \ fi;
RUN { \ echo '[PHP]'; \ echo 'expose_php = Off'; \ echo 'error_reporting = E_ALL & ~E_DEPRECATED & ~E_STRICT'; \ echo 'log_errors = On'; \ echo 'error_log = /dev/stderr'; \ echo 'display_errors = Off'; \ echo 'register_argc_argv = Off'; \ echo 'enable_dl = Off'; \ echo 'max_execution_time = 0'; \ echo 'memory_limit = -1'; \ echo 'upload_max_filesize = 10M'; \ echo 'post_max_size = 100M'; \ echo 'sendmail_path = "/usr/bin/msmtp -t"'; \ echo '[Date]'; \ echo 'date.timezone = "America/Sao_Paulo"'; \ echo '[Session]'; \ echo 'session.save_path = "/tmp"'; \ } > /usr/local/etc/php/php.ini; \ # set recommended PHP.ini settings # see https://secure.php.net/manual/en/opcache.installation.php { \ echo 'opcache.memory_consumption=128'; \ echo 'opcache.interned_strings_buffer=8'; \ echo 'opcache.max_accelerated_files=30000'; \ echo 'opcache.revalidate_freq=2'; \ echo 'opcache.fast_shutdown=1'; \ echo 'opcache.enable_cli=1'; \ } > /usr/local/etc/php/conf.d/opcache-recommended.ini; \ { \ echo 'defaults'; \ echo 'domain amazonses.com'; \ echo 'auth plain'; \ echo 'tls on'; \ echo 'tls_certcheck off'; \ echo 'tls_starttls on'; \ echo 'account default'; \ echo 'host email-smtp.us-east-1.amazonaws.com'; \ echo 'port 587'; \ echo 'user [REDACTED_SECRET]'; \ echo 'password [REDACTED_SECRET]'; \ echo 'auto_from off'; \ echo 'maildomain amazonses.com'; \ } > /etc/msmtprc; \ { \ echo '<VirtualHost *:80>'; namespace Application\Controller;

use Zend\Mvc\Controller\AbstractActionController;
use Zend\View\Model\ViewModel;
use ZF\Apigility\Admin\Module as AdminModule;

class IndexController extends AbstractActionController
{
    public function indexAction()
    {
        if (class_exists(AdminModule::class, false)) {
            return $this->redirect()->toRoute('zf-apigility/ui');
        }
        return new ViewModel();
    }
}

<?php

namespace Application\Controller;

use Clinica\V1\Rest\Agendas\AgendasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Agendas\AgendasRepository;
use DoctrineModule\Persistence\ObjectManagerAwareInterface;
use DoctrineModule\Persistence\ProvidesObjectManager;
use Exception;
use RuntimeException;
use Zend\Console\Console;
use Zend\Console\Request;
use Zend\I18n\Translator\TranslatorAwareInterface;
use Zend\I18n\Translator\TranslatorAwareTrait;
use Zend\Log\LoggerAwareInterface;
use Zend\Log\LoggerAwareTrait;
use Zend\Mail\Message;
use Zend\Mail\Transport\TransportInterface;
use Zend\Mime\Message as MimeMessage;
use Zend\Mime\Mime as MimeMime;
use Zend\Mime\Part as MimePart;
use Zend\Mvc\Controller\AbstractActionController;
use Zend\View\Model\ViewModel;
use Zend\View\Renderer\RendererInterface;

class NotificationController extends AbstractActionController implements
    LoggerAwareInterface,
    TranslatorAwareInterface,
    ObjectManagerAwareInterface
{
    use LoggerAwareTrait, TranslatorAwareTrait, ProvidesObjectManager;

    /**
     * @var TransportInterface
     */
    protected $transport;

    /**
     * @var RendererInterface
     */
    protected $renderer;

    public function agendamentoAction()
    {
        try {
            /** @var Request $request */
            $request = $this->getRequest();

            if (! $request instanceof Request) {
                throw new RuntimeException(
                    $this->getTranslator()->translate('Acesso permitido somente via console.')
                );
            }

            /** @var AgendasRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(AgendasEntity::class);
            $agendamentos = $repository->getAgendamentosProximas24hs();

            $instance = Console::getInstance();
            /** @var AgendasEntity $agendamento */
            foreach ($repository->getAgendamentosProximas24hs() as $agendamento) {
                $instance->writeLine('Enviando notificacao para o agendamento: ' . $agendamento->getId());

                $this->messageToClient($agendamento);
                $this->messageToClinic($agendamento);
            }

            return 'Finalizado o envio do(s) ' . count($agendamentos) . ' agendamento(s).' . PHP_EOL;
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->info($e);

            return $e;
        }
    }

    /**
     * @param AgendasEntity $agendamento
     */
    private function messageToClient(AgendasEntity $agendamento)
    {
        $model = new ViewModel();
        $model->setVariables([
            'client' => $agendamento->getCliente(),
            'clinic' => $agendamento->getClinica(),
            'professional' => $agendamento->getProfissional(),
            'date' => $agendamento->getDataHora(),
            'status' => $agendamento->getStatus(),
            'services' => $agendamento->getServicos(),
        ]);
        $model->setTemplate('mail/agendamento/client');
        $message = $this->createMessage(
            $this->renderer->render($model),
            sprintf(
                '%s - Informações do Agendamento',
                $agendamento->getClinica()->getNomeFantasia()
            )
        );

        $message->setFrom('contato@addpix.com.br', 'Sigo Clinicas')
            ->setTo($agendamento->getCliente()->getEmail())
            ->setReplyTo($agendamento->getClinica()->getEmail());

        $this->transport->send($message);
    }

    /**
     * @param AgendasEntity $agendamento
     */
    private function messageToClinic(AgendasEntity $agendamento)
    {
        $model = new ViewModel();
        $model->setVariables([
            'client' => $agendamento->getCliente(),
            'clinic' => $agendamento->getClinica(),
            'professional' => $agendamento->getProfissional(),
            'date' => $agendamento->getDataHora(),
            'status' => $agendamento->getStatus(),
            'services' => $agendamento->getServicos(),
        ]);
        $model->setTemplate('mail/agendamento/clinic');
        $message = $this->createMessage(
            $this->renderer->render($model),
            sprintf(
                '%s - Informações do Agendamento',
                $agendamento->getCliente()->getNome()
            )
        );

        $message->setFrom('contato@addpix.com.br', 'Sigo Clinicas')
            ->addTo($agendamento->getProfissional()->getEmail())
            ->addTo($agendamento->getClinica()->getEmail());

        $this->transport->send($message);
    }

    /**
     * @param TransportInterface $transport
     * @return NotificationController
     */
    public function setTransport(TransportInterface $transport): NotificationController
    {
        $this->transport = $transport;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @param RendererInterface $renderer
     * @return NotificationController
     */
    public function setRenderer(RendererInterface $renderer): NotificationController
    {
        $this->renderer = $renderer;

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @param string $content
     * @param string $subject
     * @return Message
     */
    private function createMessage(string $content, string $subject) : Message
    {
        $html = new MimePart($content);
        $html->type = MimeMime::TYPE_HTML;
        $html->charset = 'utf-8';

        $body = new MimeMessage();
        $body->addPart($html);

        $message = new Message();
        $message->setSubject($subject)
                ->setBody($body);

        return $message;
    }
}

<?php

namespace Application\Controller;

use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager;
use Interop\Container\ContainerInterface;
use SlmMail\Mail\Transport\HttpTransport;
use Zend\ServiceManager\Factory\FactoryInterface;
use Zend\View\Renderer\RendererInterface;

class NotificationControllerFactory implements FactoryInterface
{
    /**
     * @param ContainerInterface $container
     * @param string $requestedName
     * @param array|null $options
     * @return NotificationController|object
     */
    public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $container, $requestedName, array $options = null)
    {
        /** @var \Zend\Log\Logger $logger */
        $logger = $container->get('log');

        /** @var \Zend\I18n\Translator\Translator $translator */
        $translator = $container->get('translator');

        /** @var \Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager $objectManager */
        $objectManager = $container->get(EntityManager::class);

        /** @var HttpTransport $transport */
        $transport = $container->get('SlmMail\Mail\Transport\SesTransport');

        /** @var RendererInterface $renderer */
        $renderer = $container->get(RendererInterface::class);

        $controller = new NotificationController();
        $controller->setLogger($logger);
        $controller->setTranslator($translator);
        $controller->setObjectManager($objectManager);
        $controller->setTransport($transport);
        $controller->setRenderer($renderer);

        return $controller;
    }
}

<?php
namespace Application\Entity;

use ZF\OAuth2\Doctrine\Permissions\Acl\Role\Role as BaseRole;

/**
 * Class Role
 *
 * @package Application\Entity
 */
class Role extends BaseRole
{
    const ROLE_ADMIN         = 'admin';
    const ROLE_ASSISTENTE    = 'assistente';
    const ROLE_CLIENTE       = 'cliente';
    const ROLE_GERENTE       = 'gerente';
    const ROLE_GUEST         = 'guest';
    const ROLE_PROFISSIONAL  = 'profissional';
    const ROLE_PROPRIETARIO  = 'proprietario';
    const ROLE_RECEPCIONISTA = 'recepcionista';

    /**
     * @var integer
     */
    protected $id;

    /**
     * Get id
     *
     * @return int
     */
    public function getId()
    {
        return $this->id;
    }

    /**
     * @return Role
     */
    public function getParent()
    {
        return parent::getParent();
    }

    /**
     * Set parent
     *
     * @param Role $parent
     * @return Role
     */
    public function setParent(Role $parent): Role
    {
        $this->parent = $parent;
        return $this;
    }
}

<?php
namespace Application\Entity;

use Doctrine\Common\Collections\ArrayCollection;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\Collection;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArraySerializableInterface;
use ZF\OAuth2\Doctrine\Entity\AccessToken;
use ZF\OAuth2\Doctrine\Entity\AuthorizationCode;
use ZF\OAuth2\Doctrine\Entity\Client;
use ZF\OAuth2\Doctrine\Entity\RefreshToken;
use ZF\OAuth2\Doctrine\Entity\UserInterface;
use ZF\OAuth2\Doctrine\Permissions\Acl\Role\ProviderInterface;
use InvalidArgumentException;

/**
 * Class User
 *
 * @package Application\Entity
 */
class User implements UserInterface, ProviderInterface, ArraySerializableInterface
{
    /**
     * @var integer
     */
    protected $id;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $username;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $password;

    /**
     * @var Client|Collection
     */
    protected $client;

    /**
     * @var AccessToken
     */
    protected $accessToken;

    /**
     * @var AuthorizationCode
     */
    protected $authorizationCode;

    /**
     * @var RefreshToken
     */
    protected $refreshToken;

    /**
     * @var Collection
     */
    protected $roles;

    /**
     * @var boolean
     */
    protected $isAdmin;

    /**
     * @var boolean
     */
    protected $isCliente;

    /**
     * @var boolean
     */
    protected $isClinica;

    /**
     * @var boolean
     */
    protected $isProfissional;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $tokenValido;

    /**
     * @var boolean
     */
    protected $primeiroLogin;

    /**
     * User constructor.
     */
    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->roles = new ArrayCollection();
    }

    /**
     * Get id
     *
     * @return int
     */
    public function getId()
    {
        return $this->id;
    }

    /**
     * Get username
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getUsername()
    {
        return $this->username;
    }

    /**
     * Set username
     *
     * @param string $username
     * @return User
     */
    public function setUsername($username)
    {
        $this->username = $username;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get password
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getPassword()
    {
        return $this->password;
    }

    /**
     * Set password
     *
     * @param string $password
     * @return User
     */
    public function setPassword($password)
    {
        $this->password = $password;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get client
     *
     * @return Client|Collection
     */
    public function getClient() {
        return $this->client;
    }

    /**
     * Set client
     *
     * @param Client $client
     * @return $this
     */
    public function setClient(Client $client = null) {
        $this->client = $client;

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get access token
     *
     * @return AccessToken
     */
    public function getAccessToken()
    {
        return $this->accessToken;
    }

    /**
     * Set access token
     *
     * @param AccessToken $accessToken
     * @return User
     */
    public function setAccessToken(AccessToken $accessToken = null)
    {
        $this->accessToken = $accessToken;

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get authorization code
     *
     * @return AuthorizationCode
     */
    public function getAuthorizationCode()
    {
        return $this->authorizationCode;
    }

    /**
     * Set authorization code
     *
     * @param AuthorizationCode $authorizationCode
     * @return User
     */
    public function setAuthorizationCode(AuthorizationCode $authorizationCode = null)
    {
        $this->authorizationCode = $authorizationCode;

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get refresh token
     *
     * @return RefreshToken
     */
    public function getRefreshToken()
    {
        return $this->refreshToken;
    }

    /**
     * Set refresh token
     *
     * @param RefreshToken $refreshToken
     * @return User
     */
    public function setRefreshToken(RefreshToken $refreshToken = null)
    {
        $this->refreshToken = $refreshToken;

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Add roles
     *
     * @param Role|Collection $roles
     * @return $this
     */
    public function addRoles($roles)
    {
        if ($roles instanceof Role) {
            $this->roles->add($roles);
        } elseif ($roles instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var Role $role */
            foreach ($roles as $role) {
                $this->roles->add($role);
            }
        } else {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('$object must be an instance of Role or Collection.');
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get roles
     *
     * @return ArrayCollection|Collection
     */
    public function getRole()
    {
        return $this->getRoles();
    }

    /**
     * Get roles
     *
     * @return ArrayCollection|Collection
     */
    public function getRoles()
    {
        return $this->roles;
    }

    /**
     * @return string
     */
    public function getTokenValido(): string
    {
        return $this->tokenValido;
    }

    /**
     * @param string $tokenValido
     * @return User
     */
    public function setTokenValido(string $tokenValido): User
    {
        $this->tokenValido = $tokenValido;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Remove roles
     *
     * @param Role|Collection $roles
     * @return $this
     */
    public function removeRoles($roles)
    {
        if ($roles instanceof Role) {
            $this->roles->removeElement($roles);
        } elseif ($roles instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var Role $role */
            foreach ($roles as $role) {
                $this->roles->removeElement($role);
            }
        } else {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('$object must be an instance of Role or Collection.');
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Set roles
     *
     * @param Collection $roles
     * @return $this
     */
    public function setRoles(Collection $roles)
    {
        $this->roles = $roles;

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Exchange array
     *
     * @param array $data
     * @return $this
     */
    public function exchangeArray(array $data)
    {
        foreach ($data as $key => $value) {
            switch ($key) {
                case 'username':
                    $this->setUsername($value);
                    break;
                case 'password':
                    $this->setPassword($value);
                    break;
            }
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get array copy
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function getArrayCopy()
    {
        return [
            'id' => $this->getId(),
            'username' => $this->getUsername(),
            'password' => $this->getPassword()
        ];
    }

    /**
     * Is admin
     *
     * @return boolean
     */
    public function isAdmin()
    {
        if (null == $this->isAdmin) {
            $this->isAdmin = false;
            if (null != $this->getRoles()) {
                $this->isAdmin = $this->getRoles()->exists(function ($key, Role $role) {
                    return $role->getRoleId() == Role::ROLE_ADMIN;
                });
            }
        }

        return $this->isAdmin;
    }

    /**
     * Is cliente
     *
     * @return boolean
     */
    public function isCliente()
    {
        if (null == $this->isCliente) {
            $this->isCliente = false;
            if (null != $this->getRoles()) {
                $this->isCliente = $this->getRoles()->exists(function ($key, Role $role) {
                    return $role->getRoleId() == Role::ROLE_CLIENTE;
                });
            }
        }

        return $this->isCliente;
    }

    /**
     * Is Clinica
     *
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isClinica(): bool
    {
        if (null === $this->isClinica) {
            $this->isClinica = false;
            if (null !== $this->getRoles()) {
                $this->isClinica = $this->getRoles()->exists(function ($key, Role $role) {
                    return
                        $role->getRoleId() === Role::ROLE_PROPRIETARIO ||
                        $role->getRoleId() === Role::ROLE_GERENTE ||
                        $role->getRoleId() === Role::ROLE_RECEPCIONISTA ||
                        $role->getRoleId() === Role::ROLE_PROFISSIONAL ||
                        $role->getRoleId() === Role::ROLE_ASSISTENTE;
                });
            }
        }

        return $this->isClinica;
    }

    /**
     * is Profissional
     *
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isProfissional(): bool
    {
        if (null === $this->isProfissional) {
            $this->isProfissional = false;
            if (null !== $this->getRoles()) {
                $this->isProfissional = $this->getRoles()->exists(function ($key, Role $role) {
                    return $role->getRoleId() === Role::ROLE_PROFISSIONAL;
                });
            }
        }

        return $this->isProfissional;
    }

    /**
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isPrimeiroLogin(): bool
    {
        return $this->primeiroLogin !== null && $this->primeiroLogin;
    }

    /**
     * @param bool $primeiroLogin
     * @return User
     */
    public function setPrimeiroLogin(bool $primeiroLogin): User
    {
        $this->primeiroLogin = $primeiroLogin;
        return $this;
    }
}

<?php
namespace Application\Filter;

use Zend\Filter\DateTimeFormatter as ZendDateTimeFormatter;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;

/**
 * Class DateTime
 *
 * @package Application\Filter
 */
class DateTimeFormatter extends ZendDateTimeFormatter
{
    /**
     * Normalize the provided value to a formatted string
     *
     * @param \DateTime|int|string|array $value
     * @return string
     */
    protected function normalizeDateTime($value)

    {
        try {
            if (is_array($value)) {
                $value = new \DateTime($value['date'], new \DateTimeZone($value['timezone']));
            }

            return parent::normalizeDateTime($value);

        }  catch (\Exception $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }

    }
}

<?php
namespace Application\Filter;

use AwsModule\Filter\File\S3RenameUpload;
use Zend\Filter\Exception\RuntimeException as FilterRuntimeException;
use Zend\Stdlib\ErrorHandler;
use Zend\Stdlib\RequestInterface;

/**
 * Class RenameUpload
 *
 * @package Application\Filter
 */
class RenameUpload extends S3RenameUpload
{
    /**
     * @var RequestInterface
     */
    protected $request;

    /**
     * @param RequestInterface $request
     */
    public function setRequest(RequestInterface $request)
    {
        $this->request = $request;
    }

    /**
     * Override moveUploadedFile
     *
     * If the request is not HTTP, or not a PUT or PATCH request, delegates to
     * the parent functionality.
     *
     * Otherwise, does a `rename()` operation, and returns the status of the
     * operation.
     *
     * @param string $sourceFile
     * @param string $targetFile
     * @return bool
     * @throws FilterRuntimeException in the event of a warning
     */
    protected function moveUploadedFile($sourceFile, $targetFile)
    {
        if (null === $this->request
            || ! method_exists($this->request, 'isPut')
            || (! $this->request->isPut() && ! $this->request->isPatch())
        ) {
            return parent::moveUploadedFile($sourceFile, $targetFile);
        }

        ErrorHandler::start();
        $result = file_put_contents($targetFile, file_get_contents($sourceFile));
        unlink($sourceFile);
        $warningException = ErrorHandler::stop();

        if (false === $result || null !== $warningException) {
            throw new FilterRuntimeException(
                sprintf('File "%s" could not be renamed. An error occurred while processing the file.', $sourceFile),
                0,
                $warningException
            );
        }
        return $result;
    }
}

<?php
namespace Application\Filter;

use Aws\Sdk as AwsSdk;
use Interop\Container\ContainerInterface;
use Zend\ServiceManager\Factory\FactoryInterface;

/**
 * Class S3RenameUploadFactory
 *
 * @package Application\Filter
 */
class S3RenameUploadFactory implements FactoryInterface
{
    /**
     * Create an object
     *
     * @param ContainerInterface $container
     * @param string $requestedName
     * @param array|null $options
     * @return RenameUpload|object
     * @throws \Psr\Container\ContainerExceptionInterface
     * @throws \Psr\Container\NotFoundExceptionInterface
     */
    public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $container, $requestedName, array $options = null)
    {
        /** @var AwsSdk $awsSdk */
        $awsSdk = $container->get(AwsSdk::class);

        $filter = new RenameUpload($awsSdk->createS3(), $options);

        if ($container->has('Request')) {
            $filter->setRequest($container->get('Request'));
        }

        return $filter;
    }
}

<?php
namespace Application\Filter;

use Zend\Filter\AbstractFilter;
use Zend\Filter\Digits;

class Telefone extends AbstractFilter
{

    /**
     * Filter value to Telefone format
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function filter($value)
    {
        $digits = new Digits();
        $value = $digits->filter($value);

        if (strlen($value) == 10) {
            return '(' . substr($value, 0, 2) . ') ' . substr($value, 2, 4) . '-' . substr($value, 6);
        } elseif (strlen($value) == 11) {
            return '(' . substr($value, 0, 2) . ') ' . substr($value, 2, 5) . '-' . substr($value, 7);
        } else {
            // quantidade de numeros inválidos para telefone
            return null;
        }
    }
}

<?php
namespace Application\Listener;

use Application\Entity\User;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasRepository;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Usuarios\UsuariosEntity;
use DoctrineModule\Persistence\ObjectManagerAwareInterface;
use DoctrineModule\Persistence\ProvidesObjectManager;
use Zend\EventManager\EventInterface;
use Zend\I18n\Translator\TranslatorAwareInterface;
use Zend\I18n\Translator\TranslatorAwareTrait;
use Zend\Log\LoggerAwareInterface;
use Zend\Log\LoggerAwareTrait;
use Zend\Mvc\MvcEvent;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblemResponse;
use ZF\ContentNegotiation\Request;
use ZF\MvcAuth\Identity\GuestIdentity;
use ZF\MvcAuth\MvcAuthEvent;
use ZF\OAuth2\Doctrine\Entity\UserInterface;

/**
 * Class AuthenticationListener
 *
 * @package Application\Listener
 */
class AuthenticationListener implements LoggerAwareInterface, TranslatorAwareInterface, ObjectManagerAwareInterface
{
    use LoggerAwareTrait, TranslatorAwareTrait, ProvidesObjectManager;

    /**
     * @param MvcAuthEvent $mvcAuthEvent
     * @return EventInterface|ApiProblemResponse
     */
    public function __invoke(MvcAuthEvent $mvcAuthEvent)
    {
        try {
            if ($mvcAuthEvent->getMvcEvent()->getRouteMatch()->getMatchedRouteName() !== 'clinica.rest.clinicas') {
                return $mvcAuthEvent;
            }

            /** @var \ZF\OAuth2\Doctrine\Identity\AuthenticatedIdentity $identity */
            $identity = $mvcAuthEvent->getIdentity();

            if ($identity instanceof GuestIdentity) {
                return $mvcAuthEvent;
            }

            /** @var UserInterface $user */
            if ($user = $identity->getUser()) {
                if ($user instanceof User) {
                    if ($user->isAdmin()) {
                        return $mvcAuthEvent;
                    }

                    /** @var Request $request */
                    $request = $mvcAuthEvent->getMvcEvent()->getRequest();
                    if ($request->isGet() && $request->getRequestUri() === '/clinicas') {
                        return $mvcAuthEvent;
                    }

                    if ($user instanceof UsuariosEntity) {
                        UsuariosEntity::$clinicaSelecionada = $this->getClinica($mvcAuthEvent->getMvcEvent(), $user);
                    }
                }
            }

            return $mvcAuthEvent;
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->err($e->getMessage(), $e->getTrace());

            return new ApiProblemResponse(
                new ApiProblem(403, $e->getMessage())
            );
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get clinica
     *
     * @param MvcEvent $event
     * @param UsuariosEntity $user
     * @return ClinicasEntity
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    private function getClinica(MvcEvent $event, UsuariosEntity $user)
    {
        if ($id = (integer) $event->getRouteMatch()->getParam('clinica', $event->getRouteMatch()->getParam('id'))) {
            /** @var ClinicasRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClinicasEntity::class);

            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            if ($clinica = $repository->getClinicaUser($id, $user)) {
                return $clinica;
            }
        }

        throw new \InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Acesso negado a esta Clínica'));
    }
}

<?php
namespace Application\Listener;

use Interop\Container\ContainerInterface;
use Zend\ServiceManager\Exception\ServiceNotCreatedException;
use Zend\ServiceManager\Exception\ServiceNotFoundException;
use Zend\ServiceManager\Factory\FactoryInterface;

/**
 * Class AuthenticationListenerFactory
 *
 * @package Application\Listener
 */
class AuthenticationListenerFactory implements FactoryInterface
{
    /**
     * Create an object
     *
     * @param  ContainerInterface $container
     * @param  string             $requestedName
     * @param  null|array         $options
     * @return AuthenticationListener
     * @throws ServiceNotFoundException if unable to resolve the service.
     * @throws ServiceNotCreatedException if an exception is raised when
     *     creating a service.
     */
    public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $container, $requestedName, array $options = null)
    {
        /** @var \Zend\Log\Logger $logger */
        $logger = $container->get('log');

        /** @var \Zend\I18n\Translator\Translator $translator */
        $translator = $container->get('translator');

        /** @var \Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager $objectManager */
        $objectManager = $container->get(\Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager::class);

        $listener = new AuthenticationListener();
        $listener->setLogger($logger);
        $listener->setTranslator($translator);
        $listener->setObjectManager($objectManager);

        return $listener;
    }
}

<?php
namespace Application;

use Application\Listener\AuthenticationListener;
use Application\Listener\AuthorizationListener;
use Zend\Console\Adapter\AdapterInterface as ConsoleAdapter;
use Zend\Console\Console;
use Zend\ModuleManager\Feature\ConsoleUsageProviderInterface;
use Zend\Mvc\MvcEvent;
use ZF\MvcAuth\MvcAuthEvent;

/**
 * Class Module
 * @package Application
 */
class Module implements ConsoleUsageProviderInterface
{
    /**
     * Bootstrap
     *
     * @param MvcEvent $e
     * @throws \Psr\Container\ContainerExceptionInterface
     * @throws \Psr\Container\NotFoundExceptionInterface
     */
    public function onBootstrap(MvcEvent $e)
    {
        if (! Console::isConsole()) {
            /** @var \Zend\ServiceManager\ServiceLocatorInterface $service */
            $service = $e->getApplication()->getServiceManager();

            /** @var \Zend\Http\Headers $headers */
            $headers = $e->getApplication()->getRequest()->getHeaders();

            if ($service->has('Zend\I18n\Translator\TranslatorInterface')) {
                /** @var \Zend\I18n\Translator\Translator $config */
                $config = $service->get('Zend\I18n\Translator\TranslatorInterface');

                /** @var array $translatorConfig */
                $translatorConfig = $service->get('config')['translator'];

                if ($headers->has('Accept-Language')) {
                    $locales = $headers->get('Accept-Language')->getPrioritized();

                    foreach ($locales as $locale) {
                        if (!!($match = \Locale::lookup($translatorConfig['allowed_locales'], $locale->getLanguage()))) {
                            \Locale::setDefault($match);
                            $config->setLocale($match)
                                ->setFallbackLocale(substr($match, 0, 2));

                            break;
                        }
                    }

                    if (!$match) {
                        \Locale::setDefault($translatorConfig['default_locale']);
                        $config->setLocale($translatorConfig['default_locale']);
                    }
                } else {
                    \Locale::setDefault($translatorConfig['default_locale']);
                    $config->setLocale($translatorConfig['default_locale']);
                }
            }

            if ($service->has('MvcTranslator')) {
                /** @var \Zend\Mvc\I18n\Translator $translator */
                $translator = $service->get('MvcTranslator');

                \Zend\Validator\AbstractValidator::setDefaultTranslator($translator);
            }

            $eventManager = $e->getApplication()->getEventManager();

            if ($service->has(AuthenticationListener::class)) {
                $eventManager->attach(
                    MvcAuthEvent::EVENT_AUTHENTICATION_POST,
                    $service->get(AuthenticationListener::class),
                    100 // Less than 1000 to allow roles to be added first && >= 100
                );
            }

            $eventManager->attach(
                MvcAuthEvent::EVENT_AUTHORIZATION,
                new AuthorizationListener(),
                100 // Less than 1000 to allow roles to be added first && >= 100
            );
        }
    }

    public function getConfig()
    {
        return include __DIR__ . '/../config/module.config.php';
    }

    public function getConsoleUsage(ConsoleAdapter $console)
    {
        return [
            'agendamento' => 'Envia notificacoes de agendamento',
        ];
    }
}

<?php
namespace Application\Repository;

use Doctrine\ORM\EntityRepository as DoctrineRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\Query;
use Zend\Filter\Word\SeparatorToCamelCase;

/**
 * Class EntityRepository
 *
 * @package Application\Repository
 */
abstract class EntityRepository extends DoctrineRepository
{
    /**
     * @var \Zend\Filter\Word\SeparatorToCamelCase
     */
    protected $filter;

    /**
     * Mount restrictions
     *
     * @param \Doctrine\ORM\QueryBuilder $qb
     * @param array $params
     * @param string $parentKey
     */
    protected function mountRestrictions(&$qb, array $params, $parentKey = '') {
        foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
            if(isset($value['expr']) && strtolower($value['expr']) == 'or') {
                $or = new \Doctrine\ORM\Query\Expr\Orx();
                foreach ($value["value"] as $field) {
                    $or->add($key.' = '.$field);
                }

                $qb->andWhere($or);
            } else {
                $y = ':' . $parentKey . $this->getFilter()->filter($key);

                if (is_array($value) && !isset($value['value'], $value['expr'])) {
                    $this->mountRestrictions($qb, $value, $key);

                } elseif (is_array($value) && isset($value['value'], $value['expr'])) {
                    switch (strtolower($value['expr'])) {
                        case 'gt':
                            $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->gt($key, $y));
                            break;
                        case 'gte':
                            $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->gte($key, $y));
                            break;
                        case 'lt':
                            $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->lt($key, $y));
                            break;
                        case 'lte':
                            $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->lte($key, $y));
                            break;
                        case 'neq':
                            $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->neq($key, $y));
                            break;
                        case 'like':
                            $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->like($key, $y));
                            break;
                        case 'notlike':
                            $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->notLike($key, $y));
                            break;
                        case 'in':
                            $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->in($key, $y));
                            break;
                        case 'notin':
                            $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->notIn($key, $y));
                            break;
                        case 'regexp':
                            $qb->andWhere('REGEXP(' . $key . ', ' . $y . ') = true');
                            break;
                    }

                    $qb->setParameter($y, $value['value']);
                } else {
                    if (strpos($value, '%') !== false) {
                        $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->like($key, $y));
                    } elseif (strtolower($value) == 'isnull') {
                        $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->isNull($key));
                        continue;
                    } elseif (strtolower($value) == 'isnotnull') {
                        $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->isNotNull($key));
                        continue;
                    } else {
                        $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq($key, $y));
                    }

                    $qb->setParameter($y, $value);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get filter
     *
     * @return \Zend\Filter\Word\SeparatorToCamelCase
     */
    protected function getFilter() {
        if (null === $this->filter) {
            $this->filter = new SeparatorToCamelCase('.');
        }

        return $this->filter;
    }

    /**
     * Fetch all
     *
     * @param array|null $searchParam
     * @param array|null $orderBy
     * @return Query|object|array
     */
    abstract public function fetchAll(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null);

    /**
     * Fetch
     *
     * @param integer $id
     * @return Query|object|array
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    abstract public function fetch($id);
}

<?php
namespace Application\Rest;

use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use Doctrine\Common\Persistence\ObjectRepository;
use Doctrine\DBAL\Exception\ForeignKeyConstraintViolationException;
use Doctrine\ORM\Tools\Pagination\Paginator as ORMPaginator;
use DoctrineModule\Stdlib\Hydrator\DoctrineObject as Hydrator;
use DoctrineModule\Persistence\ObjectManagerAwareInterface;
use DoctrineModule\Persistence\ProvidesObjectManager;
use DoctrineORMModule\Paginator\Adapter\DoctrinePaginator as DoctrineAdapter;
use Exception;
use Zend\I18n\Translator\TranslatorAwareInterface;
use Zend\I18n\Translator\TranslatorAwareTrait;
use Zend\Log\LoggerAwareInterface;
use Zend\Log\LoggerAwareTrait;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use ZF\Rest\AbstractResourceListener as ZFAbstractResourceListener;

/**
 * Class AbstractResourceListener
 *
 * @package Application\Rest
 */
class AbstractResourceListener extends ZFAbstractResourceListener implements
    LoggerAwareInterface,
    TranslatorAwareInterface,
    ObjectManagerAwareInterface
{
    use LoggerAwareTrait, TranslatorAwareTrait, ProvidesObjectManager;

    /**
     * @var ObjectRepository
     */
    protected $repository;

    /**
     * Create a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function create($data)
    {
        try {
            $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
            $object = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), new $this->entityClass());

            $this->objectManager->persist($object);
            $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

            return ($this->getRepository() instanceof EntityRepository ?
                $this->getRepository()->fetch($object->getId()) : $object);
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Delete a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @return bool|ApiProblem
     */
    public function delete($id)
    {
        try {
            if ($entity = $this->getRepository()->find($id)) {
                $this->getObjectManager()->remove($entity);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return true;
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Register not found'));
        } catch (ForeignKeyConstraintViolationException $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->info($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Record being used by another resource.'));
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
        try {
            if ($object = ($this->getRepository() instanceof EntityRepository ?
                $this->getRepository()->fetch($id) : $this->getRepository()->find($id))) {
                return $object;
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Register not found'));
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch all or a subset of resources
     *
     * @param  array $params
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetchAll($params = [])
    {
        try {
            if ($this->getRepository() instanceof EntityRepository) {
                $searchParam = [];
                if (isset($params->query)) {
                    $searchParam['query'] = $params->query;
                }

                $orderBy = null;
                if (isset($params->orderby)) {
                    $orderBy = $params->orderby;
                }

                $query = $this->getRepository()->fetchAll($searchParam, $orderBy);
                $adapter = new DoctrineAdapter(new ORMPaginator($query));
                return new $this->collectionClass($adapter);
            }

            return $this->getRepository()->findAll();
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Patch (partial in-place update) a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function patch($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            if ($object = $this->getRepository()->find($id)) {
                $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
                $object = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), $object);

                $this->objectManager->persist($object);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return ($this->getRepository() instanceof EntityRepository ?
                    $this->getRepository()->fetch($id) : $object);
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Register not found'));
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function update($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            if ($object = $this->getRepository()->find($id)) {
                $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
                $object = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), $object);

                $this->objectManager->persist($object);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return ($this->getRepository() instanceof EntityRepository ?
                    $this->getRepository()->fetch($id) : $object);
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Register not found'));
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get repository
     *
     * @return ObjectRepository|EntityRepository
     */
    protected function getRepository()
    {
        if (null === $this->repository) {
            $this->repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository($this->entityClass);
        }

        return $this->repository;
    }
}

<?php
namespace Application\Rest;

use Application\Entity\Role;
use Application\Entity\User;
use Application\Service\OAuth2ClientService;
use Doctrine\ORM\Query;
use DoctrineModule\Stdlib\Hydrator\DoctrineObject as Hydrator;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use Exception;

/**
 * Class AbstractUserResourceListener
 *
 * @package Application\Rest
 */
abstract class AbstractUserResourceListener extends AbstractResourceListener
{

    /**
     * @var OAuth2ClientService
     */
    protected $oAuth2ClientService;

    /**
     * Default user role
     *
     * @var string
     */
    protected $defaultUserRole = Role::ROLE_GUEST;

    /**
     * Create
     *
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return array|ApiProblem
     */
    public function create($data)
    {
        try {
            $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
            /** @var mixed $object */
            $object = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), new $this->entityClass());

            if (method_exists($object, 'getUser')){
                /** @var User $user */
                $user = $object->getUser();

                $this->createUserPassword($user);

                if($user->isCliente()) {
                    $user->setPrimeiroLogin(false);

                    $this->getObjectManager()->persist($user);
                }
            }

            $this->getObjectManager()->persist($object);
            $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

            return $this->getRepository()->fetch($object->getId());
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Patch (partial in-place update) a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function patch($id, $data)
    {
        return $this->__update($id, $data);
    }

    /**
     * Update a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function update($id, $data)
    {
        return $this->__update($id, $data);
    }

    /**
     * Set OAuth2 Client Service
     *
     * @param OAuth2ClientService $oAuth2ClientService
     */
    public function setOAuth2ClientService(OAuth2ClientService $oAuth2ClientService)
    {
        $this->oAuth2ClientService = $oAuth2ClientService;
    }

    /**
     * Get user role
     *
     * @return Role
     */
    protected function getUserRole()
    {
        $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(Role::class);

        return $repository->findOneByRoleId($this->defaultUserRole);
    }

    /**
     * Update
     *
     * @param $id
     * @param $data
     * @return array|Query|object|ApiProblem
     */
    private function __update($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            if ($object = $this->getRepository()->find($id)) {
                if (method_exists($object, 'getUser')) {
                    $roles = clone $object->getUser()->getRoles();
                    $password = $object->getUser()->getPassword();
                }

                $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
                /** @var mixed $object */
                $object = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), $object);

                if (
                    method_exists($object, 'getUser') &&
                    $this->getInputFilter()->has('user')
                ) {
                    /** @var User $user */
                    $user = $object->getUser();

                    // Desfaz qualquer alteração que houver no Hydrator
                    $user->setRoles($roles)
                         ->setPassword($password);

                    if (
                        $this->getInputFilter()->get('user')->has('password') &&
                        null !== $this->getInputFilter()->get('user')->get('password')->getValue() &&
                        '' !== $this->getInputFilter()->get('user')->get('password')->getValue()
                    ) {
                        $this->createUserPassword($user);
                    }
                }

                $this->getObjectManager()->persist($object);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return $this->getRepository()->fetch($id);
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Register not found.'));
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    private function createUserPassword(User $user)
    {
        if (
            $this->getInputFilter()->get('user')->has('password') &&
            null !== $this->getInputFilter()->get('user')->get('password')->getValue() &&
            '' !== $this->getInputFilter()->get('user')->get('password')->getValue()
        ) {
            // Criptogra senha do usuário
            $user->setPassword(
                $this->oAuth2ClientService->createPasswordHash(
                    $this->getInputFilter()->get('user')->getValue('password')
                )
            );
        }

        // Cria um cliente na tabela OAuth2
        $this->oAuth2ClientService->create($user);

        // Added user role
        if ($user->getRoles()->isEmpty()) {
            $user->addRoles($this->getUserRole());
        }

        $this->getObjectManager()->persist($user);
    }
}

<?php
namespace Application\Service;

use Application\Entity\User;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\Collection;
use DoctrineModule\Persistence\ObjectManagerAwareInterface;
use DoctrineModule\Persistence\ProvidesObjectManager;
use ZF\OAuth2\Adapter\BcryptTrait;
use ZF\OAuth2\Doctrine\Entity\Client as OAuthClient;

/**
 * Class OAuth2ClientService
 *
 * @package Application\Service
 */
class OAuth2ClientService implements ObjectManagerAwareInterface
{
    use BcryptTrait, ProvidesObjectManager;

    /**
     * Create OAuth2 Client but not flush
     *
     * @param User $user
     * @return User
     */
    public function create(User $user)
    {
        /**
         * Se o usuário possuir uma Collection recupera o primeiro, se não cria um novo
         */
        $client = new OAuthClient();
        if ($user->getClient() instanceof Collection && count($user->getClient()) > 0) {
            $client = $user->getClient()->first();
        }

        $client->setUser($user);
        $client->setClientId($user->getUsername());
        $client->setSecret(null);
        $client->setGrantType(null);

        $this->getObjectManager()->persist($client);

        return $user;
    }

    /**
     * Update user password
     *
     * @param User $user
     * @param string $oldPassword
     * @param string $newPassword
     * @return bool
     */
    public function update(User $user, string $oldPassword, string $newPassword)
    {
        if (!$this->verifyHash($oldPassword, $user->getPassword())) {
            $user->setPassword($this->createPasswordHash($newPassword));

            $this->getObjectManager()->persist($user);

            return true;
        }

        return false;
    }

    /**
     * Create password hash
     *
     * @param string $password
     * @return string
     */
    public function createPasswordHash(string $password)
    {
        $this->createBcryptHash($password);

        return $password;
    }
}

<?php
namespace Application\Service;

use Interop\Container\ContainerInterface;
use Zend\ServiceManager\Exception\ServiceNotCreatedException;
use Zend\ServiceManager\Exception\ServiceNotFoundException;
use Zend\ServiceManager\Factory\FactoryInterface;

/**
 * Class OAuth2ClientServiceFactory
 *
 * @package Application\Service
 */
class OAuth2ClientServiceFactory implements FactoryInterface
{
    /**
     * Create an object
     *
     * @param  ContainerInterface $container
     * @param  string $requestedName
     * @param  null|array $options
     * @return OAuth2ClientService
     * @throws ServiceNotFoundException if unable to resolve the service.
     * @throws ServiceNotCreatedException if an exception is raised when
     *     creating a service.
     */
    public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $container, $requestedName, array $options = null)
    {
        /** @var \Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager $objectManager */
        $objectManager = $container->get(\Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager::class);

        $service = new OAuth2ClientService();
        $service->setObjectManager($objectManager);
        $service->setBcryptCost($container->get('Config')['zf-oauth2-doctrine']['default']['bcrypt_cost']);

        return $service;
    }
}

<?php
namespace Application\Validator;

use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager;
use DoctrineModule\Validator\NoObjectExists;
use Interop\Container\ContainerInterface;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;
use Zend\ServiceManager\Factory\FactoryInterface;

/**
 * Class NoObjectExistsFactory
 *
 * @package Application\Validator
 */
class NoObjectExistsFactory implements FactoryInterface
{
    /**
     * Create an object
     *
     * @param ContainerInterface $container
     * @param string $requestedName
     * @param array|null $options
     * @return NoObjectExists|object
     * @throws \Psr\Container\ContainerExceptionInterface
     * @throws \Psr\Container\NotFoundExceptionInterface
     */
    public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $container, $requestedName, array $options = null)
    {
        if (isset($options['entity_class'])) {
            /** @var \Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager $entityManager */
            $entityManager = $container->get(EntityManager::class);

            /** @var \Doctrine\ORM\EntityRepository $objectRepository */
            $objectRepository = $entityManager->getRepository($options['entity_class']);

            /** @var array $options */
            $options = ArrayUtils::merge($options, ['object_repository' => $objectRepository]);
        }

        return new NoObjectExists($options);
    }
}

<?php
namespace Application\Validator;

use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager;
use DoctrineModule\Validator\UniqueObject;
use Interop\Container\ContainerInterface;
use Zend\ServiceManager\Factory\FactoryInterface;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;

/**
 * Class UniqueObjectFactory
 *
 * @package Application\Validator
 */
class UniqueObjectFactory implements FactoryInterface
{
    /**
     * Create an object
     *
     * @param ContainerInterface $container
     * @param string $requestedName
     * @param array|null $options
     * @return UniqueObject|object
     * @throws \Psr\Container\ContainerExceptionInterface
     * @throws \Psr\Container\NotFoundExceptionInterface
     */
    public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $container, $requestedName, array $options = null)
    {
        if (isset($options['entity_class'])) {
            /** @var \Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager $entityManager */
            $entityManager = $container->get(EntityManager::class);

            /** @var \Doctrine\ORM\EntityRepository $objectRepository */
            $objectRepository = $entityManager->getRepository($options['entity_class']);

            /** @var array $options */
            $options = ArrayUtils::merge($options, [
                'object_manager'    => $entityManager,
                'object_repository' => $objectRepository
            ]);
        }

        return new UniqueObject($options);
    }
}

namespace ApplicationTest\Controller;

use Application\Controller\IndexController;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;
use Zend\Test\PHPUnit\Controller\AbstractHttpControllerTestCase;

class IndexControllerTest extends AbstractHttpControllerTestCase
{
    public function setUp()
    {
        // The module configuration should still be applicable for tests.
        // You can override configuration here with test case specific values,
        // such as sample view templates, path stacks, module_listener_options,
        // etc.
        $configOverrides = [
            'module_listener_options' => [
                'config_cache_enabled' => false,
            ],
        ];

        $this->setApplicationConfig(ArrayUtils::merge(
            include __DIR__ . '/../../../../config/application.config.php',
            $configOverrides
        ));

        parent::setUp();
    }

    public function testIndexActionCanBeAccessed()
    {
        $this->dispatch('/', 'GET');
        $this->assertResponseStatusCode(200);
        $this->assertModuleName('application');
        $this->assertControllerName(IndexController::class); // as specified in router's controller name alias
        $this->assertControllerClass('IndexController');
        $this->assertMatchedRouteName('home');
    }

    public function testIndexActionViewModelTemplateRenderedWithinLayout()
    {
        $this->dispatch('/', 'GET');
        $this->assertQuery('.hero-unit');
    }

    public function testInvalidRouteDoesNotCrash()
    {
        $this->dispatch('/invalid/route', 'GET');
        $this->assertResponseStatusCode(404);
    }
}

namespace ApplicationTest\Controller;

use Application\Controller\IndexController;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;
use Zend\Test\PHPUnit\Controller\AbstractHttpControllerTestCase;

/**
 * Name is intentional, to force it to run last; this was necessary as,
 * once the Admin module is loaded, the controller is able to find it and
 * will attempt the redirect.
 */
class ZZIndexControllerDevModeTest extends AbstractHttpControllerTestCase
{
    public function setUp()
    {
        // The module configuration should still be applicable for tests.
        // You can override configuration here with test case specific values,
        // such as sample view templates, path stacks, module_listener_options,
        // etc.
        $configOverrides = [
            'modules' => [
                'ZF\Apigility\Admin',
                'ZF\Apigility\Admin\Ui',
            ],
            'module_listener_options' => [
                'config_cache_enabled' => false,
                'config_glob_paths' => [
                    __DIR__ . '/../../../../config/autoload/{,*.}{global,local}.php',
                    __DIR__ . '/../../../../config/autoload/{,*.}{global,local}-development.php',
                ],
            ]
        ];

        $this->setApplicationConfig(ArrayUtils::merge(
            include __DIR__ . '/../../../../config/application.config.php',
            $configOverrides
        ));

        parent::setUp();
    }

    public function testIndexActionRedirectsToAdminUi()
    {
        $this->dispatch('/', 'GET');
        $this->assertResponseStatusCode(302);
        $this->assertRedirectRegex('#/ui$#');
    }
}

In order to use the Apigility Admin UI you need to enable the development mode. Currently your application is running in production mode.

To enable the development mode you can execute the following command from the terminal:

$ composer development-enable

Remember to set always the production mode if you want to deploy your API in a staging/production environment.
