namespace Cliente\V1\Rest\Clientes;

use Application\Entity\User;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clientes\ClientesStatusEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Agendas\AgendasEntity;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\Collection;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\ArrayCollection;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\Criteria;
use Endereco\Entity\Endereco;
use Telefone\Entity\Telefone;

/**
 * Class ClientesEntity
 *
 * @package Cliente\V1\Rest\Clientes
 */
class ClientesEntity
{
    const CLIENTE_ORIGEM_BALCAO = 'balcao';
    const CLIENTE_ORIGEM_WEB = 'web';

    /**
     * @var integer
     */
    protected $id;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $nome;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $email;

    /**
     * @var \DateTime
     */
    protected $dataNascimento;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $genero;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $cpf;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $convenios;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $nomeDependentes;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $origem;

    /**
     * @var Endereco
     */
    protected $endereco;

    /**
     * @var User
     */
    protected $user;

    /**
     * @var Collection
     */
    protected $telefones;

    /**
     * @var bool
     */
    protected $ativo = true;

    /**
     * @var bool
     */
    protected $termosAceitos = false;

    /**
     * @var \DateTime
     */
    protected $dataHoraAceite;

    /**
     * @var Collection
     */
    protected $clinicas;

    /**
     * @var AgendasEntity
     */
    protected $agendas;

    /**
     * @var ClientesStatusEntity
     */
    protected $status;

    /**
     * Clientes constructor.
     */
    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->telefones = new ArrayCollection();
        $this->clinicas = new ArrayCollection();
        $this->agendas = new ArrayCollection();
        $this->origem = self::CLIENTE_ORIGEM_WEB;
    }

    /**
     * Get id
     *
     * @return int
     */
    public function getId(): int
    {
        return $this->id;
    }

    /**
     * Get nome
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getNome(): string
    {
        return $this->nome;
    }

    /**
     * Set nome
     *
     * @param string $nome
     * @return ClientesEntity
     */
    public function setNome(string $nome): ClientesEntity
    {
        $this->nome = $nome;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get email
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getEmail(): string
    {
        return $this->email;
    }

    /**
     * Set email
     *
     * @param string $email
     * @return ClientesEntity
     */
    public function setEmail(string $email): ClientesEntity
    {
        $this->email = $email;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get data nascimento
     *
     * @return \DateTime
     */
    public function getDataNascimento(): ?\DateTime
    {
        return $this->dataNascimento;
    }

    /**
     * Set data nascimento
     *
     * @param \DateTime $dataNascimento
     * @return ClientesEntity
     */
    public function setDataNascimento(\DateTime $dataNascimento = null): ClientesEntity
    {
        $this->dataNascimento = $dataNascimento;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get genero
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getGenero(): ?string
    {
        return $this->genero;
    }

    /**
     * Set genero
     *
     * @param string $genero
     * @return ClientesEntity
     */
    public function setGenero(string $genero = null): ClientesEntity
    {
        $this->genero = $genero;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get cpf
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getCpf(): ?string
    {
        return $this->cpf;
    }

    /**
     * Set cpf
     *
     * @param string $cpf
     * @return ClientesEntity
     */
    public function setCpf(string $cpf = null): ClientesEntity
    {
        $this->cpf = $cpf;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get convenios
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getConvenios(): ?string
    {
        return $this->convenios;
    }

    /**
     * Set convenios
     *
     * @param string $convenios
     * @return ClientesEntity
     */
    public function setConvenios(string $convenios = null): ClientesEntity
    {
        $this->convenios = $convenios;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get nome dependentes
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getNomeDependentes(): ?string
    {
        return $this->nomeDependentes;
    }

    /**
     * Set nome dependentes
     *
     * @param string $nomeDependentes
     * @return ClientesEntity
     */
    public function setNomeDependentes(string $nomeDependentes = null): ClientesEntity
    {
        $this->nomeDependentes = $nomeDependentes;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get origem
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getOrigem(): string
    {
        return $this->origem;
    }

    /**
     * Set origem
     *
     * @param string $origem
     * @return ClientesEntity
     */
    public function setOrigem(string $origem): ClientesEntity
    {
        $this->origem = $origem;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get endereco
     *
     * @return Endereco|null
     */
    public function getEndereco(): Endereco
    {
        return $this->endereco;
    }

    /**
     * Set endereco
     *
     * @param Endereco|null $endereco
     * @return ClientesEntity
     */
    public function setEndereco(Endereco $endereco = null): ClientesEntity
    {
        $this->endereco = $endereco;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get user
     *
     * @return User
     */
    public function getUser(): User
    {
        return $this->user;
    }

    /**
     * Set user
     *
     * @param User $user
     * @return ClientesEntity
     */
    public function setUser(User $user): ClientesEntity
    {
        $this->user = $user;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Add telefones
     *
     * @param Telefone|Collection $telefones
     * @return ClientesEntity
     */
    public function addTelefones($telefones): ClientesEntity
    {
        if ($telefones instanceof Collection) {
            foreach ($telefones as $telefone) {
                $this->telefones->add($telefone);
            }
        } elseif ($telefones instanceof Telefone) {
            $this->telefones->add($telefones);
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get telefones
     *
     * @return Collection
     */
    public function getTelefones(): Collection
    {
        return $this->telefones;
    }

    /**
     * Remove telefones
     *
     * @param Telefone|Collection $telefones
     * @return ClientesEntity
     */
    public function removeTelefones($telefones): ClientesEntity
    {
        if ($telefones instanceof Collection) {
            foreach ($telefones as $telefone) {
                $this->telefones->removeElement($telefone);
            }
        } elseif ($telefones instanceof Telefone) {
            $this->telefones->removeElement($telefones);
        } else {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Object must be an instance of Collection or Telefone.');
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Set telefones
     *
     * @param Collection $telefones
     * @return ClientesEntity
     */
    public function setTelefones(Collection $telefones): ClientesEntity
    {
        $this->telefones = $telefones;

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isAtivo(): bool
    {
        return $this->ativo;
    }

    /**
     * @param bool $ativo
     * @return ClientesEntity
     */
    public function setAtivo(bool $ativo = true): ClientesEntity
    {
        $this->ativo = $ativo;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isTermosAceitos(): bool
    {
        return $this->termosAceitos;
    }

    /**
     * @param bool $termosAceitos
     * @return ClientesEntity
     */
    public function setTermosAceitos($termosAceitos = false): ClientesEntity
    {
        $this->termosAceitos = $termosAceitos;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get data hora aceite
     *
     * @return \DateTime
     */
    public function getDataHoraAceite(): ?\DateTime
    {
        return $this->dataHoraAceite;
    }

    /**
     * Set data hora aceite
     *
     * @param \DateTime $dataHoraAceite
     * @return ClientesEntity
     */
    public function setDataHoraAceite(\DateTime $dataHoraAceite = null): ClientesEntity
    {
        $this->dataHoraAceite = $dataHoraAceite;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Add clinicas
     *
     * @param ClinicasEntity|Collection $clinicas
     * @return ClientesEntity
     */
    public function addClinicas($clinicas): ClientesEntity
    {
        if ($clinicas instanceof ClinicasEntity) {
            $this->clinicas->add($clinicas);
        } elseif ($clinicas instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            foreach ($clinicas as $clinica) {
                $this->clinicas->add($clinica);
            }
        } else {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Object must be an instance of Collection or ClinicasEntity.');
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get clinicas
     *
     * @return Collection
     */
    public function getClinicas(): Collection
    {
        return $this->clinicas;
    }

    /**
     * Has clinica
     *
     * @param int $id
     * @return bool
     */
    public function hasClinica(int $id)
    {
        return $this->clinicas->exists(function ($key, ClinicasEntity $clinica) use ($id) {
            return $clinica->getId() === $id;
        });
    }

    /**
     * Add clinicas
     *
     * @param ClinicasEntity|Collection $clinicas
     * @return ClientesEntity
     */
    public function removeClinicas($clinicas): ClientesEntity
    {
        if ($clinicas instanceof ClinicasEntity) {
            $this->clinicas->removeElement($clinicas);
            $clinicas->removeClientes($this);
        } elseif ($clinicas instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            foreach ($clinicas as $clinica) {
                $this->clinicas->removeElement($clinica);
                $clinica->removeClientes($this);
            }
        } else {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Object must be an instance of Collection or ClinicasEntity.');
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Clear clinicas
     *
     * @return $this
     */
    public function removeClinicasAll()
    {
        return $this->removeClinicas($this->getClinicas());
    }

    /**
     * Add clinicas
     *
     * @param int $clinica
     * @return ClientesEntity
     */
    public function removeClinicaById(int $clinica): ClientesEntity
    {
        $criteria = Criteria::create()->where(Criteria::expr()->eq('id', $clinica));
        $this->removeClinicas($this->clinicas->matching($criteria));

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Set clinica
     *
     * @param Collection $clinicas
     * @return ClientesEntity
     */
    public function setClinicas(Collection $clinicas): ClientesEntity
    {
        $this->clinicas = $clinicas;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return ClientesStatusEntity|null
     */
    public function getStatus(): ?ClientesStatusEntity
    {
        return $this->status;
    }

    /**
     * @param ClientesStatusEntity|null $status
     * @return ClientesEntity
     */
    public function setStatus(ClientesStatusEntity $status = null): ClientesEntity
    {
        $this->status = $status;
        return $this;
    }
}

<?php

namespace Cliente\V1\Rest\Clientes;

use Application\Entity\User;
use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\AbstractQuery;
use Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException;
use Doctrine\ORM\Query\Expr\Join;
use Zend\Filter\Digits;

/**
 * Class ClientesRepository
 *
 * @package Cliente\V1\Rest\Clientes
 */
class ClientesRepository extends EntityRepository
{
    public function fetchAll(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('clientes');

        $qb->select('partial clientes.{id, nome, email, dataNascimento, genero, cpf, convenios, nomeDependentes, origem, ativo, termosAceitos, dataHoraAceite}')
            ->addSelect('partial user.{id, username}')
            ->addSelect('endereco')
            ->addSelect('telefones')
            ->addSelect('partial clinicas.{id, razaoSocial, nomeFantasia, ativo}')
            ->addSelect('agendas')
            ->addSelect('servicos')
            ->addSelect('servico')
            ->addSelect('partial servicoGlobal.{id, titulo}')
            ->addSelect('partial profissional.{id, nome, email, nomeConselho, numeroRegistro, cpf, genero, horarios, ativo, foto}')

            ->innerJoin('clientes.user', 'user')
            ->leftJoin('clientes.endereco', 'endereco')
            ->innerJoin('clientes.telefones', 'telefones')
            ->leftJoin('clientes.clinicas', 'clinicas')
            ->leftJoin('clientes.agendas', 'agendas')
            ->leftJoin('agendas.servicos', 'servicos')
            ->leftJoin('servicos.servico', 'servico')
            ->leftJoin('servico.servico', 'servicoGlobal')
            ->leftJoin('agendas.profissional', 'profissional');

        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            if (isset($searchParam['query']['clinica'], $searchParam['query']['clientes.origem'])) {
                $qb->addSelect('status')
                    ->innerJoin('clientes.status', 'status')
                    ->andWhere($qb->expr()->orX(
                        $qb->expr()->eq('clinicas.id', ':clinica'),
                        $qb->expr()->andX(
                            $qb->expr()->isNull('clinicas.id'),
                            $qb->expr()->eq('clientes.origem', ':origem')
                        )
                    ))
                    ->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('status.clinica', ':clinica'))
                    ->setParameter(':clinica', $searchParam['query']['clinica'])
                    ->setParameter(':origem', $searchParam['query']['clientes.origem']);

                unset($searchParam['query']['clinica'], $searchParam['query']['clientes.origem']);
            }

            if (isset($searchParam['query']['clinica'])) {
                $qb->addSelect('status')
                    ->innerJoin('clientes.status', 'status')
                    ->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('clinicas.id', ':clinica'))
                    ->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('status.clinica', ':clinica'))
                    ->setParameter(':clinica', $searchParam['query']['clinica']);

                unset($searchParam['query']['clinica']);
            }

            if (isset($searchParam['query']['cpf_email'])) {
                $filter = new Digits();

                $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->orX(
                    $qb->expr()->eq('clientes.email', ':email'),
                    $qb->expr()->eq('clientes.cpf', ':cpf')
                ))
                    ->setParameter(':email', $searchParam['query']['cpf_email'])
                    ->setParameter(':cpf', $filter->filter($searchParam['query']['cpf_email']));

                unset($searchParam['query']['cpf_email']);
            }

            $this->mountRestrictions($qb, $searchParam['query']);
        }

        if (!is_null($orderBy)) {
            foreach ($orderBy as $key => $value) {
                $qb->addOrderBy($key, $value);
            }
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->setHydrationMode(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    public function fetch($id, $clinica = null, $origem = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('clientes');

        $qb->select('partial clientes.{id, nome, email, dataNascimento, genero, cpf, convenios, nomeDependentes, origem, ativo, termosAceitos, dataHoraAceite}')
            ->addSelect('partial user.{id, username}')
            ->addSelect('endereco')
            ->addSelect('partial telefones.{id, numero}')
            ->addSelect('partial clinicas.{id}')
            ->addSelect('partial agendas.{id, dataHora, status}')
            ->addSelect('partial clinica.{id, razaoSocial, nomeFantasia, logotipo}')
            ->addSelect('partial enderecoClinica.{id, logradouro, numero, bairro, cidade, uf}')
            ->addSelect('partial telefonesClinica.{id, numero}')
            ->addSelect('servicos')
            ->addSelect('servico')
            ->addSelect('partial servicoGlobal.{id, titulo}')
            ->addSelect('partial profissional.{id, nome, nomeConselho, numeroRegistro, foto}')

            ->innerJoin('clientes.user', 'user')
            ->leftJoin('clientes.endereco', 'endereco')
            ->innerJoin('clientes.telefones', 'telefones')
            ->leftJoin('clientes.clinicas', 'clinicas')
            ->leftJoin('clientes.agendas', 'agendas')
            ->leftJoin('agendas.clinica', 'clinica')
            ->leftJoin('clinica.endereco', 'enderecoClinica')
            ->leftJoin('clinica.telefones', 'telefonesClinica')
            ->leftJoin('agendas.servicos', 'servicos')
            ->leftJoin('servicos.servico', 'servico')
            ->leftJoin('servico.servico', 'servicoGlobal')
            ->leftJoin('agendas.profissional', 'profissional');

            $qb->addOrderBy('agendas.dataHora', 'DESC');

        $qb->where($qb->expr()->eq('clientes.id', ':id'))
            ->setParameter(':id', $id);

        if (null !== $clinica) {
            $qb->addSelect('status')
                ->innerJoin('clientes.status', 'status')
                ->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('clinicas.id', ':clinica'))
                ->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('status.clinica', ':clinica'))
                ->setParameter(':clinica', $clinica);
        }

        if (null !== $origem) {
            $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('clientes.origem', ':origem'))
                ->setParameter(':origem', $origem);
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->getOneOrNullResult(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    /**
     * @param int $id
     * @param User $usuario
     * @return mixed
     * @throws NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function getClienteUser(int $id, User $usuario): ?ClientesEntity
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('cliente');

        $qb->select('partial cliente.{id}')
            ->distinct(true)
            ->innerJoin('cliente.clinicas', 'clinicas')
            ->leftJoin('clinicas.usuarios', 'usuarios')
            ->leftJoin('usuarios.user', 'cUser')
            ->leftJoin('clinicas.profissionais', 'profissionais')
            ->leftJoin('profissionais.user', 'pUser')
            ->where($qb->expr()->eq('cliente.id', ':id'))
            ->andWhere(
                $qb->expr()->orX(
                    $qb->expr()->eq('cUser.id', ':user'),
                    $qb->expr()->eq('pUser.id', ':user')
                )
            )
            ->setParameter(':id', $id)
            ->setParameter(':user', $usuario->getId());

        return $qb->getQuery()->getOneOrNullResult();
    }

    /**
     * @param $params
     * @return mixed[]
     * @deprecated
     */
    public function historicoCliente($params)
    {
        $sql = 'SELECT v.id AS idVenda, a.data_hora,os.observacao, p.nome AS nome_profissional, os.preco, a.status, s.titulo AS servico_titulo
                    FROM orcamento o
                    INNER JOIN venda v
                    ON v.orcamento_id = o.id
                    INNER JOIN orcamento_has_servico ohs
                    ON ohs.orcamento_id = o.id
                    INNER JOIN orcamento_servico os
                    ON ohs.orcamento_servico_id = os.id
                    INNER JOIN venda_has_agenda vhs
                    ON vhs.venda_id = v.id
                    INNER JOIN agenda a
                    ON a.id = vhs.agenda_id
                    LEFT JOIN profissional p
                    ON p.id = os.profissional_id 
                    INNER JOIN clinica_has_servico cs
                    ON cs.id = os.servico_id
                    INNER JOIN servico s 
                    ON s.id = cs.servico_id
                WHERE o.cliente_id = :cliente_id              
                AND a.data_hora 
                BETWEEN CONVERT(:dataInicio , DATETIME) AND CONVERT(:dataFim, DATETIME)
                ORDER BY a.data_hora DESC';

        if (!isset($params['before']['dataHora'])) {
            $dataInicio = \DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', '2017-01-01');
            $dataInicio = $dataInicio->format('Y-m-d H:i:s');
        } else {
            $dataInicio = $params['before']['dataHora'];
        }
        if (!isset($params['after']['dataHora'])) {
            $dataFim = new \DateTime();
            $dataFim = $dataFim->format('Y-m-d 23:59:59');
        } else {
            $dataFim = $params['after']['dataHora'];
        }

        return $this->_em->getConnection()->fetchAll($sql, [
            'cliente_id' => $params['cliente.id'],
            'dataInicio' => $dataInicio,
            'dataFim' => $dataFim
        ]);
    }
}

<?php

namespace Cliente\V1\Rest\Clientes;

use Application\Entity\Role;
use Application\Entity\User;
use Application\Rest\AbstractUserResourceListener;
use DoctrineModule\Stdlib\Hydrator\DoctrineObject as Hydrator;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use Exception;
use InvalidArgumentException;

/**
 * Class ClientesResource
 *
 * @package Cliente\V1\Rest\Clientes
 */
class ClientesResource extends AbstractUserResourceListener
{
    /**
     * Default user role
     *
     * @var string
     */
    protected $defaultUserRole = Role::ROLE_CLIENTE;

    /**
     * Create
     *
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return array|ApiProblem
     */
    public function create($data)
    {
        try {
            $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
            $values = $this->getInputFilter()->getValues();
            if(!$values['endereco']['cep']) {
                $values['endereco'] = null;
            }
            /** @var ClientesEntity $cliente */
            $cliente = $hydrator->hydrate($values, new $this->entityClass());

            if (method_exists($cliente, 'getUser')){
                /** @var User $user */
                $user = $cliente->getUser();

                $this->createUserPassword($user);

                if($user->isCliente()) {
                    $user->setPrimeiroLogin(false);

                    $this->getObjectManager()->persist($user);
                }

                if(isset($data->termosAceitos) && $data->termosAceitos && $cliente->isTermosAceitos()) {
                    date_default_timezone_set('America/Sao_Paulo');
                    $now = new \DateTime();
                    $cliente->setDataHoraAceite($now);
                }
            }

            $this->getObjectManager()->persist($cliente);
            $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

            return $this->getRepository()->fetch($cliente->getId());
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Delete a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @return bool|ApiProblem
     */
    public function delete($id)
    {
        try {
            if ($this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                /** @var ClientesEntity $cliente */
                $cliente = $this->getRepository()->find($id);

                $cliente->setAtivo(false)
                    ->removeClinicasAll();

                $this->getObjectManager()->persist($cliente);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return true;
            }

            if ($this->getUser()->isCliente()) {
                /** @var ClientesEntity $cliente */
                $cliente = $this->getRepository()->find($this->getCliente($this->getUser())->getId());
                $cliente->setAtivo(false)
                    ->removeClinicasAll();

                $this->getObjectManager()->persist($cliente);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return true;
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Não foi possível excluir o Cliente.'));
        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->info($e);

            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
        try {
            if ($this->isGuest()) {
                return new ApiProblem(401, 'Acesso negado');
            }

            if ($this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                return parent::fetch($id);
            }

            if ($this->getUser()->isCliente()) {
                if ($object = $this->getRepository()->fetch($this->getCliente($this->getUser())->getId())) {
                    return $object;
                }
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Cliente não encontrado.'));
        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->info($e);

            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch all or a subset of resources
     *
     * @param \Zend\Stdlib\Parameters|array $params
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetchAll($params = [])
    {
        try {
            if ($this->isGuest()) {
                return new ApiProblem(401, 'Acesso negado');
            }

            if (!$params->offsetExists('query')) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', []);
            }

            if (!$this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                if ($this->getUser()->isCliente()) {
                    return $this->getRepository()->fetch($this->getCliente($this->getUser())->getId());
                }

                if ($this->getUser()->isClinica() && !isset($params->get('query')['cpf_email'])) {
                    $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge($params->get('query'), [
                        'clientes.origem' => ClientesEntity::CLIENTE_ORIGEM_WEB
                    ]));
                }
            }

            return parent::fetchAll($params);
        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Patch (partial in-place update) a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function patch($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            if ($this->isGuest()) {
                return new ApiProblem(401, 'Acesso negado');
            }

            $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
            $values = $this->getInputFilter()->getValues();
            if(!$values['endereco']['cep']) {
                $values['endereco'] = null;
            }
            /** @var ClientesEntity $cliente */
            $cliente = $hydrator->hydrate($values, new $this->entityClass());

            if(isset($data->termosAceitos) && $data->termosAceitos && $cliente->isTermosAceitos()) {
                date_default_timezone_set('America/Sao_Paulo');
                $now = new \DateTime();
                $cliente->setDataHoraAceite($now);
            }

            if ($this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                return parent::patch($id, $data);
            }

            if ($this->getUser()->isCliente()) {
                return parent::patch($this->getCliente($this->getUser())->getId(), $data);
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Cliente não encontrado.'));
        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function update($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            if ($this->isGuest()) {
                return new ApiProblem(401, 'Acesso negado');
            }

            $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
            $values = $this->getInputFilter()->getValues();
            if(!$values['endereco']['cep']) {
                $values['endereco'] = null;
            }
            /** @var ClientesEntity $cliente */
            $cliente = $hydrator->hydrate($values, new $this->entityClass());

            if(isset($data->termosAceitos) && $data->termosAceitos && $cliente->isTermosAceitos()) {
                date_default_timezone_set('America/Sao_Paulo');
                $now = new \DateTime();
                $cliente->setDataHoraAceite($now);
            }

            if ($this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                return parent::update($id, $data);
            }

            if ($this->getUser()->isCliente()) {
                return parent::update($this->getCliente($this->getUser())->getId(), $data);
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Cliente não encontrado.'));
        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get user
     *
     * @return User
     */
    private function getUser()
    {
        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getAuthenticationIdentity()) {
            return $identity['user'];
        }

        throw new InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Usuário não encontrado'));
    }

    /**
     * Get cliente
     *
     * @param User $user
     * @return ClientesEntity
     */
    private function getCliente(User $user)
    {
        /** @var ClientesEntity $cliente */
        if ($cliente = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['user' => $user])) {
            return $cliente;
        }

        throw new InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Cliente não encontrado'));
    }

    /**
     * Is Guest
     *
     * @return bool
     */
    private function isGuest()
    {
        return $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getName() === 'guest';
    }

    private function createUserPassword(User $user)
    {
        if (
            $this->getInputFilter()->get('user')->has('password') &&
            null !== $this->getInputFilter()->get('user')->get('password')->getValue() &&
            '' !== $this->getInputFilter()->get('user')->get('password')->getValue()
        ) {
            // Criptogra senha do usuário
            $user->setPassword(
                $this->oAuth2ClientService->createPasswordHash(
                    $this->getInputFilter()->get('user')->getValue('password')
                )
            );
        }

        // Cria um cliente na tabela OAuth2
        $this->oAuth2ClientService->create($user);

        // Added user role
        if ($user->getRoles()->isEmpty()) {
            $user->addRoles($this->getUserRole());
        }

        $this->getObjectManager()->persist($user);
    }
}

<?php
namespace Cliente\V1\Rest\Clientes;

use Interop\Container\ContainerInterface;

/**
 * Class ClientesResourceFactory
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\Clientes
 */
class ClientesResourceFactory
{
    /**
     * @param ContainerInterface $services
     * @return ClientesResource
     * @throws \Psr\Container\ContainerExceptionInterface
     * @throws \Psr\Container\NotFoundExceptionInterface
     */
    public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $services)
    {
        /** @var \Zend\Log\Logger $logger */
        $logger = $services->get('log');

        /** @var \Zend\I18n\Translator\Translator $translator */
        $translator = $services->get('translator');

        /** @var \Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager $objectManager */
        $objectManager = $services->get(\Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager::class);

        /** @var \Application\Service\OAuth2ClientService $oAuth2ClientService */
        $oAuth2ClientService = $services->get(\Application\Service\OAuth2ClientService::class);

        $resource = new ClientesResource();
        $resource->setLogger($logger);
        $resource->setTranslator($translator);
        $resource->setObjectManager($objectManager);
        $resource->setOAuth2ClientService($oAuth2ClientService);

        return $resource;
    }
}

<?php

namespace Cliente\V1\Rest\FichasAnamnese;

use Cliente\V1\Rest\Clientes\ClientesEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use ZF\OAuth2\Doctrine\Entity\UserInterface;
use DateInterval;
use DateTime;
use Exception;
use RuntimeException;

/**
 * Class FichasAnamneseEntity
 *
 * @package Cliente\V1\Rest\FichasAnamnese
 */
class FichasAnamneseEntity
{
    /**
     * @var integer
     */
    protected $id;

    /**
     * @var array
     */
    protected $arquivo;

    /**
     * @var DateTime
     */
    protected $data;

    /**
     * @var DateTime
     */
    protected $validade;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $observacao;

    /**
     * @var ClientesEntity
     */
    protected $cliente;

    /**
     * @var ClinicasEntity
     */
    protected $clinica;

    /**
     * @var UserInterface
     */
    protected $user;

    /**
     * FichasAnamneseEntity constructor.
     */
    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->data = new DateTime();
    }

    /**
     * @return int
     */
    public function getId(): int
    {
        return $this->id;
    }

    /**
     * Get arquivo
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function getArquivo(): ?array
    {
        return $this->arquivo;
    }

    /**
     * Set arquivo
     *
     * @param array $arquivo
     * @return FichasAnamneseEntity
     */
    public function setArquivo(array $arquivo = null): FichasAnamneseEntity
    {
        $this->arquivo = $arquivo;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return DateTime
     */
    public function getData(): DateTime
    {
        return $this->data;
    }

    /**
     * @param DateTime $data
     * @return FichasAnamneseEntity
     */
    public function setData(DateTime $data): FichasAnamneseEntity
    {
        $this->data = $data;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return DateTime
     */
    public function getValidade(): DateTime
    {
        return $this->validade;
    }

    /**
     * @param DateTime $validade
     * @return FichasAnamneseEntity
     */
    public function setValidade(DateTime $validade): FichasAnamneseEntity
    {
        $this->validade = $validade;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return string
     */
    public function getObservacao(): ?string
    {
        return $this->observacao;
    }

    /**
     * @param string $observacao
     * @return FichasAnamneseEntity
     */
    public function setObservacao(string $observacao = null): FichasAnamneseEntity
    {
        $this->observacao = $observacao;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return ClientesEntity
     */
    public function getCliente(): ClientesEntity
    {
        return $this->cliente;
    }

    /**
     * @param ClientesEntity $cliente
     * @return FichasAnamneseEntity
     */
    public function setCliente(ClientesEntity $cliente): FichasAnamneseEntity
    {
        $this->cliente = $cliente;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return ClinicasEntity
     */
    public function getClinica(): ClinicasEntity
    {
        return $this->clinica;
    }

    /**
     * @param ClinicasEntity $clinica
     * @return FichasAnamneseEntity
     * @throws Exception
     */
    public function setClinica(ClinicasEntity $clinica): FichasAnamneseEntity
    {
        $this->clinica = $clinica;

        try {
            $validade = clone $this->getData();
            $now = date("Y-m-d 23:59:59"); // <-- pega data e hora atual
            $validade = date('Y-m-d 23:59:59', strtotime($now. ' + ' .$clinica->getValidadeFichaAnamnese().' days')); // <-- converte validade da ficha de anamnese da clinica e soma no date atual, com horario padrao 23:59
            $validade = new \DateTime($validade); //<-- Converte o retorno para o tipo DateTime
            $this->setValidade($validade);
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            throw new RuntimeException('Falha ao definir a validade da Ficha Anamnese');
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return UserInterface
     */
    public function getUser(): UserInterface
    {
        return $this->user;
    }

    /**
     * @param UserInterface $user
     * @return FichasAnamneseEntity
     */
    public function setUser(UserInterface $user): FichasAnamneseEntity
    {
        $this->user = $user;
        return $this;
    }
}

<?php
namespace Cliente\V1\Rest\FichasAnamnese;

use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\AbstractQuery;

/**
 * Class FichasAnamneseRepository
 *
 * @package Cliente\V1\Rest\FichasAnamnese
 */
class FichasAnamneseRepository extends EntityRepository
{

    /**
     * Fetch all
     *
     * @param array|null $searchParam
     * @param array|null $orderBy
     * @return AbstractQuery
     */
    public function fetchAll(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('ficha');

        $qb->addSelect('partial cliente.{id, nome, ativo}')
           ->addSelect('partial clinica.{id, razaoSocial, nomeFantasia}')
           ->addSelect('partial user.{id, username}');

        $qb->innerJoin('ficha.cliente', 'cliente')
           ->innerJoin('ficha.clinica', 'clinica')
           ->innerJoin('ficha.user', 'user');

        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            $this->mountRestrictions($qb, $searchParam['query']);
        }

        if (! is_null($orderBy)) {
            foreach ($orderBy as $key => $value) {
                $qb->addOrderBy($key, $value);
            }
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
                  ->setHydrationMode(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    /**
     * Fetch
     *
     * @param int $id
     * @param int|object|null $cliente
     * @return array
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetch($id, $cliente = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('ficha');

        $qb->addSelect('partial cliente.{id, nome, ativo}')
            ->addSelect('partial clinica.{id, razaoSocial, nomeFantasia}')
            ->addSelect('partial user.{id, username}');

        $qb->innerJoin('ficha.cliente', 'cliente')
            ->innerJoin('ficha.clinica', 'clinica')
            ->innerJoin('ficha.user', 'user');

        $qb->where($qb->expr()->eq('ficha.id', ':id'))
           ->setParameter(':id', $id);

        if (null !== $cliente) {
            $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('cliente.id', ':cliente'))
               ->setParameter(':cliente', $cliente);
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
                  ->getOneOrNullResult(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }
}

<?php

namespace Cliente\V1\Rest\FichasAnamnese;

use Application\Entity\User;
use Application\Rest\AbstractResourceListener;
use Cliente\V1\Rest\Clientes\ClientesEntity;
use Cliente\V1\Rest\Clientes\ClientesRepository;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException;
use DoctrineModule\Stdlib\Hydrator\DoctrineObject as Hydrator;
use Aws\S3\S3Client;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;
use Zend\Stdlib\Parameters;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use Exception;
use InvalidArgumentException;

/**
 * Class FichasAnamneseResource
 *
 * @package Cliente\V1\Rest\FichasAnamnese
 */
class FichasAnamneseResource extends AbstractResourceListener
{

    /**
     * @var S3Client
     */
    private $s3Client;

    /**
     * Create
     *
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return array|ApiProblem
     */
    public function create($data)
    {
        try {
            $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
            /** @var FichasAnamneseEntity $ficha */
            $ficha = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), new $this->entityClass());
            if(isset($data->validade)) {
                $validade = date($data->validade); // <-- converte validade da ficha de anamnese personalizada passada na criação
                $ficha->setValidade(new \DateTime($validade)); //<-- Converte o retorno para o tipo DateTime
            }
            $ficha->setCliente($this->getCliente())
                ->setUser($this->getUser());

            $this->getObjectManager()->persist($ficha);
            $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

            $this->s3Client->putObjectAcl([
                'ACL' => 'public-read',
                'Bucket' => $_ENV['AWS_S3_ASSETS_BUCKET'],
                'Key' => str_replace(
                    's3://' . $_ENV['AWS_S3_ASSETS_BUCKET'] . '/',
                    '',
                    $ficha->getArquivo()['tmp_name']
                )
            ]);

            return $this->getRepository()->fetch($ficha->getId());
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Delete a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @return bool|ApiProblem
     */
    public function delete($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var FichasAnamneseEntity $ficha */
            if ($ficha = $this->getRepository()->find($id)) {

                // Verifica se o usuário possui autorização para excluir a ficha
                if (
                    (
                        $this->getUser()->isCliente() &&
                        $ficha->getCliente()->getUser()->getId() !== $this->getUser()->getId()
                    ) ||
                    (
                        $this->getUser()->isClinica() &&
                        null === $this->getClinica($ficha->getClinica()->getId())
                    )
                ) {
                    return new ApiProblem(
                        401, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Acesso negado.')
                    );
                }

                $this->s3Client->deleteObject([
                    'Bucket' => $_ENV['AWS_S3_ASSETS_BUCKET'],
                    'Key' => str_replace(
                        's3://' . $_ENV['AWS_S3_ASSETS_BUCKET'] . '/',
                        '',
                        $ficha->getArquivo()['tmp_name']
                    ),
                    'Quiet' => true,
                ]);

                $this->getObjectManager()->remove($ficha);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return true;
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Ficha Anamnese não encontrada.'));
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var FichasAnamneseRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getRepository();

            if ($this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                return $repository->fetch($id);
            }

            if ($ficha = $repository->fetch($id, $this->getCliente())) {
                return $ficha;
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Ficha Anamnese não encontrada.'));
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch all or a subset of resources
     *
     * @param Parameters|array $params
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     * @throws NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetchAll($params = [])
    {
        try {
            if (!$params->offsetExists('query')) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', []);
            }

            $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge($params->get('query'), [
                'cliente' => $this->getCliente()->getId(),
            ]));

            if ($clinica = $this->getClinica($this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica'))) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge($params->get('query'), [
                    'clinica' => $clinica->getId()
                ]));
            }

            if (null === $clinica && $this->getUser()->isClinica()) {
                /** @var ClinicasRepository $repository */
                $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClinicasEntity::class);

                $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge($params->get('query'), [
                    'clinica' => [
                        'expr' => 'in',
                        'value' => $repository->getUserClinicas($this->getUser())
                    ]
                ]));
            }

            return parent::fetchAll($params);
        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Patch (partial in-place update) a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function patch($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            if(isset($data->validade)) {
                $validade = date($data->validade); // <-- converte validade da ficha de anamnese personalizada passada na atualização
                $ficha->setValidade(new \DateTime($validade)); //<-- Converte o retorno para o tipo DateTime
            }
            if (!$this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                return $this->__update($id);
            }

            return parent::patch($id, $data);
        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->info($e);

            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function update($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            if(isset($data->validade)) {
                $validade = date($data->validade); // <-- converte validade da ficha de anamnese personalizada passada na atualização
                $ficha->setValidade(new \DateTime($validade)); //<-- Converte o retorno para o tipo DateTime
            }
            if (!$this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                return $this->__update($id);
            }

            return parent::update($id, $data);
        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->info($e);

            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get clinica
     *
     * @param integer $id
     * @return ClinicasEntity|object|null
     * @throws NonUniqueResultException
     */
    private function getClinica($id)
    {
        /** @var ClinicasRepository $repository */
        $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClinicasEntity::class);

        if ($this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
            return $repository->find((integer)$id);
        }

        /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
        if ($clinica = $repository->getClinicaUser((integer)$id, $this->getUser())) {
            return $clinica;
        }

        return null;
    }

    /**
     * Get cliente
     *
     * @return ClientesEntity|object
     * @throws NonUniqueResultException
     */
    private function getCliente()
    {
        if ($id = (integer)$this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('cliente')) {
            /** @var ClientesRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClientesEntity::class);

            if ($this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                return $repository->find($id);
            }

            if (
                $this->getUser()->isCliente() &&
                $cliente = $repository->findOneBy(['id' => $id, 'user' => $this->getUser()->getId()])
            ) {
                return $cliente;
            }

            /** @var ClientesEntity $cliente */
            if ($this->getUser()->isClinica() && $cliente = $repository->getClienteUser($id, $this->getUser())) {
                return $cliente;
            }
        }

        throw new InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Cliente não encontrado'));
    }

    /**
     * Get user
     *
     * @return User
     */
    private function getUser()
    {
        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getAuthenticationIdentity()) {
            return $identity['user'];
        }

        throw new InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Usuário não encontrado'));
    }

    /**
     * Set S3 Client
     *
     * @param S3Client $s3Client
     */
    public function setS3Client(S3Client $s3Client)
    {
        $this->s3Client = $s3Client;
    }

    /**
     * Update
     *
     * @param $id
     * @return FichasAnamneseEntity|object|ApiProblem|null
     * @throws Exception
     */
    private function __update($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var FichasAnamneseEntity $object */
            if ($object = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy([
                'id' => $id,
                'cliente' => $this->getCliente(),
            ])) {
                $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
                $object = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), $object);

                $this->getObjectManager()->persist($object);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return $object;
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Ficha Anamnese não encontrada.'));
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            throw $e;
        }
    }
}

<?php

namespace Cliente\V1\Rest\FichasAnamnese;

use Interop\Container\ContainerInterface;

/**
 * Class FichasAnamneseResourceFactory
 *
 * @package Cliente\V1\Rest\FichasAnamnese
 */
class FichasAnamneseResourceFactory
{
    /**
     * @param ContainerInterface $services
     * @return FichasAnamneseResource
     * @throws \Psr\Container\ContainerExceptionInterface
     * @throws \Psr\Container\NotFoundExceptionInterface
     */
    public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $services)
    {
        /** @var \Zend\Log\Logger $logger */
        $logger = $services->get('log');

        /** @var \Zend\I18n\Translator\Translator $translator */
        $translator = $services->get('translator');

        /** @var \Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager $objectManager */
        $objectManager = $services->get(\Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager::class);

        /** @var \Aws\Sdk $awsSdk */
        $awsSdk = $services->get(\Aws\Sdk::class);

        $resource = new FichasAnamneseResource();
        $resource->setLogger($logger);
        $resource->setTranslator($translator);
        $resource->setObjectManager($objectManager);
        $resource->setS3Client($awsSdk->createS3());

        return $resource;
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica;

use ZF\Apigility\Provider\ApigilityProviderInterface;

class Module implements ApigilityProviderInterface
{
    public function getConfig()
    {
        return include __DIR__ . '/config/module.config.php';
    }

    public function getAutoloaderConfig()
    {
        return [
            'ZF\Apigility\Autoloader' => [
                'namespaces' => [
                    __NAMESPACE__ => __DIR__ . '/src',
                ],
            ],
        ];
    }
}
