<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Agendas;

use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Profissionais\ProfissionaisEntity;
use Cliente\V1\Rest\Clientes\ClientesEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Vendas\VendasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\AgendaServicos\AgendaServicosEntity;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\ArrayCollection;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\Collection;

class AgendasEntity
{

    const STATUS_AGUARDANDO     = 'Aguardando confirmação';
    const STATUS_CONFIRMADO     = 'Confirmado';
    const STATUS_ATENDIMENTO    = 'Em atendimento';
    const STATUS_ENCAIXE        = 'Encaixe';
    const STATUS_FINALIZADO     = 'Finalizado';
    const STATUS_CANCELADO      = 'Cancelado';

    /**
     * @var int
     */
    protected $id;

    /**
     * @var \DateTime
     */
    protected $dataHora;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $status;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $motivoCancelamento;

    /**
     * @var ClinicasEntity
     */
    protected $clinica;

    /**
     * @var ProfissionaisEntity
     */
    protected $profissional;

    /**
     * @var ClientesEntity
     */
    protected $cliente;

    /**
     * @var VendasEntity
     */
    protected $venda;

    /**
     * @var AgendaServicosEntity
     */
    protected $servicos;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $observacao;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $googleAgendaId;

    /**
     * AgendasEntity constuctor.
     */
    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->venda = new ArrayCollection();
        $this->servicos = new ArrayCollection();
    }

    /**
     * @return int|null
     */
    public function getId(): ?int
    {
        return $this->id;
    }

    /**
     * @return \DateTime
     */
    public function getDataHora(): \DateTime
    {
        return $this->dataHora;
    }

    /**
     * @param \DateTime $dataHora
     * @return AgendasEntity
     */
    public function setDataHora(\DateTime $dataHora): AgendasEntity
    {
        $this->dataHora = $dataHora;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get status
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getStatus(): string
    {
        return $this->status;
    }

    /**
     * Set status
     *
     * @param string $status
     * @return AgendasEntity
     */
    public function setStatus(string $status): AgendasEntity
    {

        if (!in_array($status, array(self::STATUS_AGUARDANDO, self::STATUS_CONFIRMADO, self::STATUS_ATENDIMENTO, self::STATUS_ENCAIXE, self::STATUS_FINALIZADO, self::STATUS_CANCELADO))) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException("Status inválido!");
        }
        $this->status = $status;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get motivoCancelamento
     *
     */
    public function getMotivoCancelamento()
    {
        return $this->motivoCancelamento;
    }


    /**
     * Set motivoCancelamento
     *
     * @param string $motivoCancelamento
     * @return AgendasEntity
     */
    public function setMotivoCancelamento(string $motivoCancelamento = null): AgendasEntity
    {
        $this->motivoCancelamento = $motivoCancelamento;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return ClinicasEntity
     */
    public function getClinica()
    {
        return $this->clinica;
    }

    /**
     * @param ClinicasEntity $clinica
     * @return AgendasEntity
     */
    public function setClinica(ClinicasEntity $clinica = null): AgendasEntity
    {
        $this->clinica = $clinica;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return ProfissionaisEntity
     */
    public function getProfissional()
    {
        return $this->profissional;
    }

    /**
     * @param ProfissionaisEntity $profissional
     * @return AgendasEntity
     */
    public function setProfissional(ProfissionaisEntity $profissional = null): AgendasEntity
    {
        $this->profissional = $profissional;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return ClientesEntity
     */
    public function getCliente()
    {
        return $this->cliente;
    }

    /**
     * @param ClientesEntity $cliente
     * @return AgendasEntity
     */
    public function setCliente(ClientesEntity $cliente): AgendasEntity
    {
        $this->cliente = $cliente;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Add venda
     *
     * @param $venda
     * @return AgendasEntity
     */
    public function addVenda($venda): AgendasEntity
    {
        if ($venda instanceof VendasEntity) {
            $this->venda->add($venda);
        } elseif ($venda instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var VendasEntity $vend */
            foreach ($venda as $vend) {
                $this->venda->add($vend);
            }
        } else {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Object must be an instance of Collection or VendasEntity.');
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return VendasEntity
     */
    public function getVenda()
    {
        return $this->venda;
    }

    /**
     * Remove venda
     *
     * @param $venda
     * @return AgendasEntity
     */
    public function removeVenda($venda): AgendasEntity
    {
        if ($venda instanceof VendasEntity) {
            $this->venda->removeElement($venda);
        } elseif ($venda instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var VendasEntity $vend */
            foreach ($venda as $vend) {
                $this->venda->removeElement($vend);
            }
        } else {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Object must be an instance of Collection or VendasEntity.');
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Set venda
     *
     * @param $venda
     * @return AgendasEntity
     */
    public function setVenda(VendasEntity $venda): AgendasEntity
    {
        $this->venda = $venda;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Add Agenda servicos
     *
     * @param $servicos
     * @return AgendasEntity
     */
    public function addServicos($servicos): AgendasEntity
    {
        
        if ($servicos instanceof AgendaServicosEntity) {
            $this->servicos->add($servicos);
        } elseif ($servicos instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var AgendaServicosEntity $servico */
            foreach ($servicos as $servico) {
                $this->servicos->add($servico);
            }
        } else {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Object must be an instance of Collection or AgendaServicosEntity.');
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get Agenda servicos
     *
     * @return Collection
     */
    public function getServicos(): Collection
    {
        return $this->servicos;
    }

    /**
     * Remove Agenda servicos
     *
     * @param $servicos
     * @return AgendasEntity
     */
    public function removeServicos($servicos): AgendasEntity
    {
        if ($servicos instanceof AgendaServicosEntity) {
            $this->servicos->removeElement($servicos);
        } elseif ($servicos instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var AgendaServicosEntity $servico */
            foreach ($servicos as $servico) {
                $this->servicos->removeElement($servico);
            }
        } else {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Object must be an instance of Collection or AgendaServicosEntity.');
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Set Agenda servicos
     *
     * @param Collection $servicos
     * @return AgendasEntity
     */
    public function setServicos(Collection $servicos): AgendasEntity
    {
        $this->servicos = $servicos;
        return $this;
    }

    public function getObservacao()
    {
        return $this->observacao;
    }

    /**
     * @param string $observacao
     * @return AgendasEntity
     */
    public function setObservacao(string $observacao = null): AgendasEntity
    {
        $this->observacao = $observacao;
        return $this;
    }

    public function getGoogleAgendaId()
    {
        return $this->googleAgendaId;
    }

    /**
     * @param string $googleAgendaId
     * @return AgendasEntity
     */
    public function setGoogleAgendaId(string $googleAgendaId = null): AgendasEntity
    {
        $this->googleAgendaId = $googleAgendaId;
        return $this;
    }
}

<?php

namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Agendas;

use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use DateInterval;
use DateTime;
use Doctrine\ORM\AbstractQuery;

/**
 * Class AgendasRepository
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\Servicos
 */
class AgendasRepository extends EntityRepository
{
    /**
     * Fetch All
     *
     * @param array|null $searchParam
     * @param array|null $orderBy
     * @param bool $isGuest
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|object
     */
    public function fetchAll(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null, $isGuest = false)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('agendas');

        // Verifica se existe o parametro clinica
        if(isset($searchParam['query']) && isset($searchParam['query']['agendas.clinica'])) {
            // Verifica se é a clinica
            $qb->andWhere(
                $qb->expr()->eq('clinica.id', $searchParam['query']['agendas.clinica'])
            );

            // Remove o parametro clinica do Array para não compara-lo novamente no mountRestrictions()
            unset($searchParam['query']['agendas.clinica']);
        }

        $qb->addSelect('partial profissional.{id, nome, nomeConselho, numeroRegistro, email, horarios, foto}')
            ->addSelect('partial profissionalIntervalos.{id, tipo, diaSemanaTipoFixo, dataHoraInicio, dataHoraFim}')
            ->addSelect('partial servicos.{id}')

            ->leftJoin('agendas.clinica', 'clinica')
            ->leftJoin('agendas.profissional', 'profissional')
            ->leftJoin('profissional.profissionalIntervalos', 'profissionalIntervalos')
            ->leftJoin('agendas.servicos', 'servicos');

        if (! $isGuest) {
            //Traz na consulta os dados das tabelas relacionadas
            $qb->addSelect('partial clinica.{id, razaoSocial, nomeFantasia}')
                ->addSelect('partial endereco.{id, logradouro, numero, bairro, cidade, uf}')
                ->addSelect('partial telefones.{id, numero}')
                ->addSelect('partial cliente.{id, nome, email, dataNascimento, genero, cpf, convenios, nomeDependentes, origem, ativo}')
                ->addSelect('orcamentoServicoAgenda')
                ->addSelect('servico')
                ->addSelect('partial servicoGlobal.{id, titulo}')
                ->addSelect('partial user.{id}')
                ->addSelect('venda')
                ->addSelect('orcamento')
                ->addSelect('tabelaPreco')
                ->addSelect('orcamentosServicos')
                ->addSelect('servicoOrc')
                ->addSelect('servicoOrcamento')

                ->leftJoin('clinica.endereco', 'endereco')
                ->leftJoin('clinica.telefones', 'telefones')
                ->leftJoin('agendas.cliente', 'cliente')
                ->leftJoin('servicos.orcamentoServico', 'orcamentoServicoAgenda')
                ->leftJoin('servicos.servico', 'servico')
                ->leftJoin('servico.servico', 'servicoGlobal')
                ->leftJoin('profissional.user', 'user')
                ->leftJoin('agendas.venda', 'venda')
                ->leftJoin('venda.orcamento', 'orcamento')
                ->leftJoin('orcamento.tabelaPreco', 'tabelaPreco')
                ->leftJoin('orcamento.orcamentosServicos', 'orcamentosServicos')
                ->leftJoin('orcamentosServicos.servico', 'servicoOrc')
                ->leftJoin('servicoOrc.servico', 'servicoOrcamento');
        }

        if ($isGuest) {
            $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('profissional.ativo', ':ativo'))
                ->setParameter(':ativo', true);
        }

        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            $this->mountRestrictions($qb, $searchParam['query']);
        }

        if (! is_null($orderBy)) {
            foreach ($orderBy as $key => $value) {
                $qb->addOrderBy($key, $value);
            }
        } else {
            // Ordena por id DESC se não passar o parametro de ordenação
            $qb->addOrderBy('agendas.id', 'DESC');
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->setHydrationMode(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    /**
     * Fetch
     *
     * @param int $id
     * @param null $clinica
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|mixed|object
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetch($id, $clinica = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('agendas');

        $qb ->addSelect('partial clinica.{id, razaoSocial, nomeFantasia, logotipo}')
            ->addSelect('partial endereco.{id, logradouro, numero, bairro, cidade, uf}')
            ->addSelect('partial telefones.{id, numero}')
            ->addSelect('partial cliente.{id, nome, email, dataNascimento, genero, cpf, convenios, nomeDependentes, origem, ativo}')
            ->addSelect('servicos')
            ->addSelect('orcamentoServicoAgenda')
            ->addSelect('servico')
            ->addSelect('partial servicoGlobal.{id, titulo}')
            ->addSelect('partial profissional.{id, nome, nomeConselho, numeroRegistro, email, horarios, foto}')
            ->addSelect('partial user.{id}')
            ->addSelect('partial profissionalIntervalos.{id, diaSemanaTipoFixo, dataHoraInicio, dataHoraFim}')
            ->addSelect('venda')
            ->addSelect('orcamento')
            ->addSelect('tabelaPreco')
            ->addSelect('orcamentosServicos')
            ->addSelect('servicoOrc')
            ->addSelect('servicoOrcamento')

            ->leftJoin('agendas.clinica', 'clinica')
            ->leftJoin('clinica.endereco', 'endereco')
            ->leftJoin('clinica.telefones', 'telefones')
            ->leftJoin('agendas.cliente', 'cliente')
            ->leftJoin('agendas.servicos', 'servicos')
            ->leftJoin('servicos.orcamentoServico', 'orcamentoServicoAgenda')
            ->leftJoin('servicos.servico', 'servico')
            ->leftJoin('servico.servico', 'servicoGlobal')
            ->leftJoin('agendas.profissional', 'profissional')
            ->leftJoin('profissional.user', 'user')
            ->leftJoin('profissional.profissionalIntervalos', 'profissionalIntervalos')
            ->leftJoin('agendas.venda', 'venda')
            ->leftJoin('venda.orcamento', 'orcamento')
            ->leftJoin('orcamento.tabelaPreco', 'tabelaPreco')
            ->leftJoin('orcamento.orcamentosServicos', 'orcamentosServicos')
            ->leftJoin('orcamentosServicos.servico', 'servicoOrc')
            ->leftJoin('servicoOrc.servico', 'servicoOrcamento')
        ;

        $qb->where($qb->expr()->eq('agendas.id', ':id'))
            ->setParameter(':id', $id);

        if (null !== $clinica) {
            $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->orX(
                $qb->expr()->eq('clinica.id', ':clinica'),
                $qb->expr()->eq('agendas.clinica', ':clinica')
            ))->setParameter(':clinica', $clinica);
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->getOneOrNullResult(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    /**
     * @return array
     * @throws \Exception
     */
    public function getAgendamentosProximas24hs()
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('agendas');

        $now = new DateTime();
        $now->add(new DateInterval('P1D'));

        $qb->where($qb->expr()->in('agendas.status', ':status'))
           ->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('DATE(agendas.dataHora)', ':amanha'))
           ->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('HOUR(agendas.dataHora)', ':agora'))
           ->setParameter(':status', [
               AgendasEntity::STATUS_CONFIRMADO,
               AgendasEntity::STATUS_AGUARDANDO,
               AgendasEntity::STATUS_ENCAIXE,
           ])
           ->setParameter(':amanha', $now->format('Y-m-d'))
           ->setParameter(':agora', $now->format('H'));

        return $qb->getQuery()->getResult();
    }

    public function getAgendamentosProfissionalDoDia($clinica_id, $profissional_id, $datas, $agenda_id = null)
    {
        if($agenda_id == null) {
            $sql = 'SELECT cs.*, ag.data_hora
                    FROM agenda ag
                    LEFT JOIN agenda_has_servico ase ON ase.agenda_id = ag.id
                    LEFT JOIN clinica_has_servico cs ON ase.servico_id = cs.id AND ag.clinica_id = cs.clinica_id
                    WHERE ag.clinica_id = :clinica_id
                          AND ag.profissional_id = :profissional_id
                          AND ag.data_hora BETWEEN CONVERT("' . $datas["inicial"] . '", DATETIME) AND CONVERT("' . $datas["final"] . '", DATETIME) 
                          AND ag.status != "Cancelado"
                      ';
        } else {
            $sql = 'SELECT cs.*, ag.data_hora
                    FROM agenda ag
                    LEFT JOIN agenda_has_servico ase ON ase.agenda_id = ag.id
                    LEFT JOIN clinica_has_servico cs ON ase.servico_id = cs.id AND ag.clinica_id = cs.clinica_id
                    WHERE ag.clinica_id = :clinica_id
                          AND ag.profissional_id = :profissional_id
                          AND ag.data_hora BETWEEN CONVERT("' . $datas["inicial"] . '", DATETIME) AND CONVERT("' . $datas["final"] . '", DATETIME) 
                          AND ag.id != :agenda_id 
                          AND ag.status != "Cancelado"
                      ';
        }
        return $this->_em->getConnection()->fetchAll($sql, [
                'clinica_id' => $clinica_id,
                'profissional_id' => $profissional_id,
                'agenda_id' => $agenda_id
            ]
        );
    }

        /**
     * Fetch All
     *
     * @param array|null $searchParam
     * @param array|null $orderBy
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|object
     */
    public function relatorioAgenda(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('agendas');

        $qb->select('partial agendas.{id, dataHora, status}');

        //Traz na consulta os dados das tabelas relacionadas
         $qb->addSelect('partial cliente.{id,nome}')
            ->addSelect('partial servicos.{id}')
            ->addSelect('servico')
            ->addSelect('partial servicoGlobal.{id, titulo}')
            ->addSelect('partial profissional.{id, nome}')
            ->addSelect('partial venda.{id}')
            ->addSelect('partial orcamento.{id}')
            ->addSelect('partial orcamentosServicos.{id, observacao}')

            ->leftJoin('agendas.clinica', 'clinica')
            ->leftJoin('agendas.cliente', 'cliente')
            ->leftJoin('agendas.servicos', 'servicos')
            ->leftJoin('servicos.servico', 'servico')
            ->leftJoin('servico.servico', 'servicoGlobal')
            ->leftJoin('agendas.profissional', 'profissional')
            ->leftJoin('agendas.venda', 'venda')
            ->leftJoin('venda.orcamento', 'orcamento')
            ->leftJoin('orcamento.orcamentosServicos', 'orcamentosServicos')
            ->leftJoin('orcamentosServicos.servico', 'servicoOrc')
            ->leftJoin('servicoOrc.servico', 'servicoOrcamento')
        ;
        // Verifica se existe o parametro clinica
        if(isset($searchParam['query']) && isset($searchParam['query']['agendas.clinica'])) {
            // Verifica se é a clinica
            $qb->andWhere(
                $qb->expr()->eq('clinica.id', $searchParam['query']['agendas.clinica'])
            );

            // Remove o parametro clinica do Array para não compara-lo novamente no mountRestrictions()
            unset($searchParam['query']['agendas.clinica']);
        }
        unset($searchParam['query']['relatorio']);

        //Filtro por data
        if (isset($searchParam['query']['before']['dataHora']) && isset($searchParam['query']['after']['dataHora'])) {
            $qb->andWhere(
                $qb->expr()->gte('agendas.dataHora', ':before'),
                $qb->expr()->lte('agendas.dataHora', ':after')
            )->setParameter(':before', $searchParam['query']['before']['dataHora'])
             ->setParameter(':after', $searchParam['query']['after']['dataHora']);
            
            unset($searchParam['query']['before']['dataHora']);
            unset($searchParam['query']['after']['dataHora']);
        }

        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            $this->mountRestrictions($qb, $searchParam['query']);
        }

        if (! is_null($orderBy)) {
            foreach ($orderBy as $key => $value) {
                $qb->addOrderBy($key, $value);
            }
        } else {
            // Ordena por id DESC se não passar o parametro de ordenação
            $qb->addOrderBy('agendas.id', 'DESC');
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->setHydrationMode(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }
}

<?php

namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Agendas;

use Application\Entity\User;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clientes\ClientesStatusEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Vendas\VendasEntity;
use Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use Application\Rest\AbstractResourceListener;
use DoctrineModule\Stdlib\Hydrator\DoctrineObject as Hydrator;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\AgendaServicos\AgendaServicosEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\ClinicasServicos\ClinicasServicosEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\OrcamentosServicos\OrcamentosServicosEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\ProfissionalIntervalos\ProfissionalIntervalosEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\Tools\Pagination\Paginator as ORMPaginator;
use DoctrineORMModule\Paginator\Adapter\DoctrinePaginator as DoctrineAdapter;
use DoctrineModule\Persistence\ObjectManagerAwareInterface;
use DoctrineModule\Persistence\ProvidesObjectManager;
use Zend\Console\Console;
use Zend\Console\Request;
use Zend\I18n\Translator\TranslatorAwareInterface;
use Zend\I18n\Translator\TranslatorAwareTrait;
use Zend\Log\LoggerAwareInterface;
use Zend\Log\LoggerAwareTrait;
use Zend\Mail\Message;
use Zend\Mail\Transport\TransportInterface;
use Zend\Mime\Message as MimeMessage;
use Zend\Mime\Mime as MimeMime;
use Zend\Mime\Part as MimePart;
use Zend\Mvc\Controller\AbstractActionController;
use Zend\View\Model\ViewModel;
use Zend\View\Renderer\RendererInterface;
use DateTime;
use Exception;
use InvalidArgumentException;
use RuntimeException;

class AgendasResource extends AbstractResourceListener implements
LoggerAwareInterface,
TranslatorAwareInterface,
ObjectManagerAwareInterface
{
    use LoggerAwareTrait, TranslatorAwareTrait, ProvidesObjectManager;
    /**
     * @var TransportInterface
     */
    protected $transport;

    /**
     * @var RendererInterface
     */
    protected $renderer;
    
    /**
     * Create a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function create($data)
    {
        try {
            $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
            /** @var AgendasEntity $agendamento */
            $agendamento = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), new $this->entityClass());

            $this->createScheduling($agendamento, 1);

            $this->getObjectManager()->persist($agendamento);
            $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

            $this->addScheduleServices($agendamento);

            $this->sendScheduleNotification($agendamento);

            return $this->getRepository()->fetch($agendamento->getId());
        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(422, $this->getTranslator()->translate($e->getMessage()));
        } catch (RuntimeException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(400, $this->getTranslator()->translate($e->getMessage()));
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var AgendasRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getRepository();

            if (
                $this->getUser()->isCliente() &&
                $repository->find($id)->getCliente()->getUser()->getId() !== $this->getUser()->getId()
            ) {
                throw new RuntimeException('Acesso negado.');
            }

            /** @var AgendasEntity $object */
            if ($object = $repository->fetch($id, $this->getClinica()->getId())) {
                if(isset($object['clinica']) && isset($object['clinica']['logotipo']) && isset($object['clinica']['logotipo']['tmp_name'])) {
                    $object['clinica']['logotipo']['url'] = str_replace('s3://','//s3.amazonaws.com/',$object['clinica']['logotipo']['tmp_name']);
                }
                return $object;
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Agenda não encontrada.'));
        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(422, $this->getTranslator()->translate($e->getMessage()));
        } catch (RuntimeException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(403, $this->getTranslator()->translate($e->getMessage()));
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch all or a subset of resources
     *
     * @param \Zend\Stdlib\Parameters|array $params
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetchAll($params = [])
    {
        try {
            if (!$params->offsetExists('query')) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', []);
            }

            if ($clinica = (integer) $this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge($params->get('query'), [
                    'agendas.clinica' => $clinica
                ]));

                if (
                    isset($params) &&
                    isset($params->query['profissional']) &&
                    isset($params->query['servico']) &&
                    isset($params->query['data'])
                ) {
                    $today = date("Y-m-d");
                    $dataPesq = date("Y-m-d", strtotime($params->query['data']));
                    if($dataPesq > $today) {
                        $result = $this->getAvailableTimes($clinica, $params->query['profissional'], $params->query['servico'], $params->query['data']);
                        if(count($result)) {
                            return new ApiProblem(
                                200,
                                $result,
                                'avaliable_schedulings',
                                'Agendamentos disponíveis'
                            );
                        } else {
                            return new ApiProblem(
                                200,
                                $this->getTranslator()->translate('Nenhum horário disponível nesta data!'),
                                'avaliable_schedulings',
                                'Agendamentos disponíveis'
                            );
                        }
                    } else {
                        return new ApiProblem(
                            200,
                            $this->getTranslator()->translate('Nenhum horário disponível para datas com menos de 24hrs de antecedência!'),
                            'avaliable_schedulings',
                            'Agendamentos disponíveis'
                        );
                    }
                }
            }

            if (isset($params) && isset($params->query['relatorio'])) {
                return $this->relatorioAgenda($params->query);
            }

            if (isset($params->query['checkAgendamento']) || isset($params->query['dataAgendamento'])) {
                if (
                    isset($params->query['checkAgendamento']) &&
                    isset($params->query['dataAgendamento']) &&
                    isset($params->query['profissional']) &&
                    isset($params->query['agendas.clinica']) &&
                    isset($params->query['servicos'])
                ) {
                    $resultCheckInterval = $this->checkIntervalAvailableScheduling(
                        $params->query['dataAgendamento'],
                        $params->query['profissional'],
                        $params->query['agendas.clinica']
                    );

                    if ($resultCheckInterval === false) {
                        return new ApiProblem(
                            201,
                            $this->getTranslator()->translate('Existe(m) Intervalo(s) resgistrado(s) para o profissional nesta data e hora!'),
                            'exist_interval',
                            'Já existe um Intervalo'
                        );
                    }

                    $resultCheck = $this->checkAvailableScheduling(
                        $params->query['dataAgendamento'],
                        $params->query['profissional'],
                        $params->query['agendas.clinica'],
                        $params->query['servicos'],
                        isset($params->query['agendas.id']) ? $params->query['agendas.id'] : null
                    );

                    if ($resultCheck === false) {
                        return new ApiProblem(
                            201,
                            $this->getTranslator()->translate('Já existe(m) Agendamento(s) resgistrado(s) para o profissional nesta data e hora!'),
                            'exist_scheduling',
                            'Já existe um Agendamento'
                        );
                    }

                    return new ApiProblem(
                        200,
                        $this->getTranslator()->translate('Nenhum Agendamento resgistrado nesta data e hora com este profissional!'),
                        'avaliable_scheduling',
                        'Agendamento disponível'
                    );
                }

                return new ApiProblem(
                    422,
                    $this->getTranslator()->translate('Não foi possivel verificar se existe(m) Agendamento(s) resgistrado(s) nesta data e hora com este profissional!')
                );
            }

            $orderBy = null;
            if (isset($params->orderby)) {
                $orderBy = $params->orderby;
            }

            $query = $this->getRepository()->fetchAll(['query' => $params->query], $orderBy, $this->isGuest());
            $adapter = new DoctrineAdapter(new ORMPaginator($query));

            return new $this->collectionClass($adapter);
        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        } catch (RuntimeException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(403, $this->getTranslator()->translate($e->getMessage()));
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Patch (partial in-place update) a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function patch($id, $data)
    {
        return $this->__update($id);
    }

    /**
     * Update a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function update($id, $data)
    {
        return $this->__update($id);
    }

    /**
     * Check if is possible scheduling
     *
     * @param DateTime $date
     * @return int
     */
    private function checkPossibleScheduling(DateTime $date)
    {
        $today = new DateTime();
        $diff = $date->diff($today);

        if (($diff->h + ($diff->days * 24)) < 24) {
            return 3;
        }

        if ($today->getTimestamp() > $date->getTimestamp()) {
            return 2;
        }

        return 1;
    }

    private function checkAvailableScheduling($newScheduling, $idProfissional, $idClinica, $servicos, $idAgenda = null)
    {
        $date = explode(' ', $newScheduling);
        $dateBetween = [];
        $avaliableScheduling = true;
        $tempoMedioServicosNewScheduling = 0;

        $dateBetween['inicial'] = $date[0] . ' 00:00:00';
        $dateBetween['final'] = $date[0] . ' 23:59:59';

        // Pegar o tempo Médio de duração do(s) serviço(s) solicitado(s) no Agendamento Solicitado
        $clinicaServico = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClinicasServicosEntity::class);
        if (is_countable($servicos)) {
            foreach ($servicos as $servico) {
                $clinicaServ = $servico->getServico();
                if ($clinicaServ instanceof ClinicasServicosEntity) {
                    $servicoDetalhes = $clinicaServ->getTempoMedioDuracao();
                } else {
                    $servicoDetalhes = $clinicaServico->find($clinicaServ->getId())->getTempoMedioDuracao();
                }

                $tempoMedioServicosNewScheduling = $tempoMedioServicosNewScheduling + $servicoDetalhes;
            }
        } else {
            $servicoDetalhes = $clinicaServico->find($servicos)->getTempoMedioDuracao();
            $tempoMedioServicosNewScheduling = $servicoDetalhes;
        }

        // Calcular Data e hora inicial e final do Agendamento Solicitado e converter para timestamp
        $newSchedulingRequired = [];
        $newSchedulingRequired['init'] = $newScheduling;
        $newSchedulingRequired['finish'] = date("Y-m-d H:i:s", strtotime($newScheduling . " + " . $tempoMedioServicosNewScheduling . " minutes"));

        $newSchedulingRequired['timestampInit'] = strtotime($newSchedulingRequired['init']);
        $newSchedulingRequired['timestampFinish'] = strtotime($newSchedulingRequired['finish']);

        // Pegar todos Agendamentos da Clinica com o Profissional do mesmo dia do Agendamento Solicitado
        $resultAllSchedulings = $this->getRepository()->getAgendamentosProfissionalDoDia($idClinica, $idProfissional, $dateBetween, $idAgenda);

        // Rodar validação de agendamento disponivel com todos os Agendamentos Registrados mesmo dia do Agendamento Solicitado
        foreach ($resultAllSchedulings as $schedulingPublish) {
            // Calcular Data e hora inicial e final do Agendamento Registrado do mesmo dia do solicitado e converter para timestamp
            $scheduling = [];
            $scheduling['init'] = $schedulingPublish['data_hora'];
            $scheduling['finish'] = date("Y-m-d H:i:s", strtotime($schedulingPublish['data_hora'] . " + " . $schedulingPublish['tempo_medio_duracao'] . " minutes"));

            $scheduling['timestampInit'] = strtotime($scheduling['init']);
            $scheduling['timestampFinish'] = strtotime($scheduling['finish']);

            // ** Array de teste da validação do Agendamento
            // $array['Registrados'][$i]['Agendamento'] = $scheduling;

            // Validar se o Agendamento Solicitado extrapola o horario do Agendamento Registrado
            if (
                (
                    $newSchedulingRequired['timestampInit'] >= $scheduling['timestampInit'] &&
                    $newSchedulingRequired['timestampInit'] < $scheduling['timestampFinish']
                ) ||
                (
                    $newSchedulingRequired['timestampFinish'] > $scheduling['timestampInit'] &&
                    $newSchedulingRequired['timestampInit'] <= $scheduling['timestampInit']
                )
            ) {
                $avaliableScheduling = false;
            }
        }

        return $avaliableScheduling;
    }

    private function checkIntervalAvailableScheduling($newScheduling, $idProfissional, $idClinica)
    {
        $date = explode(' ', $newScheduling);
        $avaliableScheduling = true;

        $datesWeek = [
            1 => 'Segunda-feira',
            2 => 'Terça-feira',
            3 => 'Quarta-feira',
            4 => 'Quinta-feira',
            5 => 'Sexta-feira',
            6 => 'Sábado',
            7 => 'Domingo'
        ];

        $iDateWeek = date("N", strtotime($date[0]));

        $profissionalIntervalos = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ProfissionalIntervalosEntity::class);
        // Pegar os Intervalos que extrapolam a Data hora do Agendamento da Clinica com o Profissional
        $resultAllBreaks = $profissionalIntervalos->getIntervalosProfissionalDoDia($idClinica, $idProfissional, $newScheduling, $datesWeek[$iDateWeek]);

        // Validar se o Agendamento Solicitado extrapola o horario do Agendamento Registrado
        if (COUNT($resultAllBreaks) > 0) {
            $avaliableScheduling = false;
        }

        return $avaliableScheduling;
    }

    /**
     * Cria relacionamento entre a agenda e a venda
     * Tabela: venda_has_agenda
     *
     * @param AgendasEntity $agendamento
     */
    private function addSchedulingOnSale(AgendasEntity $agendamento)
    {
        if ($vendas = $this->getInputFilter()->getValue('agendasVendas')) {
            foreach ($vendas as $id) {
                /** @var VendasEntity $venda */
                if ($id !== null && $venda = $this->getObjectManager()->find(VendasEntity::class, $id)) {
                    $venda->addAgendas($agendamento);

                    $this->getObjectManager()->persist($venda);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Remove o relacionamento entre a agenda e a venda
     * Tabela: venda_has_agenda
     *
     * @param AgendasEntity $agendamento
     */
    private function removeSchedulingOnSale(AgendasEntity $agendamento)
    {
        if ($vendas = $this->getInputFilter()->getValue('agendasVendas')) {
            foreach ($vendas as $id) {
                /** @var VendasEntity $venda */
                if ($id !== null && $venda = $this->getObjectManager()->find(VendasEntity::class, $id)) {
                    $venda->removeAgendas($agendamento);

                    $this->getObjectManager()->persist($venda);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    private function relatorioAgenda($params)
    {
        $searchParam = [];
        if (isset($params)) {
            $searchParam['query'] = $params;
        }

        $orderBy = null;
        if (isset($params->orderby)) {
            $orderBy = $params->orderby;
        }

        $query = $this->getRepository()->relatorioAgenda($searchParam, $orderBy);
        $adapter = new DoctrineAdapter(new ORMPaginator($query));
        return new $this->collectionClass($adapter);
    }

    /**
     * Get clinica
     *
     * @return ClinicasEntity
     * @throws NonUniqueResultException
     */
    private function getClinica()
    {
        if ($id = (integer)$this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
            /** @var ClinicasRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClinicasEntity::class);

            if ($this->getUser()->isClinica()) {
                /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
                if ($clinica = $repository->getClinicaUser($id, $this->getUser())) {
                    return $clinica;
                }

                /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
                if ($clinica = $repository->getClinicaProfissional($id, $this->getUser())) {
                    return $clinica;
                }

                throw new InvalidArgumentException('Usuário não relacionado a clínica');
            }

            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            if ($clinica = $repository->find($id)) {
                return $clinica;
            }
        }

        throw new InvalidArgumentException(
            'Não possível é criar ou atualizar um Agendamento sem informar a Clínica!'
        );
    }

    /**
     * Get user
     *
     * @return User
     */
    private function getUser()
    {
        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getAuthenticationIdentity()) {
            return $identity['user'];
        }

        throw new InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Usuário não encontrado'));
    }

    /**
     * is guest
     *
     * @return bool
     */
    private function isGuest()
    {
        return $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getName() === 'guest';
    }

    /**
     * Create scheduling
     * @param AgendasEntity $agendamento
     * @throws NonUniqueResultException
     */
    private function createScheduling(AgendasEntity $agendamento, $acao)
    {
        /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
        $clinica = $this->getClinica();

        if (
            $this->getInputFilter()->has('dataHora') &&
            $this->getInputFilter()->get('dataHora')->isValid()
        ) {
            $dataHora = $this->getInputFilter()->getValue('dataHora');
            $possibleScheduling = $this->checkPossibleScheduling(
                DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d H:i:s', $dataHora)
            );

            if ($this->getInputFilter()->getValue('agendamentoExterno') && $possibleScheduling === 3) {
                throw new RuntimeException(
                    'Não é possível criar um Agendamento Externo com menos de 24hrs de antecedência! ' .
                    'Entre em contato com a Clinica para que sejam realizados por telefone.'
                );
            }

            if ($possibleScheduling === 2 && $acao === 1) {
                throw new RuntimeException(
                    'Não é possível criar um Agendamento com data retroativa!'
                );
            }

            if ($agendamento->getProfissional() === null) {
                throw new RuntimeException(
                    'Profissional não encontrado.'
                );
            }
            
            if (
                $this->getUser()->isCliente() &&
                (
                    ! $this->checkIntervalAvailableScheduling(
                        $dataHora,
                        $agendamento->getProfissional()->getId(),
                        $clinica->getId()
                    ) ||
                    ! $this->checkAvailableScheduling(
                        $dataHora,
                        $agendamento->getProfissional()->getId(),
                        $clinica->getId(),
                        $agendamento->getServicos(),
                        null !== $agendamento->getId() ? $agendamento->getId() : null
                    )
                )
            ) {
                throw new RuntimeException(
                    'Horário não disponível, já existem agendamentos.'
                );
            }
            
        }

        $agendamento->setClinica($clinica);
        if (! $agendamento->getCliente()->hasClinica($clinica->getId())) {
            $clinica->addClientes($agendamento->getCliente());

            $status = new ClientesStatusEntity();
            $status->setClinica($clinica)
                ->setCliente($agendamento->getCliente())
                ->setAtivo(true);

            $this->getObjectManager()->persist($status);
        }

        $this->addSchedulingOnSale($agendamento);
    }

    /**
     * Update
     *
     * @param $id
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|object|ApiProblem
     */
    private function __update($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var AgendasEntity $agendamento */
            if ($agendamento = $this->getRepository()->find($id)) {
                $this->removeSchedulingOnSale($agendamento);

                $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
                /** @var AgendasEntity $agendamento */
                $agendamento = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), $agendamento);

                $this->createScheduling($agendamento, 2);

                $this->getObjectManager()->persist($agendamento);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();
                
                $this->removeScheduleServices($agendamento);
                $this->addScheduleServices($agendamento);

                return $this->getRepository()->fetch($id);
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Agendamento não encontrado.'));
        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(422, $this->getTranslator()->translate($e->getMessage()));
        } catch (RuntimeException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(400, $this->getTranslator()->translate($e->getMessage()));
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }


    /**
     * Add Services in Schedule
     * Tabela: agenda_has_servico
     *
     * @param AgendasEntity $agendamento
     */
    private function addScheduleServices(AgendasEntity $agendamento)
    {
        if ($agendaServicos = $this->getInputFilter()->getValue('servicos')) {
            if (is_countable($agendaServicos)) {
                foreach ($agendaServicos as $agendaServ) {
                    $agendaServico = new AgendaServicosEntity();
                    if(isset($agendaServ["orcamentoServico"]) && $agendaServ["orcamentoServico"]) {
                        $agendaServico->setAgenda($agendamento);
                        $agendaServico->setServico($this->getObjectManager()->find(ClinicasServicosEntity::class, $agendaServ["servico"]));
                        //$agendaServico->setOrcamentoServico($this->getObjectManager()->find(OrcamentosServicosEntity::class,$agendaServ["orcamentoServico"]));
                    } else {
                        $agendaServico->setAgenda($agendamento)
                            ->setServico($this->getObjectManager()->find(ClinicasServicosEntity::class, $agendaServ["servico"]));
                    }

                    $this->getObjectManager()->persist($agendaServico);
                    $this->getObjectManager()->flush();
                }
            }
        }
    }

    private function getAvailableTimes($idClinica, $idProfissional, $idServico, $dataStr) 
    {
        $idProfissional = (int) $idProfissional;
        $idServico = (int) $idServico;

        // Array com os horarios disponíveis e indisponíveis
        $availableTimes = [];
        $unavailableTimes = [];

        // Pegar detalhes da Clinica
        $clinica = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClinicasEntity::class)->find($idClinica);

        // Pegar horarios da Clínica
        $clinicaHorarios = $clinica->getHorarios();

        // Verifica o dia da semana de acordo com a data passada
        $datesWeek = [
            1 => 'Segunda-feira',
            2 => 'Terça-feira',
            3 => 'Quarta-feira',
            4 => 'Quinta-feira',
            5 => 'Sexta-feira',
            6 => 'Sábado',
            7 => 'Domingo'
        ];
        $data = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $dataStr);
        $iDateWeek = date("N", strtotime($dataStr));
        $weekDay = $datesWeek[$iDateWeek];

        // Verifica se a Clinica tem expediente naquele dia da semana
        if($keyWeekDay = array_search($weekDay, array_column($clinicaHorarios, 'nome'))) {
            // Pega os detalhes de horarios de expediente do dia da semana
            $clinicaHorariosDia = $clinicaHorarios[$keyWeekDay];
        } else {
            // Se não tiver expediente retorna uma lista vazia de horarios disponíveis
            return [];
        }
        
        // Pegar detalhes do Serviço
        $clinicaServico = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClinicasServicosEntity::class)->find($idServico);

        // Pegar o tempo Médio de duração do(s) serviço(s) solicitado(s) no Agendamento Solicitado
        $tempoMedioDuracaoServico = $clinicaServico->getTempoMedioDuracao();
        
        // Verifica se o horário de abertura é intervalo do profissional
        if($this->checkIntervalAvailableScheduling(date('Y-m-d H:i:s', strtotime($dataStr." ".$clinicaHorariosDia['abertura'].":00")), $idProfissional, $idClinica)) {
            $availableTimes[] = $thisTime = $clinicaHorariosDia['abertura'];
        } else {
            $unavailableTimes[] = $thisTime = $clinicaHorariosDia['abertura'];
        }

        // Criar array dos horários disponíveis e indisponíveis
        while($thisTime != $clinicaHorariosDia['fechamento']) {
            // Verificar o último horário adicionado
            $iAvailable = count($availableTimes) > 0 ? count($availableTimes) - 1 : 0;
            $iUnavailable = count($unavailableTimes) > 0 ? count($unavailableTimes) - 1 : 0;
            if(count($availableTimes) && !count($unavailableTimes)) {
                $lastTime = $availableTimes[$iAvailable];
            } else if(count($unavailableTimes) && !count($availableTimes)) {
                $lastTime = $unavailableTimes[$iUnavailable];
            } else if (count($availableTimes) && count($unavailableTimes) && $availableTimes[$iAvailable] > $unavailableTimes[$iUnavailable]) {
                $lastTime = $availableTimes[$iAvailable];
            } else {
                $lastTime = $unavailableTimes[$iUnavailable];
            }
            
            $thisTime = date("H:i", strtotime($lastTime. " + " . $tempoMedioDuracaoServico . " minutes"));
            // Verifica se o horário de abertura é intervalo do profissional
            $intervalAvailableScheduling = $this->checkIntervalAvailableScheduling(date('Y-m-d H:i:s', strtotime($dataStr." ".$thisTime.":00")), $idProfissional, $idClinica);
            // Adiciona o horário ao array disponível ou indisponível
            if($intervalAvailableScheduling && $clinicaHorariosDia['fechamento'] != $thisTime)
                $availableTimes[] = $thisTime;
            else
                $unavailableTimes[] = $thisTime;
        }

        $dateBetween = [];
        $dateBetween['inicial'] = $dataStr . ' 00:00:00';
        $dateBetween['final'] = $dataStr . ' 23:59:59';

        // Pegar todos Agendamentos da Clinica com o Profissional do mesmo dia pesquisado
        $resultAllSchedulings = $this->getRepository()->getAgendamentosProfissionalDoDia($idClinica, $idProfissional, $dateBetween);

        // Filtrar horários já agendados
        foreach ($resultAllSchedulings as $scheduling) {
            $timeScheduling = date("H:i", strtotime($scheduling['data_hora']));
            if($unsetKey = array_search($timeScheduling, $availableTimes)) {
                unset($availableTimes[$unsetKey]);
                $availableTimes = array_values($availableTimes);
            }
        }

        return $availableTimes;

    }

    /**
     * Delete all Services in Schedule
     * Tabela: agenda_has_servico
     *
     * @param AgendasEntity $agendamento
     */
    private function removeScheduleServices(AgendasEntity $agendamento)
    {

        $agendaServicoEnt = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(AgendaServicosEntity::class);
        /** @var AgendaServicosEntity $agendasServs */
        $agendasServs = $agendaServicoEnt->findBy(['agenda' => $agendamento->getId()]);
        foreach ($agendasServs as $agendaServ) {
            $this->getObjectManager()->remove($agendaServ);
        }

    }

    /**
     * Send Schedule to Clinic
     *
     * @param AgendasEntity $agendamento
     */
    public function sendScheduleNotification(AgendasEntity $agendamento)
    {
        try {

            /** @var AgendasRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(AgendasEntity::class);

            $this->messageToClinic($agendamento);

        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->info($e);

            return $e;
        }
    }

    /**
     * @param AgendasEntity $agendamento
     */
    private function messageToClinic(AgendasEntity $agendamento)
    {
        $model = new ViewModel();
        $model->setVariables([
            'client' => $agendamento->getCliente(),
            'clinic' => $agendamento->getClinica(),
            'professional' => $agendamento->getProfissional(),
            'date' => $agendamento->getDataHora(),
            'status' => $agendamento->getStatus(),
        ]);
        $model->setTemplate('mail/agendamento/clinic');
        $message = $this->createMessage(
            $this->renderer->render($model), '*** ATENÇÃO *** Chegou agendamento de paciente para sua clínica!'
        );

        $message->setFrom('nao_responda@sigoclinicas.com', 'Sigo Clinicas')
            ->addTo($agendamento->getClinica()->getEmail())
            ->addCc($agendamento->getProfissional()->getEmail())
            ->addBcc('sigoclinicas@gmail.com');

        $this->transport->send($message);
    }

     /**
     * @param TransportInterface $transport
     * @return AgendasResource
     */
    public function setTransport(TransportInterface $transport): AgendasResource
    {
        $this->transport = $transport;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @param RendererInterface $renderer
     * @return AgendasResource
     */
    public function setRenderer(RendererInterface $renderer): AgendasResource
    {
        $this->renderer = $renderer;

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @param string $content
     * @param string $subject
     * @return Message
     */
    private function createMessage(string $content, string $subject) : Message
    {
        $html = new MimePart($content);
        $html->type = MimeMime::TYPE_HTML;
        $html->charset = 'utf-8';

        $body = new MimeMessage();
        $body->addPart($html);

        $message = new Message();
        $message->setSubject($subject)
                ->setBody($body);

        return $message;
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Agendas;

use Interop\Container\ContainerInterface;
use SlmMail\Mail\Transport\HttpTransport;
use Zend\ServiceManager\Factory\FactoryInterface;
use Zend\View\Renderer\RendererInterface;

/**
 * Class AgendasResourceFactory
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\Agendas
 */
class AgendasResourceFactory
{
    /**
     * @param ContainerInterface $services
     * @return AgendasResource
     * @throws \Psr\Container\ContainerExceptionInterface
     * @throws \Psr\Container\NotFoundExceptionInterface
     */
    public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $services)
    {
        /** @var \Zend\Log\Logger $logger */
        $logger = $services->get('log');

        /** @var \Zend\I18n\Translator\Translator $translator */
        $translator = $services->get('translator');

        /** @var \Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager $objectManager */
        $objectManager = $services->get(\Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager::class);

        /** @var HttpTransport $transport */
        $transport = $services->get('SlmMail\Mail\Transport\SesTransport');

        /** @var RendererInterface $renderer */
        $renderer = $services->get(RendererInterface::class);

        $resource = new AgendasResource();
        $resource->setLogger($logger);
        $resource->setTranslator($translator);
        $resource->setObjectManager($objectManager);
        $resource->setTransport($transport);
        $resource->setRenderer($renderer);

        return $resource;
    }
}

<?php

namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\AgendaServicos;

use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\AbstractQuery;

/**
 * Class AgendaServicosRepository
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\AgendaServicos
 */
class AgendaServicosRepository extends EntityRepository
{
    /**
     * Fetch All
     *
     * @param array|null $searchParam
     * @param array|null $orderBy
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|object
     */
    public function fetchAll(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('AgendaServicos');

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->setHydrationMode(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    /**
     * Fetch
     *
     * @param int $id
     * @param null $agenda
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|int|mixed|object|string|null
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetch($id, $agenda = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('AgendaServicos');

        $qb->where($qb->expr()->eq('AgendaServicos.id', ':id'))
            ->setParameter(':id', $id);

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->getOneOrNullResult(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\AgendaServicos;

use Application\Entity\Role;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\AgendaServicos\AgendaServicosEntity;
use Doctrine\DBAL\Exception\ForeignKeyConstraintViolationException;
use Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use Application\Rest\AbstractResourceListener;
use Application\Entity\User;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Agendas\AgendasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Agendas\AgendasRepository;
use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use DoctrineModule\Stdlib\Hydrator\DoctrineObject as Hydrator;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;
use Exception;
use InvalidArgumentException;

class AgendaServicosResource extends AbstractResourceListener
{
    /**
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return array|ApiProblem
     */
    public function create($data)
    {
        try {
            $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
            /** @var AgendaServicosEntity $agendaServico */
            $agendaServico = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), new $this->entityClass());

            $this->getObjectManager()->persist($agendaServico);
            $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

            return $this->getRepository()->fetch($agendaServico->getId());
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
        try {
            if ($object = $this->getRepository()->fetch($id)) {
                return $object;
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Serviço não encontrado.'));
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch all or a subset of resources
     *
     * @param \Zend\Stdlib\Parameters|array $params
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetchAll($params = [])
    {
        try {
            if (!$params->offsetExists('query')) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', []);
            }

            try {
                /** @var User $user */
                if ($user = $this->getUser()) {
                    $role = $user->getRole()->first();
                }

                if ($clinica = $this->getClinica()) {
                    $agenda = $agenda->getId();
                }
            } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
                /** @var string $role */
                $role = Role::ROLE_GUEST;
            }

            // Caso o usuário tente acessar uma clínica que não lhe pertence, carregar como usuário convidado
            if (!isset($agenda) || null === $agenda) {
                $agenda = (integer)$this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('agenda');
                $role = Role::ROLE_GUEST;
            }

            $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge(
                $params->get('query'), [
                    'role' => $role,
                    'agendaServicos.agenda' => $agenda
                ]
            ));

            return parent::fetchAll($params);
        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Patch (partial in-place update) a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|mixed|object|ApiProblem
     */
    public function patch($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            if ($clinica = $this->getClinica()) {
                if ($agendaServico = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id])) {
                    $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
                    /** @var AgendaServicosEntity $agendaServico */
                    $agendaServico = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), $agendaServico);

                    $this->getObjectManager()->persist($agendaServico);
                    $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                    return $this->getRepository()->fetch($id);
                }
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Serviço não encontrado.'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function update($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            if ($clinica = $this->getClinica()) {
                if ($agendaServico = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id])) {
                    $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
                    /** @var AgendaServicosEntity $agendaServico */
                    $agendaServico = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), $agendaServico);

                    $this->getObjectManager()->persist($agendaServico);
                    $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                    return $this->getRepository()->fetch($id);
                }
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Serviço não encontrado.'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * @param mixed $id
     * @return bool|ApiProblem
     */
    public function delete($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var AgendaServicosEntity $agendaServico */
            if ($agendaServico = $this->getRepository()->find($id)) {
                if ($this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {

                    $this->getObjectManager()->remove($agendaServico);
                    $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                    return true;
                }
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Serviço não encontrado.'));
        } catch (ForeignKeyConstraintViolationException $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->info($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Serviço sendo usado'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\AgendaServicos;

use Interop\Container\ContainerInterface;

/**
 * Class AgendaServicosResourceFactory

class AgendaServicosResourceFactory

        /** @var \Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager $objectManager */

<?php

namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Clientes;

use Application\Entity\Role;
use Application\Entity\User;
use Application\Rest\AbstractUserResourceListener;
use Cliente\V1\Rest\Clientes\ClientesEntity;
use Cliente\V1\Rest\Clientes\ClientesRepository;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException;
use DoctrineModule\Stdlib\Hydrator\DoctrineObject as Hydrator;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;
use Exception;
use InvalidArgumentException;

/**
 * Class ClientesResource
 *
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\Clientes
 */
class ClientesResource extends AbstractUserResourceListener
{
    /**
     * Default user role
     *
     * @var string
     */
    protected $defaultUserRole = Role::ROLE_CLIENTE;

    /**
     * Create
     *
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return array|ApiProblem
     */
    public function create($data)
    {
        try {
            $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
            $values = $this->getInputFilter()->getValues();
            if(!$values['endereco']['cep']) {
                $values['endereco'] = null;
            }
            /** @var ClientesEntity $cliente */
            $cliente = $hydrator->hydrate($values, new $this->entityClass());

            $cliente->setOrigem(ClientesEntity::CLIENTE_ORIGEM_BALCAO);

            $user = $cliente->getUser();

            if (
                $this->getInputFilter()->get('user')->has('password') &&
                null !== $this->getInputFilter()->get('user')->get('password')->getValue() &&
                '' !== $this->getInputFilter()->get('user')->get('password')->getValue()
            ) {
                // Criptogra senha do usuário
                $user->setPrimeiroLogin(false)
                    ->setPassword(
                        $this->oAuth2ClientService->createPasswordHash(
                            $this->getInputFilter()->get('user')->getValue('password')
                        )
                    );
            } else {
                $user->setPrimeiroLogin(false);
            }

            // Cria um cliente na tabela OAuth2
            $this->oAuth2ClientService->create($user);

            // Added user role
            if ($user->getRoles()->isEmpty()) {
                $user->addRoles($this->getUserRole());
            }

            // Recupera a clínica do usuário e adiciona o cliente
            $clinica = $this->getClinica();
            $clinica->addClientes($cliente);

            $status = new ClientesStatusEntity();
            $status->setClinica($clinica)
                ->setCliente($cliente);

            $this->getObjectManager()->persist($user);
            $this->getObjectManager()->persist($cliente);
            $this->getObjectManager()->persist($clinica);
            $this->getObjectManager()->persist($status);

            $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

            return $this->getRepository()->fetch($cliente->getId());
        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->info($e);

            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Delete a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @return bool|ApiProblem
     */
    public function delete($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var ClientesEntity $cliente */
            if ($cliente = $this->getRepository()->find($id)) {
                if (! $cliente->hasClinica($this->getClinica()->getId())) {
                    return new ApiProblem(
                        401,
                        $this->getTranslator()->translate('Cliente não relacionado a Clínica.')
                    );
                }

                $clinica = $this->getClinica();
                $cliente->removeClinicas($clinica);

                $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClientesStatusEntity::class);
                /** @var ClientesStatusEntity $status */
                $status = $repository->findBy(['clinica' => $clinica, 'cliente' => $cliente]);
                $this->getObjectManager()->remove($status);

                // Converte cliente para origem WEB caso não hajam mais Clínicas
                if ($cliente->getClinicas()->count() === 0) {
                    $cliente->setOrigem(ClientesEntity::CLIENTE_ORIGEM_WEB);
                }

                $this->getObjectManager()->persist($cliente);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return true;
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Cliente não encontrado.'));
        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->info($e);

            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var ClientesRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getRepository();
            if ($object = $repository->fetch($id, $this->getClinica())) {
                if(isset($object['clinica']) && isset($object['clinica']['logotipo']) && isset($object['clinica']['logotipo']['tmp_name'])) {
                    $object['clinica']['logotipo']['url'] = str_replace('s3://','//s3.amazonaws.com/',$object['clinica']['logotipo']['tmp_name']);
                }
                return $object;
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Cliente não encontrado.'));
        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->info($e);

            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch all or a subset of resources
     *
     * @param \Zend\Stdlib\Parameters|array $params
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetchAll($params = [])
    {
        try {
            if (!$params->offsetExists('query')) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', []);
            }

            $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge($params->get('query'), [
                'clinica' => $this->getClinica()->getId()
            ]));

            return parent::fetchAll($params);
        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Patch (partial in-place update) a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function patch($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            return $this->__update($id);
        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->info($e);

            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function update($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            return $this->__update($id);
        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->info($e);

            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get clinica
     *
     * @return ClinicasEntity|object
     * @throws NonUniqueResultException
     */
    private function getClinica()
    {
        if ($id = (integer)$this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
            /** @var ClinicasRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClinicasEntity::class);

            if ($this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                return $repository->find($id);
            }

            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            if ($clinica = $repository->getClinicaUser($id, $this->getUser())) {
                return $clinica;
            }

             /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            else if ($clinica = $repository->getClinicaProfissional($id, $this->getUser())) {
                return $clinica;
            }
        }

        throw new InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Clínica não encontrada'));
    }

    /**
     * Get user
     *
     * @return User
     */
    private function getUser()
    {
        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getAuthenticationIdentity()) {
            return $identity['user'];
        }

        throw new InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Usuário não encontrado'));
    }

    /**
     * Update cliente
     *
     * @param $id
     * @return array|ApiProblem
     * @throws Exception
     */
    private function __update($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var ClientesEntity $cliente */
            if ($cliente = $this->getRepository()->find($id)) {
                // Salva o status atual do cliente antes de passar pelo hydrator
                $isAtivo = $cliente->isAtivo();

                $values = $this->getInputFilter()->getValues();
                if(!$values['endereco']['cep']) {
                    $values['endereco'] = null;
                } else {
                    unset($values['endereco']['id']);
                }

                $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
                /** @var ClientesEntity $cliente */
                $cliente = $hydrator->hydrate($values, $cliente);

                $clinica = $this->getClinica();
                // Relacione o Cliente com a Clínica
                if (! $cliente->hasClinica($clinica->getId())) {
                    $clinica->addClientes($cliente);

                    $status = new ClientesStatusEntity();
                    $status->setClinica($clinica)
                        ->setCliente($cliente);

                    $this->getObjectManager()->persist($clinica);
                    $this->getObjectManager()->persist($status);
                }

                if ($this->getInputFilter()->has('ativo') && ! isset($status)) {
                    $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClientesStatusEntity::class);
                    /** @var ClientesStatusEntity $status */
                    if ($status = $repository->findOneBy(['clinica' => $clinica, 'cliente' => $cliente])) {
                        $status->setAtivo($this->getInputFilter()->getValue('ativo'));

                        $this->getObjectManager()->persist($status);
                    }
                }

                /**
                 * Bloqueia a alteração do status do cliente para qualquer usuário,
                 * só é possível executar a ação pelo endpoint do Cliente.
                 */
                $cliente->setAtivo($isAtivo);

                $this->getObjectManager()->persist($cliente);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return $this->getRepository()->fetch($cliente->getId());
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Cliente não encontrado.'));
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            throw $e;
        }
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Clientes;

use Interop\Container\ContainerInterface;

/**
 * Class ClientesResourceFactory
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\Clientes
 */
class ClientesResourceFactory
{
    /**
     * @param ContainerInterface $services
     * @return ClientesResource
     * @throws \Psr\Container\ContainerExceptionInterface
     * @throws \Psr\Container\NotFoundExceptionInterface
     */
    public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $services)
    {
        /** @var \Zend\Log\Logger $logger */
        $logger = $services->get('log');

        /** @var \Zend\I18n\Translator\Translator $translator */
        $translator = $services->get('translator');

        /** @var \Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager $objectManager */
        $objectManager = $services->get(\Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager::class);

        /** @var \Application\Service\OAuth2ClientService $oAuth2ClientService */
        $oAuth2ClientService = $services->get(\Application\Service\OAuth2ClientService::class);

        $resource = new ClientesResource();
        $resource->setLogger($logger);
        $resource->setTranslator($translator);
        $resource->setObjectManager($objectManager);
        $resource->setOAuth2ClientService($oAuth2ClientService);

        return $resource;
    }
}

    {

        return $this;

        return $this->clinica;
    }

    {
