<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas;

use Cliente\V1\Rest\Clientes\ClientesEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\ClinicasServicos\ClinicasServicosEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Agendas\AgendasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Especialidades\EspecialidadesEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Usuarios\UsuariosEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Profissionais\ProfissionaisEntity;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\ArrayCollection;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\Collection;
use Endereco\Entity\Endereco;
use Telefone\Entity\Telefone;

/**
 * Class ClinicasEntity
 *
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas
 */
class ClinicasEntity
{
    /**
     * @var int
     */
    protected $id;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $razaoSocial;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $nomeFantasia;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $email;

    /**
     * @var array
     */
    protected $logotipo;

    /**
     * @var array
     */
    protected $oldLogotipo;

    /**
     * @var Endereco
     */
    protected $endereco;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $responsavelNome;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $responsavelEmail;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $responsavelTelefone;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $responsavelGenero;

    /**
     * @var \DateTime
     */
    protected $responsavelDataNascimento;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $responsavelCpf;

    /**
     * @var int
     */
    protected $validadeOrcamento;

    /**
     * @var int
     */
    protected $validadeFichaAnamnese;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $sobre;

    /**
     * @var array
     */
    protected $fotos;

    /**
     * @var array
     */
    protected $horarios;

    /**
     * @var array
     */
    protected $formasPagamento;

    /**
     * @var array
     */
    protected $funcionalidades;

    /**
     * @var bool
     */
    protected $ativo = true;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $cnpj;

    /**
     * @var bool
     */
    protected $somenteAgendamentosVendidos = true;

    /**
     * @var Collection
     */
    protected $telefones;

    /**
     * @var Collection
     */
    protected $usuarios;

    /**
     * @var Collection
     */
    protected $profissionais;

    /**
     * @var Collection
     */
    protected $clientes;

    /**
     * @var Collection
     */
    protected $clinicasServicos;

    /**
     * @var Collection
     */
    protected $agendas;

    /**
     * @var Collection
     */
    protected $especialidades;

    /**
     * @var Collection
     */
    protected $tabelasPreco;

    /**
     * Clinica constructor.
     */
    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->telefones = new ArrayCollection();
        $this->usuarios = new ArrayCollection();
        $this->profissionais = new ArrayCollection();
        $this->clientes = new ArrayCollection();
        $this->clinicasServicos = new ArrayCollection();
        $this->agendas = new ArrayCollection();
        $this->especialidades = new ArrayCollection();
        $this->tabelasPreco = new ArrayCollection();
    }

    /**
     * Get id
     *
     * @return int
     */
    public function getId(): int
    {
        return $this->id;
    }

    /**
     * Get razao social
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getRazaoSocial(): string
    {
        return $this->razaoSocial;
    }

    /**
     * Set razao social
     *
     * @param string $razaoSocial
     * @return ClinicasEntity
     */
    public function setRazaoSocial(string $razaoSocial): ClinicasEntity
    {
        $this->razaoSocial = $razaoSocial;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get nome
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getNomeFantasia(): string
    {
        return $this->nomeFantasia;
    }

    /**
     * Set nome
     *
     * @param string $nomeFantasia
     * @return ClinicasEntity
     */
    public function setNomeFantasia(string $nomeFantasia): ClinicasEntity
    {
        $this->nomeFantasia = $nomeFantasia;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get email
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getEmail(): string
    {
        return $this->email;
    }

    /**
     * Set email
     *
     * @param string $email
     * @return ClinicasEntity
     */
    public function setEmail(string $email): ClinicasEntity
    {
        $this->email = $email;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get logotipo
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function getLogotipo()
    {
        return $this->logotipo;
    }

    /**
     * Get logotipo tmp name
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getLogotipoTmpName(): string
    {
        return is_array($this->logotipo) && isset($this->logotipo['tmp_name']) ? $this->logotipo['tmp_name'] : '';
    }

    /**
     * @return string
     */
    public function getLogotipoS3Bucket(): string
    {
        return explode('/', str_replace('s3://', '', $this->getLogotipoTmpName()))[0];
    }

    /**
     * @return string
     */
    public function getLogotipoS3Object(): string
    {
        return str_replace(sprintf('%s/' ,$this->getLogotipoS3Bucket()), '', str_replace('s3://', '', $this->getLogotipoTmpName()));
    }

    /**
     * Set logotipo
     *
     * @param array $logotipo
     * @return ClinicasEntity
     */
    public function setLogotipo(array $logotipo = null): ClinicasEntity
    {
        if ($this->logotipo !== $logotipo) {
            $this->oldLogotipo = $this->logotipo;
        }

        $this->logotipo = $logotipo;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get old logotipo
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function getOldLogotipo(): ?array
    {
        return $this->oldLogotipo;
    }

    /**
     * Get endereco
     *
     * @return Endereco
     */
    public function getEndereco(): Endereco
    {
        return $this->endereco;
    }

    /**
     * Set endereco
     *
     * @param Endereco $endereco
     * @return ClinicasEntity
     */
    public function setEndereco(Endereco $endereco): ClinicasEntity
    {
        $this->endereco = $endereco;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get resposavel nome
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getResponsavelNome(): string
    {
        return $this->responsavelNome;
    }

    /**
     * Set resposavel nome
     *
     * @param string $responsavelNome
     * @return ClinicasEntity
     */
    public function setResponsavelNome(string $responsavelNome): ClinicasEntity
    {
        $this->responsavelNome = $responsavelNome;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get responsavel email
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getResponsavelEmail(): string
    {
        return $this->responsavelEmail;
    }

    /**
     * Set responsavel email
     *
     * @param string $responsavelEmail
     * @return ClinicasEntity
     */
    public function setResponsavelEmail(string $responsavelEmail): ClinicasEntity
    {
        $this->responsavelEmail = $responsavelEmail;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get responsavel telefone
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getResponsavelTelefone(): string
    {
        return $this->responsavelTelefone;
    }

    /**
     * Set responsavel telefone
     *
     * @param string $responsavelTelefone
     * @return ClinicasEntity
     */
    public function setResponsavelTelefone(string $responsavelTelefone): ClinicasEntity
    {
        $this->responsavelTelefone = $responsavelTelefone;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get responsavel genero
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getResponsavelGenero(): string
    {
        return $this->responsavelGenero;
    }

    /**
     * Set responsavel genero
     *
     * @param string $responsavelGenero
     * @return ClinicasEntity
     */
    public function setResponsavelGenero(string $responsavelGenero): ClinicasEntity
    {
        $this->responsavelGenero = $responsavelGenero;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get responsavel data nascimento
     *
     * @return \DateTime
     */
    public function getResponsavelDataNascimento(): ?\DateTime
    {
        return $this->responsavelDataNascimento;
    }

    /**
     * Set responsavel data nascimento
     *
     * @param \DateTime $responsavelDataNascimento
     * @return ClinicasEntity
     */
    public function setResponsavelDataNascimento(\DateTime $responsavelDataNascimento = null): ClinicasEntity
    {
        $this->responsavelDataNascimento = $responsavelDataNascimento;
        return $this;
    }

    /**

    public function removeFoto($foto): ClinicasEntity
    {
        $this->fotos = array_filter($this->fotos, function($item) use ($foto) {

    {
        if ($telefones instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var Telefone $telefone */
            foreach ($telefones as $telefone) {
                $this->telefones->add($telefone);
            }
        } elseif ($telefones instanceof Telefone) {
            $this->telefones->add($telefones);
        }

        return $this;

    /**
     * Get telefones to string
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getTelefonesToString()
    {
        return array_reduce($this->getTelefones()->toArray(), function ($carry, Telefone $telefone) {
            return $carry .= ($carry === null ? $telefone->getNumero() : ' / ' . $telefone->getNumero());
        }, null);
    }

    /**
     * Remove telefones
     *
     * @param Telefone|Collection $telefones
     * @return ClinicasEntity
     */
    public function removeTelefones($telefones): ClinicasEntity
    {
        if ($telefones instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var Telefone $telefone */
            foreach ($telefones as $telefone) {
                $this->telefones->removeElement($telefone);
            }
        } elseif ($telefones instanceof Telefone) {
            $this->telefones->removeElement($telefones);
        } else {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Object must be an instance of Collection or Telefone.');

        return $this;

    /**
     * Add clientes
     *
     * @param ClientesEntity|Collection $clientes
     * @return ClinicasEntity
     */
    public function addClientes($clientes): ClinicasEntity
    {
        if ($clientes instanceof ClientesEntity) {
            $clientes->addClinicas($this);
            $this->clientes->add($clientes);
        } elseif ($clientes instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var ClientesEntity $cliente */
            foreach ($clientes as $cliente) {
                $cliente->addClinicas($this);
                $this->clientes->add($cliente);
            }
        } else {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Object must be an instance of Collection or ClientesEntity.');
        }

        return $this;
    }

    {
        if ($clientes instanceof ClientesEntity) {
            $this->clientes->removeElement($clientes);
        } elseif ($clientes instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var ClientesEntity $cliente */
            foreach ($clientes as $cliente) {
                $this->clientes->removeElement($cliente);

        } else {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Object must be an instance of Collection or ClientesEntity.');

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas;

use Application\Entity\Role;
use Application\Entity\User;
use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Usuarios\UsuariosEntity;
use Doctrine\ORM\AbstractQuery;
use Doctrine\ORM\Query\Expr\Join;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;

/**
 * Class ClinicasRepository
 *
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas
 */
class ClinicasRepository extends EntityRepository
{

    public function fetchAll(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('clinicas');

        if (isset($searchParam['query']['clean'])) {
            $qb->select('partial clinicas.{id, razaoSocial, nomeFantasia, email, logotipo, sobre, fotos, horarios, formasPagamento, funcionalidades, ativo, somenteAgendamentosVendidos}')

                ->addSelect('endereco')
                ->addSelect('telefones')
                ->addSelect('especialidades')
                ->addSelect('segmentos')

                ->innerJoin('clinicas.endereco', 'endereco')
                ->innerJoin('clinicas.telefones', 'telefones')
                ->leftJoin('clinicas.especialidades', 'especialidades')
                ->leftJoin('especialidades.segmento', 'segmentos');
        }
        else {

            if (isset($searchParam['query']['role']) && $searchParam['query']['role'] !== Role::ROLE_ADMIN &&
                !isset($searchParam['query']['usuarios.id'])) {
                $qb->select('partial clinicas.{id, razaoSocial, nomeFantasia, email, logotipo, sobre, fotos, horarios, formasPagamento, funcionalidades, ativo, somenteAgendamentosVendidos}')
                    ->where($qb->expr()->eq('clinicas.ativo', ':ativo'))
                    ->setParameter(':ativo', true);
            }
            $qb->addSelect('endereco')
                ->addSelect('telefones')
                ->addSelect('especialidades')
                ->addSelect('segmentos')
                ->addSelect('agendas')
                ->addSelect('partial profissionalAgenda .{id, nome, email, nomeConselho, numeroRegistro, cpf, genero, horarios, ativo, foto}')
                ->addSelect('servicos')
                ->addSelect('clinicasServicos')
                ->addSelect('partial servico.{id, titulo}')
                ->addSelect('categoria')
                ->addSelect('tabelaServicos')
                ->addSelect('tabela')
                ->addSelect('profissionalServico')
                ->addSelect('partial profissional .{id, nome, email, nomeConselho, numeroRegistro, cpf, genero, horarios, ativo, foto}')
                ->addSelect('profissionalIntervalos')

                ->innerJoin('clinicas.endereco', 'endereco')
                ->innerJoin('clinicas.telefones', 'telefones')
                ->leftJoin('clinicas.especialidades', 'especialidades')
                ->leftJoin('especialidades.segmento', 'segmentos')
                ->leftJoin('clinicas.agendas', 'agendas')
                ->leftJoin('agendas.profissional', 'profissionalAgenda')
                ->leftJoin('agendas.servicos', 'servicos')
                ->leftJoin('clinicas.clinicasServicos', 'clinicasServicos')
                ->leftJoin('clinicasServicos.servico', 'servico')
                ->leftJoin('servico.categoria', 'categoria')
                ->leftJoin('clinicasServicos.tabelaServicos', 'tabelaServicos')
                ->leftJoin('tabelaServicos.tabela', 'tabela')
                ->leftJoin('clinicasServicos.profissionalServico', 'profissionalServico')
                ->leftJoin('profissionalServico.profissional', 'profissional')
                ->leftJoin('profissional.profissionalIntervalos', 'profissionalIntervalos');
        }

        // Removed trash param
        unset($searchParam['query']['role']);
        unset($searchParam['query']['clean']);


        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            if (isset($searchParam['query']['usuarios.id'])) {
                $qb->innerJoin('clinicas.usuarios', 'usuarios');
            }

            $this->mountRestrictions($qb, $searchParam['query']);
        }

        if (! is_null($orderBy)) {
            foreach ($orderBy as $key => $value) {
                $qb->addOrderBy($key, $value);
            }
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->setHydrationMode(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    public function fetch($id, User $usuario = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('clinicas');

        $qb->addSelect('endereco')
            ->addSelect('telefones')
            ->addSelect('especialidades')
            ->addSelect('segmentos')

            ->innerJoin('clinicas.endereco', 'endereco')
            ->innerJoin('clinicas.telefones', 'telefones')
            ->leftJoin('clinicas.especialidades', 'especialidades')
            ->leftJoin('especialidades.segmento', 'segmentos');

        $qb->where($qb->expr()->eq('clinicas.id', ':id'))
            ->setParameter(':id', $id);

        if (null !== $usuario) {
            $qb->innerJoin('clinicas.usuarios', 'usuarios')
                ->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('usuarios.id', ':usuario'))
                ->setParameter(':usuario', $usuario->getId());
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->getOneOrNullResult(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    /**
     * @param int $id
     * @param User $user
     * @return ClinicasEntity|null
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function getClinicaUser(int $id, User $user): ?ClinicasEntity
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('clinicas');

        $qb->select('partial clinicas.{id, razaoSocial, nomeFantasia, email, logotipo, sobre, fotos, horarios, formasPagamento, funcionalidades, ativo, somenteAgendamentosVendidos}')
            ->innerJoin('clinicas.usuarios', 'usuarios')
            ->innerJoin('usuarios.user', 'user')
            ->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('clinicas.id', ':id'))
            ->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('user.id', ':user'))
            ->setParameter(':id', $id)
            ->setParameter(':user', (integer)$user->getId());

            $query = $qb->getQuery();

        return $query->getOneOrNullResult();
    }

    /**
     * @param int $id
     * @param User $user
     * @return ClinicasEntity|null
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function getClinicaProfissional(int $id, User $user): ?ClinicasEntity
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('clinicas');

        $qb->select('partial clinicas.{id, razaoSocial, nomeFantasia, email, logotipo, sobre, fotos, horarios, formasPagamento, funcionalidades, ativo, somenteAgendamentosVendidos}')
            ->innerJoin('clinicas.profissionais', 'profissionais')
            ->innerJoin('profissionais.user', 'user')
            ->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('clinicas.id', ':id'))
            ->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('user.id', ':user'))
            ->setParameter(':id', $id)
            ->setParameter(':user', $user->getId());

        return $qb->getQuery()->getOneOrNullResult();
    }

    /**
     * Get user clinicas
     *
     * @param User $user
     * @return int|mixed|string
     */
    public function getUserClinicas(User $user)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('clinicas');

        $qb->select('partial clinicas.{id}')
            ->distinct(true)
            ->leftJoin('clinicas.usuarios', 'usuarios')
            ->leftJoin('usuarios.user', 'cUser')
            ->leftJoin('clinicas.profissionais', 'profissionais')
            ->leftJoin('profissionais.user', 'pUser')
            ->where(
                $qb->expr()->orX(
                    $qb->expr()->eq('cUser.id', ':user'),
                    $qb->expr()->eq('pUser.id', ':user')
                )
            )
            ->setParameter(':user', $user->getId());

        return $qb->getQuery()->getResult();
    }

    /**
     * @param int $user_id
     * @return mixed[]
     */
    public function getClinicaAllUsers(int $user_id)
    {
        $sql = 'SELECT clus.clinica_id, clus.usuario_id, us.nome 
                  FROM clinica_has_usuario clus
                  INNER JOIN usuario us ON clus.usuario_id = us.id
                  WHERE us.user_id = :user_id
                UNION
                SELECT clpr.clinica_id, clpr.profissional_id, pr.nome 
                  FROM clinica_has_profissional clpr
                  INNER JOIN profissional pr ON clpr.profissional_id = pr.id
                  WHERE pr.user_id = :user_id';

        return $this->_em->getConnection()->fetchAll($sql, [
            'user_id' => $user_id
        ]);
    }

    public function getCidadesClinicas($cidade)
    {
        if($cidade == 'todas'){
            $sql = 'SELECT e.cidade, e.uf 
                FROM clinica c 
                INNER JOIN endereco e
                ON c.endereco_id = e.id
                WHERE c.ativo = true
                GROUP BY e.cidade, e.uf
                ORDER BY e.cidade ASC';
        } else {
            $sql = 'SELECT e.cidade, e.uf 
                FROM clinica c 
                INNER JOIN endereco e
                ON c.endereco_id = e.id
                WHERE c.ativo = true
                AND e.cidade = :cidade
                GROUP BY e.cidade, e.uf
                ORDER BY e.cidade ASC';
        }

        return $this->_em->getConnection()->fetchAll($sql, [
            'cidade' => $cidade
        ]);
    }

    public function getEspecialidadesClinicas($cidade)
    {
        if($cidade == 'todas'){
            $sql = 'SELECT es.nome AS especialidade
                FROM clinica c 
                INNER JOIN endereco e
                ON c.endereco_id = e.id
                LEFT JOIN clinica_has_especialidade chs
                ON chs.clinica_id = c.id
                LEFT JOIN especialidade es
                ON chs.especialidade_id = es.id
                WHERE c.ativo = true
                AND es.ativo = true
                GROUP BY es.nome
                ORDER BY es.nome ASC';
        } else {
            $sql = 'SELECT es.nome AS especialidade
                FROM clinica c 
                INNER JOIN endereco e
                ON c.endereco_id = e.id
                LEFT JOIN clinica_has_especialidade chs
                ON chs.clinica_id = c.id
                LEFT JOIN especialidade es
                ON chs.especialidade_id = es.id
                WHERE c.ativo = true
                AND e.cidade = :cidade
                AND es.ativo = true
                GROUP BY es.nome
                ORDER BY es.nome ASC';
        }

        return $this->_em->getConnection()->fetchAll($sql, [
            'cidade' => $cidade
        ]);
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas;

use Application\Entity\User;
use Application\Rest\AbstractResourceListener;
use Application\Service\OAuth2ClientService;
use Aws\S3\S3Client;
use Doctrine\DBAL\Exception\ForeignKeyConstraintViolationException;
use DoctrineModule\Stdlib\Hydrator\DoctrineObject as Hydrator;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Usuarios\UsuariosEntity;
use Exception;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;

/**
 * Class ClinicasResource
 *
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas
 */
class ClinicasResource extends AbstractResourceListener
{
    /**
     * @var OAuth2ClientService
     */
    private $oAuth2ClientService;

    /**
     * @var S3Client
     */
    private $s3Client;

    /**
     * Create a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function create($data)
    {
        try {
            $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            $clinica = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), new $this->entityClass());

            $this->objectManager->persist($clinica);

            /** @var UsuariosEntity $usuario */
            foreach ($clinica->getUsuarios() as $usuario) {
                if (null === $usuario->getClient()) {
                    $this->oAuth2ClientService->create($usuario);
                }
            }

            $this->relacionarResponsavel($clinica);

            $this->putObjectAcl($clinica->getLogotipo()['tmp_name']);

            foreach ($clinica->getFotos() as $item) {
                $this->putObjectAcl($item['foto']['tmp_name']);
            }

            $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

            return $this->getRepository()->fetch($clinica->getId());
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Delete a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @return bool|ApiProblem
     */
    public function delete($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var ClinicasEntity $entity */
            if ($entity = $this->getRepository()->find($id)) {
                /** @var UsuariosEntity $usuario */
                foreach ($entity->getUsuarios() as $usuario) {
                    $usuario->removeClinicas($entity);

                    $this->getObjectManager()->persist($usuario);

                    if ($usuario->getUser()->getRoles()->isEmpty() ||
                        ($usuario->getUser()->isProprietario() && $usuario->getUser()->getClinicas()->isEmpty())) {
                        $this->getObjectManager()->remove($usuario);
                    }
                }

                $this->s3Client->deleteObjects([
                    'Bucket' => $_ENV['AWS_S3_ASSETS_BUCKET'],
                    'Delete' => [
                        'Objects' => ArrayUtils::merge(
                            [
                                [
                                    'Key' => str_replace(
                                        's3://' . $_ENV['AWS_S3_ASSETS_BUCKET'] . '/',
                                        '',
                                        $entity->getLogotipo()['tmp_name']
                                    ),
                                ]
                            ],
                            array_map(function($item){
                                return [
                                    'Key' => str_replace(
                                        's3://' . $_ENV['AWS_S3_ASSETS_BUCKET'] . '/',
                                        '',
                                        $item['foto']['tmp_name']
                                    )
                                ];
                            }, $entity->getFotos())
                        ),
                        'Quiet' => true,
                    ],
                ]);

                $this->getObjectManager()->remove($entity);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return true;
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Register not found'));
        } catch (ForeignKeyConstraintViolationException $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->info($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Record being used by another resource.'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch all or a subset of resources
     *
     * @param  \Zend\Stdlib\Parameters|array $params
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetchAll($params = [])
    {
        /** @var string $role */
        $role = 'guest';

        if (!$params->offsetExists('query')) {
            $params->offsetSet('query', []);
        }

        if(isset($params->query['cidade'])) {
            $repository = $this->getRepository();
            if(isset($params->query['especialidades']))
                $result = $repository->getEspecialidadesClinicas($params->query['cidade']);
            else
                $result = $repository->getCidadesClinicas($params->query['cidade']);
        } else {
            /** @var array $identity */
            if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getAuthenticationIdentity()) {
                /** @var User $user */
                $user = $identity['user'];
                if ($user->isAdmin()) {
                    return parent::fetchAll($params);
                }

                $role = $user->getRole()->first();
            }

            $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge($params->get('query'), ['role' => $role], 'clean'));

            $result = parent::fetchAll($params);
        }

        return $result;
    }

    /**
     * Patch (partial in-place update) a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function patch($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            if ($clinica = $this->getRepository()->find($id)) {
                $responsavelEmail = $clinica->getResponsavelEmail();

                $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
                $clinica = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), $clinica);

                if (
                    $responsavelEmail !== null &&
                    $this->getInputFilter()->getValue('responsavelEmail') !== $responsavelEmail
                ) {
                    $clinica->removeUsuarios($this->buscarReponsavel($responsavelEmail));
                }
                $this->relacionarResponsavel($clinica);

                $this->putObjectAcl($clinica->getLogotipo()['tmp_name']);

                $this->getObjectManager()->persist($clinica);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                if (null !== $clinica->getOldLogotipo()) {
                    $this->deleteObject($clinica->getOldLogotipo()['tmp_name']);
                }

                return $this->getRepository()->fetch($clinica->getId());
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Register not found'));
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function update($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            if ($clinica = $this->getRepository()->find($id)) {
                $responsavelEmail = $clinica->getResponsavelEmail();

                $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
                $clinica = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), $clinica);

                $clinica->removeUsuarios($this->buscarReponsavel($responsavelEmail));
                $this->relacionarResponsavel($clinica);

                $this->putObjectAcl($clinica->getLogotipo()['tmp_name']);

                $this->getObjectManager()->persist($clinica);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                if (null !== $clinica->getOldLogotipo()) {
                    $this->deleteObject($clinica->getOldLogotipo()['tmp_name']);
                }

                return $this->getRepository()->fetch($clinica->getId());
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Register not found'));
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Set OAuth2 Client Service
     *
     * @param OAuth2ClientService $oAuth2ClientService
     */
    public function setOAuth2ClientService(OAuth2ClientService $oAuth2ClientService)
    {
        $this->oAuth2ClientService = $oAuth2ClientService;
    }

    /**
     * Set S3 Client
     *
     * @param S3Client $s3Client
     */
    public function setS3Client(S3Client $s3Client)
    {
        $this->s3Client = $s3Client;
    }

    /**
     * Put object acl
     *
     * @param string $file
     */
    private function putObjectAcl($file)
    {
        $this->s3Client->putObjectAcl([
            'ACL' => 'public-read',
            'Bucket' => $_ENV['AWS_S3_ASSETS_BUCKET'],
            'Key' => str_replace(
                's3://' . $_ENV['AWS_S3_ASSETS_BUCKET'] . '/',
                '',
                $file
            )
        ]);
    }

    private function deleteObject($file)
    {
        $this->s3Client->deleteObject([
            'Bucket' => $_ENV['AWS_S3_ASSETS_BUCKET'],
            'Key' => str_replace(
                's3://' . $_ENV['AWS_S3_ASSETS_BUCKET'] . '/',
                '',
                $file
            ),
            'Quiet' => true,
        ]);
    }

    //Adiciona usuario na clinica
    private function relacionarResponsavel(ClinicasEntity $clinica) {
        $responsavelBody = $this->getInputFilter()->getValue('responsavelEmail');
        $clinica->addUsuarios($this->buscarReponsavel($responsavelBody));
    }

    private function buscarReponsavel($responsavel) {
        $usuarios = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(UsuariosEntity::class);
        $responsavel = $usuarios->findOneBy(['email' => $responsavel] );

        return $responsavel;
    }


}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas;

use Interop\Container\ContainerInterface;

/**
 * Class ClinicasResourceFactory
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas
 */
class ClinicasResourceFactory
{
    /**
     * @param ContainerInterface $services
     * @return ClinicasResource
     * @throws \Psr\Container\ContainerExceptionInterface
     * @throws \Psr\Container\NotFoundExceptionInterface
     */
    public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $services)
    {
        /** @var \Zend\Log\Logger $logger */
        $logger = $services->get('log');

        /** @var \Zend\I18n\Translator\Translator $translator */
        $translator = $services->get('translator');

        /** @var \Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager $objectManager */
        $objectManager = $services->get(\Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager::class);

        /** @var \Application\Service\OAuth2ClientService $oAuth2ClientService */
        $oAuth2ClientService = $services->get(\Application\Service\OAuth2ClientService::class);

        /** @var \Aws\Sdk $awsSdk */
        $awsSdk = $services->get(\Aws\Sdk::class);

        $resource = new ClinicasResource();
        $resource->setLogger($logger);
        $resource->setTranslator($translator);
        $resource->setObjectManager($objectManager);
        $resource->setOAuth2ClientService($oAuth2ClientService);
        $resource->setS3Client($awsSdk->createS3());

        return $resource;
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\ClinicasServicos;

use Clinica\V1\Rest\ServicoCategorias\ServicoCategoriasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\ServicoMateriais\ServicoMateriaisEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Servicos\ServicosEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\ArrayCollection;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\Collection;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Materiais\MateriaisEntity;

/**
 * Class ClinicasServicosEntity
 */
class ClinicasServicosEntity
{

    /**
     * @var int
     */
    protected $id;

    /**
     * @var ClinicasEntity
     */
    protected $clinica;

    /**
     * @var ServicosEntity
     */
    protected $servico;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $descricao;

    /**
     * @var int
     */
    protected $tempoMedioDuracao;

    /**
     * @var int
     */
    protected $agendamentoExterno;

    /**
     * @var bool
     */
    protected $ativo;

    /**
     * @var ServicoCategoriasEntity
     */
    protected $categoria;

    /**
     * @var Collection;
     */
    protected $clinicas;

    /**
     * @var Collection
     */
    protected $tabelaServicos;

    /**
     * @var Collection
     */
    protected $profissionalServico;

    /**
     * @var Collection
     */
    protected $servicoMateriais;

    /**
     * ClinicasServicosEntity constructor.
     */
    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->clinicas = new ArrayCollection();
        $this->tabelaServicos = new ArrayCollection();
        $this->profissionalServico = new ArrayCollection();
        $this->servicoMateriais = new ArrayCollection();
    }

    /**
     * @return int
     */
    public function getId(): int
    {
        return $this->id;
    }

    /**
     * @return ClinicasEntity
     */
    public function getClinica(): ClinicasEntity
    {
        return $this->clinica;
    }

    /**
     * @param ClinicasEntity $clinica
     * @return ClinicasServicosEntity
     */
    public function setClinica(ClinicasEntity $clinica): ClinicasServicosEntity
    {
        $this->clinica = $clinica;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return ServicosEntity
     */
    public function getServico(): ServicosEntity
    {
        return $this->servico;
    }

    /**
     * @param ServicosEntity $servico
     * @return ClinicasServicosEntity
     */
    public function setServico(ServicosEntity $servico): ClinicasServicosEntity
    {
        $this->servico = $servico;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return string
     */
    public function getDescricao(): string
    {
        return $this->descricao;
    }

    /**
     * @param string $descricao
     * @return ClinicasServicosEntity
     */
    public function setDescricao(string $descricao = null): ClinicasServicosEntity
    {
        $this->descricao = $descricao;
        if (is_null($descricao)) {
            $this->descricao = $this->getServico()->getDescricao();
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return int
     */
    public function getTempoMedioDuracao(): int
    {
        return $this->tempoMedioDuracao;
    }

    /**
     * @param int $tempoMedioDuracao
     * @return ClinicasServicosEntity
     */
    public function setTempoMedioDuracao(int $tempoMedioDuracao = null): ClinicasServicosEntity
    {
        $this->tempoMedioDuracao = $tempoMedioDuracao;
        if (is_null($tempoMedioDuracao)) {
            $this->tempoMedioDuracao = $this->getServico()->getTempoMedioDuracao();
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isAgendamentoExterno(): bool
    {
        return $this->agendamentoExterno;
    }

    /**
     * @param bool $agendamentoExterno
     * @return ClinicasServicosEntity
     */

    public function setAgendamentoExterno(bool $agendamentoExterno = null): ClinicasServicosEntity
    {
        $this->agendamentoExterno = $agendamentoExterno;
        if (is_null($agendamentoExterno)) {
            $this->agendamentoExterno = $this->getServico()->isAgendamentoExterno();
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isAtivo(): bool
    {
        return $this->ativo;
    }

    /**
     * @param bool $ativo
     * @return ClinicasServicosEntity
     */
    public function setAtivo(bool $ativo = true): ClinicasServicosEntity
    {
        $this->ativo = $ativo;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return ServicoCategoriasEntity
     */
    public function getCategoria(): ServicoCategoriasEntity
    {
        return $this->categoria;
    }

    /**
     * @param ServicoCategoriasEntity $categoria
     * @return ClinicasServicosEntity
     */
    public function setCategoria(ServicoCategoriasEntity $categoria): ClinicasServicosEntity
    {
        $this->categoria = $categoria;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Add clinicas
     *
     * @param $clinicas
     * @return ClinicasServicosEntity
     */
    public function addClinicas($clinicas): ClinicasServicosEntity
    {
        if ($clinicas instanceof ClinicasEntity) {
            $this->clinicas->add($clinicas);
        } elseif ($clinicas instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            foreach ($clinicas as $clinica) {
                $this->clinicas->add($clinica);
            }
        } else {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Object must be an instance of Collection or ClinicasEntity.');
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get clinicas
     *
     * @return Collection
     */
    public function getClinicas(): Collection
    {
        return $this->clinicas;
    }

    /**
     * Add clinicas
     *
     * @param ClinicasEntity|Collection $clinicas
     * @return ServicosEntity
     */
    public function removeClinicas($clinicas): ClinicasServicosEntity
    {
        if ($clinicas instanceof ClinicasEntity) {
            $this->clinicas->removeElement($clinicas);
        } elseif ($clinicas instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            foreach ($clinicas as $clinica) {
                $this->clinicas->removeElement($clinica);
            }
        } else {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Object must be an instance of Collection or ClinicasEntity.');
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Set clinica
     *
     * @param Collection $clinicas
     * @return ClinicasServicosEntity
     */
    public function setClinicas(Collection $clinicas): ClinicasServicosEntity
    {
        $this->clinicas = $clinicas;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return $tabelaServicos
     */
    public function getTabelaServicos()
    {
        return $this->tabelaServicos;
    }

    /**
     * @param $tabelaServicos
     * @return ClinicasServicosEntity
     */
    public function setTabelaServicos($tabelaServicos): ClinicasServicosEntity
    {
        $this->tabelaServicos = $tabelaServicos;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return $profissionalServico
     */
    public function getProfissionalServico()
    {
        return $this->profissionalServico;
    }

    /**
     * @param $profissionalServico
     * @return ClinicasServicosEntity
     */
    public function setProfissionalServico($profissionalServico): ClinicasServicosEntity
    {
        $this->profissionalServico = $profissionalServico;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Add Servico materiais
     *
     * @param ServicoMateriaisEntity|ServicoMateriaisEntity[] $servicoMateriais
     * @return ClinicasServicosEntity
     */
    public function addServicoMateriais($servicoMateriais) : ClinicasServicosEntity
    {
        if ($servicoMateriais instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var ServicoMateriaisEntity $servicoMaterial */
            foreach ($servicoMateriais as $servicoMaterial) {
                $servicoMaterial->setServico($this);
                $this->servicoMateriais->add($servicoMaterial);
            }
        } elseif ($servicoMateriais instanceof ServicoMateriaisEntity) {
            $servicoMateriais->setServico($this);
            $this->servicoMateriais->add($servicoMateriais);
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return Collection
     */
    public function getServicoMateriais(): Collection
    {
        return $this->servicoMateriais;
    }

    /**
     * Remove Servico Materiais
     *
     * @param ServicoMateriaisEntity|ServicoMateriaisEntity[] $servicoMateriais
     * @return ClinicasServicosEntity
     */
    public function removeServicoMateriais($servicoMateriais): ClinicasServicosEntity
    {
        if ($servicoMateriais instanceof Collection) {
            foreach ($servicoMateriais as $servicoMaterial) {
                $this->servicoMateriais->removeElement($servicoMaterial);
            }
        } elseif ($servicoMateriais instanceof ServicoMateriaisEntity) {
            $this->servicoMateriais->removeElement($servicoMateriais);
        }

        return $this;
    }

}

<?php

namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\ClinicasServicos;

use Application\Entity\Role;
use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\AbstractQuery;

/**
 * Class ClinicasServicosRepository
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\ClinicasServicos
 */
class ClinicasServicosRepository extends EntityRepository
{
    /**
     * Fetch All
     *
     * @param array|null $searchParam
     * @param array|null $orderBy
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|object
     */
    public function fetchAll(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('clinicasServicos');

        // Retorna apenas serviços de agendamento externo, pra quem não é GUEST.
        if (
            isset($searchParam['query']['role']) &&
            (
                $searchParam['query']['role'] === Role::ROLE_GUEST ||
                $searchParam['query']['role'] === Role::ROLE_CLIENTE
            )
        ) {
            $qb->addSelect('partial profissionalServico.{id}')
                ->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('clinicasServicos.ativo', ':ativo'))
                ->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('tabela.exibirSite', ':ativo'))
                ->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('profissional.ativo', ':ativo'))
                ->setParameter(':ativo', true);

            // Por motivos de segurança não permitir passar o parâmetro ativo para clientes e convidados
            if (isset($searchParam['query']['ativo'])) {
                unset($searchParam['query']['ativo']);
            }
        } else {
            $qb->addSelect('profissionalServico');
        }
        unset($searchParam['query']['role']);

        $qb->addSelect('partial servico.{id, titulo}')
            ->addSelect('categoria')
            ->addSelect('tabelaServicos')
            ->addSelect('tabela')
            ->addSelect('partial clinica.{id, nomeFantasia}')
            ->addSelect('servicoMateriais')
            ->addSelect('partial profissional.{id, nome, nomeConselho, numeroRegistro, horarios, ativo, foto}')
            ->addSelect('partial profissionalIntervalos.{id, tipo, diaSemanaTipoFixo, dataHoraInicio, dataHoraFim}')
            ->addSelect('partial material.{id, nomeMaterial}')
            ->addSelect('categoriaServicoClinica')

            ->leftJoin('clinicasServicos.servico', 'servico')
            ->leftJoin('servico.categoria', 'categoria')
            ->leftJoin('clinicasServicos.tabelaServicos', 'tabelaServicos')
            ->leftJoin('tabelaServicos.tabela', 'tabela')
            ->leftJoin('clinicasServicos.clinica', 'clinica')
            ->leftJoin('clinicasServicos.profissionalServico', 'profissionalServico')
            ->leftJoin('profissionalServico.profissional', 'profissional')
            ->leftJoin('profissional.profissionalIntervalos', 'profissionalIntervalos')
            ->leftJoin('clinicasServicos.servicoMateriais', 'servicoMateriais')
            ->leftJoin('servicoMateriais.material', 'material')
            ->leftJoin('clinicasServicos.categoria', 'categoriaServicoClinica');

        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            $this->mountRestrictions($qb, $searchParam['query']);
        }

        if (!is_null($orderBy)) {
            foreach ($orderBy as $key => $value) {
                $qb->addOrderBy($key, $value);
            }
        } else {
            //Ordena por id DESC se não passar o parametro de ordenação
            $qb->addOrderBy('clinicasServicos.id');
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->setHydrationMode(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    /**
     * Fetch
     *
     * @param int $id
     * @param null $clinica
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|int|mixed|object|string|null
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetch($id, $clinica = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('clinicasServicos');

        $qb->addSelect('partial servico.{id, titulo}')
            ->addSelect('categoria')
            ->addSelect('tabelaServicos')
            ->addSelect('tabela')
            ->addSelect('partial clinica.{id, nomeFantasia}')
            ->addSelect('profissionalServico')
            ->addSelect('servicoMateriais')
            ->addSelect('partial profissional.{id, nome, email, nomeConselho, numeroRegistro, cpf, genero, horarios, ativo, foto}')
            ->addSelect('profissionalIntervalos')
            ->addSelect('partial material.{id, nomeMaterial}')
            ->addSelect('categoriaServicoClinica')
            
            ->leftJoin('clinicasServicos.servico', 'servico')
            ->leftJoin('servico.categoria', 'categoria')
            ->leftJoin('clinicasServicos.tabelaServicos', 'tabelaServicos')
            ->leftJoin('tabelaServicos.tabela', 'tabela')
            ->leftJoin('clinicasServicos.clinica', 'clinica')
            ->leftJoin('clinicasServicos.profissionalServico', 'profissionalServico')
            ->leftJoin('profissionalServico.profissional', 'profissional')
            ->leftJoin('profissional.profissionalIntervalos', 'profissionalIntervalos')
            ->leftJoin('clinicasServicos.servicoMateriais', 'servicoMateriais')
            ->leftJoin('servicoMateriais.material', 'material')
            ->leftJoin('clinicasServicos.categoria', 'categoriaServicoClinica');

        $qb->where($qb->expr()->eq('clinicasServicos.id', ':id'))
            ->setParameter(':id', $id);

        if (null !== $clinica) {
            $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('clinica.id', ':clinica'))
                ->setParameter(':clinica', $clinica);
        } else {
            $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('clinicasServicos.ativo', ':ativo'))
                ->setParameter(':ativo', true);
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->getOneOrNullResult(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\ClinicasServicos;

use Application\Entity\Role;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Servicos\ServicosEntity;
use Doctrine\Common\Persistence\ObjectRepository;
use Doctrine\DBAL\Exception\ForeignKeyConstraintViolationException;
use Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use Application\Rest\AbstractResourceListener;
use Application\Entity\User;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasRepository;
use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use DoctrineModule\Stdlib\Hydrator\DoctrineObject as Hydrator;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;
use Exception;
use InvalidArgumentException;

class ClinicasServicosResource extends AbstractResourceListener
{
    /**
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return array|ApiProblem
     */
    public function create($data)
    {
        try {
            $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
            /** @var ClinicasServicosEntity $clinicaServico */
            $clinicaServico = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), new $this->entityClass());

            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            if (!$clinica = $this->getClinica()) {
                throw new InvalidArgumentException('Falha ao obter Clínica');
            }

            $clinicaServico->setClinica($clinica)
                ->setAtivo(true);

            $this->getObjectManager()->persist($clinicaServico);
            $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

            return $this->getRepository()->fetch($clinicaServico->getId(), $this->getClinica());
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
        try {
            if ($object = $this->getRepository()->fetch($id, $this->getClinica())) {
                return $object;
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Serviço não encontrado.'));
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch all or a subset of resources
     *
     * @param \Zend\Stdlib\Parameters|array $params
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetchAll($params = [])
    {
        try {
            if (!$params->offsetExists('query')) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', []);
            }

            try {
                /** @var User $user */
                if ($user = $this->getUser()) {
                    $role = $user->getRole()->first();
                }

                if ($clinica = $this->getClinica()) {
                    $clinica = $clinica->getId();
                }
            } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
                /** @var string $role */
                $role = Role::ROLE_GUEST;
            }

            // Caso o usuário tente acessar uma clínica que não lhe pertence, carregar como usuário convidado
            if (!isset($clinica) || null === $clinica) {
                $clinica = (integer)$this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica');
                $role = Role::ROLE_GUEST;
            }

            $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge(
                $params->get('query'), [
                    'role' => $role,
                    'clinicasServicos.clinica' => $clinica
                ]
            ));

            return parent::fetchAll($params);
        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Patch (partial in-place update) a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|mixed|object|ApiProblem
     */
    public function patch($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            if ($clinica = $this->getClinica()) {
                if ($clinicaServico = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id, 'clinica' => $clinica])) {
                    $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
                    /** @var ClinicasServicosEntity $clinicaServico */
                    $clinicaServico = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), $clinicaServico);

                    $this->getObjectManager()->persist($clinicaServico);
                    $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                    return $this->getRepository()->fetch($id, $clinica);
                }
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Serviço não encontrado.'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function update($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            if ($clinica = $this->getClinica()) {
                if ($clinicaServico = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id, 'clinica' => $clinica])) {
                    $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
                    /** @var ClinicasServicosEntity $clinicaServico */
                    $clinicaServico = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), $clinicaServico);

                    $this->getObjectManager()->persist($clinicaServico);
                    $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                    return $this->getRepository()->fetch($id, $clinica);
                }
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Serviço não encontrado.'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * @param mixed $id
     * @return bool|ApiProblem
     */
    public function delete($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var ClinicasServicosEntity $clinicaServico */
            if ($clinicaServico = $this->getRepository()->find($id)) {
                if ($clinica = $this->getClinica()) {
                    if ($this->getUser()->isAdmin() || $clinica->getId() === $clinicaServico->getClinica()->getId()) {
                        // Remove o serviço caso ele não seja um serviço Padrão do Sistema
                        if (null !== $clinicaServico->getServico()->getClinica()) {
                            $this->getObjectManager()->remove($clinicaServico->getServico());
                        }

                        $this->getObjectManager()->remove($clinicaServico);
                        $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                        return true;
                    }
                }
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Serviço não encontrado.'));
        } catch (ForeignKeyConstraintViolationException $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->info($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Serviço sendo usado'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get repository
     *
     * @return ClinicasServicosRepository|EntityRepository|ObjectRepository
     */
    protected function getRepository()
    {
        if (null === $this->repository) {
            $this->repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository($this->entityClass);
        }

        return $this->repository;
    }

    /**
     * Get clinica
     *
     * @return ClinicasEntity|object|null
     * @throws NonUniqueResultException
     */
    private function getClinica(): ?ClinicasEntity
    {
        if ($id = (integer)$this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
            /** @var ClinicasRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClinicasEntity::class);

            if ($this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                return $repository->find($id);
            }

            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            if ($clinica = $repository->getClinicaUser($id, $this->getUser())) {
                return $clinica;
            }
        }

        return null;
    }

    /**
     * Get user
     *
     * @return User
     */
    private function getUser()
    {
        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getAuthenticationIdentity()) {
            return $identity['user'];
        }

        throw new InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Usuário não encontrado'));
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\ClinicasServicos;

use Interop\Container\ContainerInterface;

/**
 * Class ClinicasServicosResourceFactory
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\ClinicasServicos
 */
class ClinicasServicosResourceFactory
{

     * @param ContainerInterface $services
     * @return ClinicasServicosResource
     * @throws \Psr\Container\ContainerExceptionInterface
     * @throws \Psr\Container\NotFoundExceptionInterface
     */
    public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $services)
    {
        /** @var \Zend\Log\Logger $logger */
        $logger = $services->get('log');

        /** @var \Zend\I18n\Translator\Translator $translator */
        $translator = $services->get('translator');

        /** @var \Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager $objectManager */
        $objectManager = $services->get(\Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager::class);

        $resource = new ClinicasServicosResource();
        $resource->setLogger($logger);
        $resource->setTranslator($translator);
        $resource->setObjectManager($objectManager);

        return $resource;
        
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Contato;

use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager;
use Interop\Container\ContainerInterface;
use SlmMail\Mail\Transport\HttpTransport;
use Zend\ServiceManager\Factory\FactoryInterface;

class ContatoResourceFactory implements FactoryInterface
{
    /**
     * @param ContainerInterface $services
     * @param string $requestedName
     * @param array|null $options
     * @return ContatoResource|object
     */
    public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $services, $requestedName, array $options = null)
    {
        /** @var \Zend\I18n\Translator\Translator $translator */
        $translator = $services->get('translator');

        /** @var \Zend\Log\Logger $logger */
        $logger = $services->get('log');

        /** @var \Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager $objectManager */
        $objectManager = $services->get(EntityManager::class);

        /** @var HttpTransport $transport */
        $transport = $services->get('SlmMail\Mail\Transport\SesTransport');

        $resource = new ContatoResource();

        $resource->setTranslator($translator);
        $resource->setLogger($logger);
        $resource->setObjectManager($objectManager);
        $resource->setTransport($transport);

        return $resource;
    }
}

<?php

namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Especialidades;

use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\Query;
use Doctrine\ORM\AbstractQuery;

class EspecialidadesRepository extends EntityRepository
{
    /**
     * Fetch all
     *
     * @param array|null $searchParam
     * @param array|null $orderBy
     * @return Query|object|array
     */
    public function fetchAll(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('especialidades');
        
        $qb ->where($qb->expr()->eq('especialidades.ativo',':ativo'));
        $qb ->setParameter(':ativo',true);

        $qb ->addSelect('segmentos')
            -> leftJoin('especialidades.segmento', 'segmentos');


        if (isset($searchParam['query']['termo'])) {
            $qb->andWhere(
                $qb->expr()->orX(
                    $qb->expr()->like('especialidades.nome', ':termo')
                )
            )->setParameter(':termo', '%' . $searchParam['query']['termo'] . '%');
            unset($searchParam['query']['termo']);
        }

        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            $this->mountRestrictions($qb, $searchParam['query']);
        }

        if (!is_null($orderBy)) {
            foreach ($orderBy as $key => $value) {
                $qb->addOrderBy($key, $value);
            }
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->setHydrationMode(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    /**
     * Fetch
     *
     * @param integer $id
     * @return Query|object|array
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
       $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('especialidades');

        $qb ->addSelect('segmentos')
            -> leftJoin('especialidades.segmento', 'segmentos');

       $qb ->where($qb->expr()->eq('especialidades.id',':id'));
       $qb ->setParameter(':id', $id);

       return $qb->getQuery()
           ->getOneOrNullResult(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Especialidades;

use Application\Rest\AbstractResourceListener;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\Tools\Pagination\Paginator as ORMPaginator;
use DoctrineORMModule\Paginator\Adapter\DoctrinePaginator as DoctrineAdapter;


class EspecialidadesResource extends AbstractResourceListener
{
    /**
     * Fetch all or a subset of resources
     *
     * @param  array $params
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetchAll($params = [])
    {
        try {
            if ($this->getRepository() instanceof EntityRepository) {

                $searchParam = [];
                if (isset($params->query)) {
                    $searchParam['query'] = $params->query;
                }

                $orderBy = null;
                if (isset($params->orderby)) {
                    $orderBy = $params->orderby;
                }

                if (!isset($params->isPaginated)) {
                    $params->isPaginated = 'false';
                }

                if(isset($params->isPaginated) && $params->isPaginated == 'false') {
                    return $this->getRepository()->fetchAll($searchParam, $orderBy)->getArrayResult();
                }

                $query = $this->getRepository()->fetchAll($searchParam, $orderBy);
                $adapter = new DoctrineAdapter(new ORMPaginator($query));
                return new $this->collectionClass($adapter);
            }

            return $this->getRepository()->findAll();
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }
}

}

namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\FichasAnamnese;

use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;

/**
 * Class FichasAnamneseEntity
 *
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\FichasAnamnese
 * @deprecated
 */
class FichasAnamneseEntity
{
    /**
     * @var int
     */
    protected $id;

    /**
     * @var \DateTime
     */
    protected $date;

    /**
     * @var array
     */
    protected $questoes = [];

    /**
     * @var bool
     */
    protected $ativo = true;

    /**
     * @var ClinicasEntity
     */
    protected $clinica;

    /**
     * FichasAnamneseEntity constructor.
     * @throws \Exception
     */
    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->date = new \DateTime();
    }

    /**
     * @return int
     */
    public function getId(): int
    {
        return $this->id;
    }

    /**
     * @return \DateTime
     */
    public function getDate(): \DateTime
    {
        return $this->date;
    }

    /**
     * @param \DateTime $date
     * @return FichasAnamneseEntity
     */
    public function setDate(\DateTime $date): FichasAnamneseEntity
    {
        $this->date = $date;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return array
     */
    public function getQuestoes(): array
    {
        return $this->questoes;
    }

    /**
     * @param array $questoes
     * @return FichasAnamneseEntity
     */
    public function setQuestoes(array $questoes): FichasAnamneseEntity
    {
        $this->questoes = $questoes;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isAtivo(): bool
    {
        return $this->ativo;
    }

    /**
     * @param bool $ativo
     * @return FichasAnamneseEntity
     */
    public function setAtivo(bool $ativo): FichasAnamneseEntity
    {
        $this->ativo = $ativo;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return ClinicasEntity

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\FichasAnamnese;

use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\AbstractQuery;

/**
 * Class FichasAnamneseRepository
 *
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\FichasAnamnese
 * @deprecated
 */
class FichasAnamneseRepository extends EntityRepository
{

    /**
     * Fetch all
     *
     * @param array|null $searchParam
     * @param array|null $orderBy
     * @return AbstractQuery
     */
    public function fetchAll(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('ficha');

        $qb->innerJoin('ficha.clinica', 'clinica');

        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            $this->mountRestrictions($qb, $searchParam['query']);
        }

        if (! is_null($orderBy)) {
            foreach ($orderBy as $key => $value) {
                $qb->addOrderBy($key, $value);
            }
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
                  ->setHydrationMode(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    /**
     * Fetch
     *
     * @param int $id
     * @param int|object|null $clinica
     * @return array
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetch($id, $clinica = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('ficha');

        $qb->where($qb->expr()->eq('ficha.id', ':id'))
           ->setParameter(':id', $id);

        if (null !== $clinica) {
            $qb->innerJoin('ficha.clinica', 'clinica')
               ->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('clinica.id', ':clinica'))
               ->setParameter(':clinica', $clinica);
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->getOneOrNullResult(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\FichasAnamnese;

use Application\Entity\User;
use Application\Rest\AbstractResourceListener;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasRepository;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;

/**
 * Class FichasAnamneseResource
 *
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\FichasAnamnese
 * @deprecated
 */
class FichasAnamneseResource extends AbstractResourceListener
{
    /**
     * Create
     *
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return array|ApiProblem
     */
    public function create($data)
    {
        try {
            if (! $this->getInputFilter()->has('clinica')) {
                $this->getInputFilter()->add([
                    'required' => false,
                    'validators' => [],
                    'filters' => [],
                ], 'clinica');

                $this->getInputFilter()->get('clinica')->setValue($this->getClinica());
            }

            return parent::create($data);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Delete a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @return bool|ApiProblem
     */
    public function delete($id)
    {
        try {
            if (! $this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                /** @var FichasAnamneseEntity $ficha */
                if ($ficha = $this->getRepository()->find($id)) {
                    $ficha->setAtivo(false);

                    $this->getObjectManager()->persist($ficha);
                    $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                    return true;
                }

                return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Ficha Anamnese não encontrada.'));
            }

            return parent::delete($id);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var FichasAnamneseRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getRepository();
            if ($object = $repository->fetch($id, $this->getClinica())) {
                return $object;
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Ficha Anamnese não encontrada.'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch all or a subset of resources
     *
     * @param  \Zend\Stdlib\Parameters|array $params
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetchAll($params = [])
    {
        try {
            if (!$params->offsetExists('query')) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', []);
            }

            $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge($params->get('query'), [
                'clinica.id' => $this->getClinica()
            ]));

            return parent::fetchAll($params);
        } catch (\InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Patch (partial in-place update) a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function patch($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            /** @var FichasAnamneseEntity $ficha */
            if ($ficha = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id, 'clinica' => $this->getClinica()])) {
                return parent::patch($id, $data);
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Ficha Anamnese não encontrada.'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function update($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            /** @var FichasAnamneseEntity $ficha */
            if ($ficha = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id, 'clinica' => $this->getClinica()])) {
                return parent::update($id, $data);
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Ficha Anamnese não encontrada.'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get clinica
     *
     * @return integer|ClinicasEntity
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    private function getClinica()
    {
        if ($id = (integer)$this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
            /** @var ClinicasRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClinicasEntity::class);

            if ($this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                return $repository->find($id);
            }

            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            if ($clinica = $repository->getClinicaUser($id, $this->getUser())) {
                return $clinica;
            }

             /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            else if ($clinica = $repository->getClinicaProfissional($id, $this->getUser())) {
                return $clinica;
            }
        }

        throw new InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Clínica não encontrada'));
    }

    /**
     * Get user
     *
     * @return User
     */
    private function getUser()
    {
        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getAuthenticationIdentity()) {
            return $identity['user'];
        }

        throw new \InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Usuário não encontrado'));
    }

    private function isGuest() {
        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getName() == 'guest') {
            return true;
        }
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Financeiros;

use Application\Rest\AbstractResourceListener;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;

class FinanceirosResource extends AbstractResourceListener
{

	/**
     * Patch (partial in-place update) a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function patch($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            if ($categoria = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id,'clinica' => $this->getInputFilter()->getValue('clinica')])) {
                $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
                $categoria = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), $categoria);

                $this->getObjectManager()->persist($categoria);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return $this->getRepository()->fetch($id);
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Register not found.'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function update($id,$data)
    {
        try {
        	
            $criteria = [
		        'id' => $id
		    ];
		    if ($clinica = $this->getInputFilter()->getValue('clinica')) {
		        $criteria['clinica'] = $clinica;
		    }

            if ($categoria = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy($criteria)) {
                $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
                $categoria = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), $categoria);

                $this->getObjectManager()->persist($categoria);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return $this->getRepository()->fetch($id);
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Register not found.'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Delete a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function delete($id)
    {
        try {
            if ($categoria = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id])) {
                $this->getObjectManager()->remove($categoria);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return true;
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Register not found.'));
        } catch (ForeignKeyConstraintViolationException $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->info($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Record being used by another resource.'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }
}
