<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\FinanceirosCategorias;

use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\AbstractQuery;

/**
 * Class FinanceirosCategoriasRepository
 *
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\FinanceirosCategorias
 */
class FinanceirosCategoriasRepository extends EntityRepository
{

    /**
     * Fetch all
     *
     * @param array|null $searchParam
     * @param array|null $orderBy
     * @return Query|object|array
     */
    public function fetchAll(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null)
    {

        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('financeiroscategorias');

        // Traz na consulta os dados da clinica 
        $qb->addSelect('Clinica')
           ->leftJoin('financeiroscategorias.clinica', 'Clinica');

        // Verifica se existe o parametro clinica
        if(isset($searchParam['query']) && isset($searchParam['query']['financeiroscategorias.clinica'])) {
            // Verifica se é a clinica OU se clinica é NULL
            $qb->where(
                $qb->expr()->orX(
                    $qb->expr()->eq('financeiroscategorias.clinica', $searchParam['query']['financeiroscategorias.clinica']),
                    $qb->expr()->isNull('financeiroscategorias.clinica')
                )
            );
            // Remove o parametro clinica do Array para não compara-lo novamente no mountRestrictions()
            unset($searchParam['query']['financeiroscategorias.clinica']);
        }
        else {
            // Verifica se clinica é NULL
            $qb->where(
                $qb->expr()->isNull('financeiroscategorias.clinica')
            );
        }

        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            // Compara os demais parametros passados na URL
            $this->mountRestrictions($qb, $searchParam['query']);
        }

        // Se for passado o orderBy monta a ordernação
        if (! is_null($orderBy)) {
            foreach ($orderBy as $key => $value) {
                $qb->addOrderBy($key, $value);
            }
        } else {
            // Ordena por id DESC se não passar o parametro de ordenação
            $qb->addOrderBy('financeiroscategorias.id', 'DESC');
        }

        // Retorna o resultado em Array
        return $qb->getQuery()
                  ->setHydrationMode(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    /**
     * Fetch a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetch($id) {

        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('financeiroscategorias');

        // Traz na consulta os dados da clinica 
        $qb->addSelect('Clinica')
           ->leftJoin('financeiroscategorias.clinica', 'Clinica');

        // Verifica se existe o parametro clinica
        if(isset($searchParam['query']) && isset($searchParam['query']['financeiroscategorias.clinica'])) {
            // Verifica se é a clinica OU se clinica é NULL
            $qb->where(
                $qb->expr()->orX(
                    $qb->expr()->eq('financeiroscategorias.clinica', $searchParam['query']['financeiroscategorias.clinica']),
                    $qb->expr()->isNull('financeiroscategorias.clinica')
                )
            );
        } else {
            // Verifica se clinica é NULL
            $qb->where(
                $qb->expr()->isNull('financeiroscategorias.clinica')
            );
        }

        // Verifica a categoria com o $id passado
        $qb->andWhere(
                $qb->expr()->eq('financeiroscategorias.id', ':id')
            )
            ->setParameter(':id', $id);

        // Retorna o resultado em Array
        return $qb->getQuery()
                  ->getOneOrNullResult(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\FinanceirosCategorias;

use Clinica\V1\Rest\FinanceirosCategorias\FinanceirosCategoriasEntity;
use Application\Rest\AbstractResourceListener;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\Collection;
use DoctrineModule\Stdlib\Hydrator\DoctrineObject as Hydrator;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;


class FinanceirosCategoriasResource extends AbstractResourceListener
{
	/**
     * Create
     *
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return array|ApiProblem
     */
    public function create($data)
    {
        try {
            $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
            /** @var FinanceirosCategoriasEntity $categoria */
            $categoria = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), new $this->entityClass());

            if (isset($data->clinica)) {
            	$categoria->setClinica(
	                $categoria->getClinica()
	            );
            }

            $this->getObjectManager()->persist($categoria);
            $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

            return $this->getRepository()->fetch($categoria->getId());
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Patch (partial in-place update) a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function patch($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            if ($categoria = $this->getRepository()->find($id)) {
                $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
                $categoria = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), $categoria);

                if (isset($data->clinica)) {
	            	$categoria->setClinica(
		                $categoria->getClinica()
		            );
	            }

                $this->getObjectManager()->persist($categoria);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return $this->getRepository()->fetch($id);
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Register not found.'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function update($id, $data)
    {
        try 
        {

            if ($categoria = $this->getRepository()->find($id)) 
            {
                
                $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
                $categoria = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), $categoria);

                if (isset($data->clinica) && $data->clinica) 
                {

                    $searchParam = [];
                    $searchParam['query'] = ['nome' => $data->nome,'clinica' => $data->clinica['id']];

                    $resultCategoria = $this->getRepository()->fetchAll($searchParam);

                    if (!count($resultCategoria)) 
                    {
                        $categoria->setClinica(
                            $categoria->getClinica()
                        );

                        $this->getObjectManager()->persist($categoria);
                        $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                        return $this->getRepository()->fetch($id);
                        
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        return new ApiProblem(400, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Register not found.'));
                    }
	            	
	            }
                else
                {
                    return new ApiProblem(401, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Não é possível alterar uma Categoria que a Clinica é NULL.'));
                }
                
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Register not found.'));
        } 
        catch (\Exception $e) 
        {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\GrupoMateriais;

use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\AbstractQuery;

/**
 * Class GrupoMateriaisResource
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\Materiais
 */
class GrupoMateriaisRepository extends EntityRepository
{
    public function fetchAll(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('grupoMateriais');

        $qb ->addSelect('partial clinica.{id, nomeFantasia}')
            ->innerJoin('grupoMateriais.clinica', 'clinica');

        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            if (isset($searchParam['query']['clinica'])) {
                $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->orX(
                    $qb->expr()->eq('clinicas.id', ':clinica'),
                    $qb->expr()->eq('grupoMateriais.clinica', ':clinica')
                ))->setParameter(':clinica', $searchParam['query']['clinica']);

                unset($searchParam['query']['clinica']);
            }
        }

        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            $this->mountRestrictions($qb, $searchParam['query']);
        }

        if (! is_null($orderBy)) {
            foreach ($orderBy as $key => $value) {
                $qb->addOrderBy($key, $value);
            }
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->setHydrationMode(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    public function fetch($id, $clinica = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('grupoMateriais');

        $qb ->addSelect('partial clinica.{id, nomeFantasia}')
            ->innerJoin('grupoMateriais.clinica', 'clinica');

        $qb->where($qb->expr()->eq('grupoMateriais.id',':id'))
            ->setParameter(':id', $id);

        if (null !== $clinica) {
            $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->orX(
                $qb->expr()->eq('clinica.id', ':clinica'),
                $qb->expr()->eq('grupoMateriais.clinica', ':clinica')
            ))->setParameter(':clinica', $clinica);
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->getOneOrNullResult(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\GrupoMateriais;

use Application\Rest\AbstractResourceListener;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use Application\Entity\User;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasRepository;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;
use Doctrine\DBAL\Exception\ForeignKeyConstraintViolationException;

class GrupoMateriaisResource extends AbstractResourceListener
{
    /**
     * Create
     *
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return array|ApiProblem
     */
    public function create($data)
    {
        try {
            if (! $this->getInputFilter()->has('clinica')) {
                $this->getInputFilter()->add([
                    'required' => false,
                    'validators' => [],
                    'filters' => [],
                ], 'clinica');

                $this->getInputFilter()->get('clinica')->setValue($this->getClinica());
            }

            return parent::create($data);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Delete a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @return bool|ApiProblem
     */
    public function delete($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var GrupoMateriaisEntity $grupo */
            if ($grupo = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id, 'clinica' => $this->getClinica()])) {
                $this->getObjectManager()->remove($grupo);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return true;
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Grupo não encontrado'));
        } catch (ForeignKeyConstraintViolationException $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->info($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Grupo sendo usado por um material'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var GrupoMateriaisRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getRepository();
            if ($object = $repository->fetch($id, $this->getClinica())) {
                return $object;
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Grupo não encontrado.'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch all or a subset of resources
     *
     * @param  \Zend\Stdlib\Parameters|array $params
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetchAll($params = [])
    {
        try {
            if (!$params->offsetExists('query')) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', []);
            }

            $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge($params->get('query'), [
                'clinica.id' => $this->getClinica()
            ]));

            return parent::fetchAll($params);
        } catch (\InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Patch (partial in-place update) a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function patch($id, $data)
    {
            try {
                /** @var GrupoMateriaisEntity $grupo */
                if ($grupo = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id, 'clinica' => $this->getClinica()])) {
                return parent::patch($id, $data);
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Grupo não encontrado.'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function update($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            /** @var GrupoMateriaisEntity $grupo */
            if ($grupo = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id, 'clinica' => $this->getClinica()])) {
                return parent::update($id, $data);
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Grupo não encontrado.'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get clinica
     *
     * @return integer|ClinicasEntity
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    private function getClinica()
    {
        if ($id = (integer) $this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
            if (!$this->isGuest())
                return $id;

            /** @var ClinicasRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClinicasEntity::class);

            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            if ($clinica = $repository->getClinicaUser($id, $this->getUser())) {
                return $clinica;
            }
        }

        throw new \InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Clínica não encontrada'));
    }

    /**
     * Get user
     *
     * @return User
     */
    private function getUser()
    {
        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getAuthenticationIdentity()) {
            return $identity['user'];
        }

        throw new \InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Usuário não encontrado'));
    }

    private function isGuest() {
        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getName() == 'guest') {
            return true;
        }
    }
}

namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Materiais;

use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\GrupoMateriais\GrupoMateriaisEntity;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\Collection;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\ArrayCollection;

class MateriaisEntity
{
    /**
     * @var int
     */
    protected $id;

    /**
     * @var GrupoMateriaisEntity
     */
    protected $grupo;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $nomeMaterial;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $nomeFornecedor;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $descricao;

    /**
     * @var float
     */
    protected $quantidadeMinimaEstoque;

    /**
     * @var bool
     */
    protected $materialTerceiro;

    /**
     * @var Collection
     */
    protected $servicoMateriais;

    /**
     * @var ClinicasEntity
     */
    protected $clinica;

    /**
     * @var bool
     */
    protected $ativo;

    /**
     * ServicosEntity constructor.
     */
    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->servicoMateriais = new ArrayCollection();
    }

    /**
     * @return int
     */
    public function getId(): int
    {
        return $this->id;
    }

    /**
     * @return GrupoMateriaisEntity
     */
    public function getGrupo(): GrupoMateriaisEntity
    {
        return $this->grupo;
    }

    /**
     * @param GrupoMateriaisEntity $grupo
     * @return MateriaisEntity
     */
    public function setGrupo(GrupoMateriaisEntity $grupo): MateriaisEntity
    {
        $this->grupo = $grupo;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return string
     */
    public function getNomeMaterial(): string
    {
        return $this->nomeMaterial;
    }

    /**
     * @param string $nomeMaterial
     * @return MateriaisEntity
     */
    public function setNomeMaterial(string $nomeMaterial): MateriaisEntity
    {
        $this->nomeMaterial = $nomeMaterial;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return string
     */
    public function getNomeFornecedor(): string
    {
        return $this->nomeFornecedor;
    }

    /**
     * @param string $nomeFornecedor
     * @return MateriaisEntity
     */
    public function setNomeFornecedor(string $nomeFornecedor): MateriaisEntity
    {
        $this->nomeFornecedor = $nomeFornecedor;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return string
     */
    public function getDescricao(): string
    {
        return $this->descricao;
    }

    /**
     * @param string $descricao
     * @return MateriaisEntity
     */
    public function setDescricao(string $descricao): MateriaisEntity
    {
        $this->descricao = $descricao;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return float
     */
    public function getQuantidadeMinimaEstoque(): float
    {
        return $this->quantidadeMinimaEstoque;
    }

    /**
     * @param float $quantidadeMinimaEstoque
     * @return MateriaisEntity
     */
    public function setQuantidadeMinimaEstoque(float $quantidadeMinimaEstoque): MateriaisEntity
    {
        $this->quantidadeMinimaEstoque = $quantidadeMinimaEstoque;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isMaterialTerceiro(): bool
    {
        return $this->materialTerceiro;
    }

    /**
     * @param bool $materialTerceiro
     * @return MateriaisEntity
     */
    public function setMaterialTerceiro(bool $materialTerceiro): MateriaisEntity
    {
        $this->materialTerceiro = $materialTerceiro;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return ClinicasEntity
     */
    public function getClinica(): ClinicasEntity
    {
        return $this->clinica;
    }

    /**
     * @param ClinicasEntity $clinica
     * @return MateriaisEntity
     */
    public function setClinica(ClinicasEntity $clinica): MateriaisEntity
    {
        $this->clinica = $clinica;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isAtivo(): bool
    {
        return $this->ativo;
    }

    /**
     * @param bool $ativo
     * @return MateriaisEntity
     */
    public function setAtivo(bool $ativo): MateriaisEntity
    {
        $this->ativo = $ativo;
        return $this;
    }


    /**
     * Add Sdervico Materiais
     *
     * @param $servicoMateriais
     * @return MateriaisEntity
     */
    public function addServicoMateriais($servicoMateriais) : MateriaisEntity
    {
        if ($servicoMateriais instanceof Collection) {
            foreach ($servicoMateriais as $servicoMaterial) {
                $this->servicoMateriais->add($servicoMaterial);
            }
        } elseif ($servicoMateriais instanceof MateriaisEntity) {
            $this->servicoMateriais->add($servicoMateriais);
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return Collection
     */
    public function getServicoMateriais(): Collection
    {
        return $this->servicoMateriais;
    }

    /**
     * Remove Servico Materiais
     *
     * @param $servicoMateriais
     * @return MateriaisEntity
     */
    public function removeServicoMateriais($servicoMateriais): MateriaisEntity
    {
        if ($servicoMateriais instanceof Collection) {
            foreach ($servicoMateriais as $servicoMaterial) {
                $this->servicoMateriais->removeElement($servicoMaterial);
            }
        } elseif ($servicoMateriais instanceof MateriaisEntity) {
            $this->servicoMateriais->removeElement($servicoMateriais);
        }

        return $this;
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Materiais;

use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\AbstractQuery;

/**
 * Class MateriaisRepository
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\Materiais
 */
class MateriaisRepository extends EntityRepository
{
    public function fetchAll(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('materiais');

        $qb ->addSelect('partial clinica.{id, nomeFantasia}')
            ->addSelect('grupo')

            ->innerJoin('materiais.clinica', 'clinica')
            ->innerJoin('materiais.grupo', 'grupo');

        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            if (isset($searchParam['query']['clinica'])) {
                $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->orX(
                    $qb->expr()->eq('clinicas.id', ':clinica'),
                    $qb->expr()->eq('materiais.clinica', ':clinica')
                ))->setParameter(':clinica', $searchParam['query']['clinica']);

                unset($searchParam['query']['clinica']);
            }
        }

        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            $this->mountRestrictions($qb, $searchParam['query']);
        }

        if (! is_null($orderBy)) {
            foreach ($orderBy as $key => $value) {
                $qb->addOrderBy($key, $value);
            }
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->setHydrationMode(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    public function fetch($id)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('materiais');

        $qb ->addSelect('partial clinica.{id, nomeFantasia}')
            ->addSelect('grupo')

            ->innerJoin('materiais.clinica', 'clinica')
            ->innerJoin('materiais.grupo', 'grupo');

        $qb->where($qb->expr()->eq('materiais.id',':id'))
           ->setParameter(':id', $id);

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->getOneOrNullResult(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

}

                    'filters' => [],
                ], 'clinica');

                $this->getInputFilter()->get('clinica')->setValue($this->getClinica());

            /** @var MateriaisRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getRepository();
            if ($object = $repository->fetch($id, $this->getClinica())) {
                return $object;
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Material não encontrado.'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch all or a subset of resources
     *
     * @param  \Zend\Stdlib\Parameters|array $params
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetchAll($params = [])
    {
        try {
            if (!$params->offsetExists('query')) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', []);
            }

            $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge($params->get('query'), [
                'clinica.id' => $this->getClinica()
            ]));

            return parent::fetchAll($params);
        } catch (\InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Patch (partial in-place update) a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function patch($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            /** @var MateriaisEntity $material */
            if ($material = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id, 'clinica' => $this->getClinica()])) {
                return parent::patch($id, $data);
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Material não encontrado.'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function update($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            /** @var MateriaisEntity $material */
            if ($material = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id, 'clinica' => $this->getClinica()])) {
                return parent::update($id, $data);
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Material não encontrado.'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get clinica
     *
     * @return integer|ClinicasEntity
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    private function getClinica()
    {
        if ($id = (integer) $this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
            if (! $this->isGuest())
                return $id;

            /** @var ClinicasRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClinicasEntity::class);

            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            if ($clinica = $repository->getClinicaUser($id, $this->getUser())) {
                return $clinica;
            }
        }

        throw new \InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Clínica não encontrada'));
    }

    /**
     * Get user
     *
     * @return User
     */
    private function getUser()
    {
        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getAuthenticationIdentity()) {
            return $identity['user'];
        }

        throw new \InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Usuário não encontrado'));
    }

    private function isGuest() {
        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getName() == 'guest') {
            return true;
        }
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Materiais;

use Interop\Container\ContainerInterface;

/**
 * Class MateriaisResourceFactory
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\Materiais
 */
class MateriaisResourceFactory
{
    /**
     * @param ContainerInterface $services
     * @return MateriaisResource
     * @throws \Psr\Container\ContainerExceptionInterface
     * @throws \Psr\Container\NotFoundExceptionInterface
     */
    public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $services)
    {
        /** @var \Zend\Log\Logger $logger */
        $logger = $services->get('log');

        /** @var \Zend\I18n\Translator\Translator $translator */
        $translator = $services->get('translator');

        /** @var \Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager $objectManager */
        $objectManager = $services->get(\Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager::class);

        $resource = new MateriaisResource();
        $resource->setLogger($logger);
        $resource->setTranslator($translator);
        $resource->setObjectManager($objectManager);

        return $resource;
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Orcamentos;

use Cliente\V1\Rest\Clientes\ClientesEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\OrcamentosServicos\OrcamentosServicosEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Profissionais\ProfissionaisEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\TabelaPrecos\TabelaPrecosEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Vendas\VendasEntity;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\ArrayCollection;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\Collection;

class OrcamentosEntity
{

    /**
     * @var int
     */
    protected $id;

    /**
     * @var ClinicasEntity
     */
    protected $clinica; //Clinica em que se vai realizar o orçamento

    /**
     * @var ClientesEntity
     */
    protected $cliente;

    /**
     * @var TabelaPrecosEntity
     */
    protected $tabelaPreco;

    /**
     * @var \DateTime
     */
    protected $dataHora;

    /**
     * @var \DateTime
     */
    protected $dataValidade;

    /**
     * @var bool
     */
    protected $temConvenio = false;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $convenios; //Essa variável virá do cliente

    /**
     * @var VendasEntity
     */
    protected $venda;

    /**
     * @var OrcamentosServicosEntity
     */
    protected $orcamentosServicos; //Servicos que serao realizados e seus valores

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $tipoAcrescimoDesconto;
    
    /**
     * @var float
     */
    protected $acrescimo;

    /**
     * @var float
     */
    protected $desconto;

    /**
     * @var float
     */
    protected $subtotal;

    /**
     * @var float
     */
    protected $total;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $formaPagamento;

    /**
     * @var int
     */
    protected $condicaoPagamento;

    /**
     * @var array
     */
    protected $detalhesCondicaoPagamento;

    /**
     * @var bool
     */
    protected $gerouVenda;

    /**
     * @var bool
     */
    protected $ativo;

    /**
     * @var ProfissionaisEntity
     */

    /**
     * OrcamentosEntity constuctor.
     */
    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->orcamentosServicos = new ArrayCollection();
    }

    /**
     * @return int
     */
    public function getId(): int
    {
        return $this->id;
    }

    /**
     * @return ClinicasEntity
     */
    public function getClinica(): ClinicasEntity
    {
        return $this->clinica;
    }

    /**
     * @param ClinicasEntity $clinica
     * @return OrcamentosEntity
     */
    public function setClinica(ClinicasEntity $clinica): OrcamentosEntity
    {
        $this->clinica = $clinica;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return ClientesEntity
     */
    public function getCliente(): ClientesEntity
    {
        return $this->cliente;
    }

    /**
     * @param ClientesEntity $cliente
     * @return OrcamentosEntity
     */
    public function setCliente(ClientesEntity $cliente): OrcamentosEntity
    {
        $this->cliente = $cliente;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return TabelaPrecosEntity
     */
    public function getTabelaPreco(): TabelaPrecosEntity
    {
        return $this->tabelaPreco;
    }

    /**
     * @param TabelaPrecosEntity $tabelaPreco
     * @return OrcamentosEntity
     */
    public function setTabelaPreco(TabelaPrecosEntity $tabelaPreco): OrcamentosEntity
    {
        $this->tabelaPreco = $tabelaPreco;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return \DateTime
     */
    public function getDataHora(): \DateTime
    {
        return $this->dataHora;
    }

    /**
     * @param \DateTime $dataHora
     * @return OrcamentosEntity
     */
    public function setDataHora(\DateTime $dataHora = null): OrcamentosEntity
    {
        $this->dataHora = $dataHora;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return \DateTime
     */
    public function getDataValidade(): \DateTime
    {
        return $this->dataValidade;
    }

    /**
     * @param \DateTime $dataValidade
     * @return OrcamentosEntity
     */
    public function setDataValidade(\DateTime $dataValidade = null): OrcamentosEntity
    {
        $this->dataValidade = $dataValidade;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isTemConvenio(): bool
    {
        return $this->temConvenio;
    }

    /**
     * @param bool $temConvenio
     * @return OrcamentosEntity
     */
    public function setTemConvenio(bool $temConvenio): OrcamentosEntity
    {
        $this->temConvenio = $temConvenio;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return string|null
     */
    public function getConvenios(): ?string
    {
        return $this->convenios;
    }

    /**
     * @param string|null $convenios
     * @return OrcamentosEntity
     */
    public function setConvenios(string $convenios = null): OrcamentosEntity
    {
        if ($convenios && $convenios !== '') {
            $this->setTemConvenio(true);
        }

        $this->convenios = $convenios;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return VendasEntity
     */
    public function getVenda(): VendasEntity
    {
        return $this->venda;
    }

    /**
     * @param VendasEntity $venda
     * @return OrcamentosEntity
     */
    public function setVenda(VendasEntity $venda = null): OrcamentosEntity
    {
        $this->venda = $venda;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Add orcamentosServicos
     *
     * @param OrcamentosServicosEntity|Collection $orcamentosServicos
     * @return OrcamentosEntity
     */
    public function addOrcamentosServicos($orcamentosServicos): OrcamentosEntity
    {
        if ($orcamentosServicos instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var OrcamentosServicosEntity $orcamentoServicos */
            foreach ($orcamentosServicos as $orcamentoServicos) {
                $this->orcamentosServicos->add($orcamentoServicos);
            }
        } elseif ($orcamentosServicos instanceof OrcamentosServicosEntity) {
            $this->orcamentosServicos->add($orcamentosServicos);
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get orcamentosServicos
     *
     * @return Collection
     */
    public function getOrcamentosServicos(): Collection
    {
        return $this->orcamentosServicos;
    }

    /**
     * Remove orcamentosServicos
     *
     * @param OrcamentosServicosEntity|Collection $orcamentosServicos
     * @return OrcamentosEntity
     */
    public function removeOrcamentosServicos($orcamentosServicos): OrcamentosEntity
    {
        if ($orcamentosServicos instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var OrcamentosServicosEntity $orcamentoServicos */
            foreach ($orcamentosServicos as $orcamentoServicos) {
                $this->orcamentosServicos->removeElement($orcamentoServicos);
            }
        } elseif ($orcamentosServicos instanceof OrcamentosServicosEntity) {
            $this->orcamentosServicos->removeElement($orcamentosServicos);
        } else {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Object must be an instance of Collection or OrcamentoServicos.');
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Set orcamentosServicos
     *
     * @param Collection $orcamentosServicos
     * @return OrcamentosEntity
     */
    public function setOrcamentosServicos(Collection $orcamentosServicos): OrcamentosEntity
    {
        $this->orcamentosServicos = $orcamentosServicos;

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return string
     */
    public function getTipoAcrescimoDesconto(): string
    {
        return $this->tipoAcrescimoDesconto;
    }

    /**
     * @param string $tipoAcrescimoDesconto
     * @return OrcamentosEntity
     */
    public function setTipoAcrescimoDesconto(string $tipoAcrescimoDesconto): OrcamentosEntity
    {
        $this->tipoAcrescimoDesconto = $tipoAcrescimoDesconto;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return float
     */
    public function getAcrescimo(): float
    {
        return $this->acrescimo;
    }

    /**
     * @param float $acrescimo
     * @return OrcamentosEntity
     */
    public function setAcrescimo(float $acrescimo = 0.00): OrcamentosEntity
    {
        $this->acrescimo = $acrescimo;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return float
     */
    public function getDesconto(): float
    {
        return $this->desconto;
    }

    /**
     * @param float $desconto
     * @return OrcamentosEntity
     */
    public function setDesconto(float $desconto = 0.00): OrcamentosEntity
    {
        $this->desconto = $desconto;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return float
     */
    public function getSubtotal(): float
    {
        return $this->subtotal;
    }

    /**
     * @param float $subtotal
     * @return OrcamentosEntity
     */
    public function setSubtotal(float $subtotal): OrcamentosEntity
    {
        $this->subtotal = $subtotal;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return float
     */
    public function getTotal(): float
    {
        return $this->total;
    }

    /**
     * @param float $total
     * @return OrcamentosEntity
     */
    public function setTotal(float $total): OrcamentosEntity
    {
        $this->total = $total;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get formaPagamento
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getFormaPagamento(): string
    {
        return $this->formaPagamento;
    }

    /**
     * Set formaPagamento
     *
     * @param string $formaPagamento
     * @return OrcamentosEntity
     */
    public function setFormaPagamento(string $formaPagamento): OrcamentosEntity
    {
        $this->formaPagamento = $formaPagamento;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return int
     */
    public function getCondicaoPagamento(): int
    {
        return $this->condicaoPagamento;
    }

    /**
     * @param int $condicaoPagamento
     * @return OrcamentosEntity
     */
    public function setCondicaoPagamento(int $condicaoPagamento): OrcamentosEntity
    {
        $this->condicaoPagamento = $condicaoPagamento;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get Detalhes da Condição de pagamento
     *
     * @return array
     */

    /**

    /**

    }

    /**
     * @param bool $gerouVenda

     */

        $this->gerouVenda = $gerouVenda;
        return $this;
    }

    /**

<?php

namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Orcamentos;

use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use Cliente\V1\Rest\Clientes\ClientesEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Doctrine\ORM\AbstractQuery;
use Doctrine\ORM\Query\Expr\Join;
use DateTime;

class OrcamentosRepository extends EntityRepository
{
    /**
     * Fetch all
     *
     * @param array|null $searchParam
     * @param array|null $orderBy
     * @return Query|object|array
     */
    public function fetchAll(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('orcamentos');

        //Traz na consulta os dados da clinica
        $qb ->addSelect('clinica')
            ->addSelect('endereco')
            ->addSelect('telefones')
            ->addSelect('partial cliente.{id,nome,email,dataNascimento,genero,cpf,convenios,nomeDependentes,origem,ativo}')
            ->addSelect('telefonesCliente')
            ->addSelect('venda')
            ->addSelect('agendas')
            ->addSelect('pagamentos')
            ->addSelect('profissional')
            ->addSelect('tabelaPreco')
            ->addSelect('orcamentosServicos')
            ->addSelect('servico')
            ->addSelect('partial tabelaServico.{id, tipoPreco}')
            ->addSelect('servicoDetalhe')
            ->addSelect('categoria')
            ->addSelect('telefonesCliente')
            ->addSelect('profissionalAvaliador')

            ->leftJoin('orcamentos.clinica', 'clinica')
            ->leftJoin('clinica.endereco', 'endereco')
            ->leftJoin('clinica.telefones', 'telefones')
            ->leftJoin('orcamentos.cliente', 'cliente')
            ->leftJoin('cliente.telefones', 'telefonesCliente')
            ->leftJoin('orcamentos.venda', 'venda')
            ->leftJoin('venda.agendas', 'agendas', Join::WITH, $qb->expr()->neq('agendas.status', ':status'))
            ->leftJoin('venda.pagamentos', 'pagamentos')
            ->leftJoin('agendas.profissional', 'profissional')
            ->leftJoin('orcamentos.tabelaPreco', 'tabelaPreco')
            ->leftJoin('orcamentos.orcamentosServicos', 'orcamentosServicos')
            ->leftJoin('orcamentosServicos.servico', 'servico')
            ->leftJoin('orcamentosServicos.tabelaServico', 'tabelaServico')
            ->leftJoin('servico.servico', 'servicoDetalhe')
            ->leftJoin('servicoDetalhe.categoria', 'categoria')
            ->leftJoin('orcamentos.profissionalAvaliador', 'profissionalAvaliador')
            ->setParameter(':status', 'Cancelado');

        // Verifica se existe o parametro clinica
        if (isset($searchParam['query']) && isset($searchParam['query']['orcamentos.clinica'])) {
            // Verifica se é a clinica OU se clinica é NULL
            $qb->where(
                $qb->expr()->eq('orcamentos.clinica', $searchParam['query']['orcamentos.clinica'])
            );
        } 

        // Remove o parametro clinica do Array para não compara-lo novamente no mountRestrictions()
        unset($searchParam['query']['orcamentos.clinica']);

        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            // Compara os demais parametros passados na URL
            $this->mountRestrictions($qb, $searchParam['query']);
        }

        // Se for passado o orderBy monta a ordernação
        if (! is_null($orderBy)) {
            foreach ($orderBy as $key => $value) {
                $qb->addOrderBy($key, $value);
            }
        }  else {
            // Ordena por id DESC se não passar o parametro de ordenação
            $qb->addOrderBy('orcamentos.id', 'DESC');
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->setHydrationMode(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    /**
     * Fetch
     *
     * @param integer $id
     * @return Query|object|array
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetch($id, $clinica = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('orcamentos');

        $qb ->addSelect('clinica')
            ->addSelect('endereco')
            ->addSelect('telefones')
            ->addSelect('partial cliente.{id,nome,email,dataNascimento,genero,cpf,convenios,nomeDependentes,origem,ativo}')
            ->addSelect('telefonesCliente')
            ->addSelect('venda')
            ->addSelect('agendas')
            ->addSelect('pagamentos')
            ->addSelect('profissional')
            ->addSelect('tabelaPreco')
            ->addSelect('orcamentosServicos')
            ->addSelect('servico')
            ->addSelect('partial tabelaServico.{id, tipoPreco}')
            ->addSelect('servicoDetalhe')
            ->addSelect('profissionalAvaliador')

            ->leftJoin('orcamentos.clinica', 'clinica')
            ->leftJoin('clinica.endereco', 'endereco')
            ->leftJoin('clinica.telefones', 'telefones')
            ->leftJoin('orcamentos.cliente', 'cliente')
            ->leftJoin('cliente.telefones', 'telefonesCliente')
            ->leftJoin('orcamentos.venda', 'venda')
            ->leftJoin('venda.agendas', 'agendas', Join::WITH, $qb->expr()->neq('agendas.status', ':status'))
            ->leftJoin('venda.pagamentos', 'pagamentos')
            ->leftJoin('agendas.profissional', 'profissional')
            ->leftJoin('orcamentos.tabelaPreco', 'tabelaPreco')
            ->leftJoin('orcamentos.orcamentosServicos', 'orcamentosServicos')
            ->leftJoin('orcamentosServicos.servico', 'servico')
            ->leftJoin('orcamentosServicos.tabelaServico', 'tabelaServico')
            ->leftJoin('servico.servico', 'servicoDetalhe')
            ->leftJoin('orcamentos.profissionalAvaliador', 'profissionalAvaliador')
            ->setParameter(':status', 'Cancelado');

        $qb->where($qb->expr()->eq('orcamentos.id', ':id'))
            ->setParameter(':id', $id);

        if (null !== $clinica) {
            $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->orX(
                $qb->expr()->eq('clinica.id', ':clinica'),
                $qb->expr()->eq('orcamentos.clinica', ':clinica')
            ))->setParameter(':clinica', $clinica);
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->getOneOrNullResult(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    /**
     * Get cliente historico
     *
     * @param DateTime $inicio
     * @param DateTime $fim
     * @param ClientesEntity $cliente
     * @param ClinicasEntity|null $clinica
     * @return array
     */
    public function getClienteHistorico(DateTime $inicio, DateTime $fim, ClientesEntity $cliente, ClinicasEntity $clinica = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('orcamento');

        $qb->select('venda.id AS idVenda')
            ->addSelect('orcamentosServicos.preco, orcamentosServicos.observacao')
            ->addSelect('profissional.nome AS nome_profissional')
            ->addSelect('agendas.dataHora AS data_hora, agendas.status')
            ->addSelect('servico.titulo AS servico_titulo')
            ->innerJoin('orcamento.orcamentosServicos', 'orcamentosServicos')
            ->innerJoin('orcamentosServicos.servico', 'clinicasServicos')
            ->innerJoin('clinicasServicos.servico', 'servico')
            ->leftJoin('orcamentosServicos.profissional', 'profissional')
            ->innerJoin('orcamento.venda', 'venda')
            ->innerJoin('venda.agendas', 'agendas')
            ->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('orcamento.cliente', ':cliente'))
            ->andWhere($qb->expr()->between('agendas.dataHora', ':inicio', ':fim'))
            ->setParameter(':cliente', $cliente)
            ->setParameter(':inicio', $inicio)
            ->setParameter(':fim', $fim);

        if (null !== $clinica) {
            $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('orcamento.clinica', ':clinica'))
                ->setParameter(':clinica', $clinica);
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()->getScalarResult();
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Orcamentos;

use Application\Rest\AbstractResourceListener;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use Application\Entity\User;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasRepository;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;
use DoctrineModule\Stdlib\Hydrator\DoctrineObject as Hydrator;

/**
 * Class OrcamentosResource
 *
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\Orcamentos
 */
class OrcamentosResource extends AbstractResourceListener
{
    /**
     * Create
     *
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return array|ApiProblem
     */
    public function create($data)
    {
        try {
            $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
            /** @var OrcamentosEntity $orcamento */
            $orcamento = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), new $this->entityClass());

            if ($this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
                $clinica = $this->getObjectManager()->find(ClinicasEntity::class, $this->getClinica());
                if ($clinica != null) {
                    $orcamento->setClinica($clinica);
                    $validade = $orcamento->getClinica()->getValidadeOrcamento();
                    $orcamento->setDataValidade($this->getValidadeOrcamento($validade));
                }
            }
            $orcamento->setAtivo(true);
            $this->objectManager->persist($orcamento);

            $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

            return $this->getRepository()->fetch($orcamento->getId());
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Patch (partial in-place update) a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function patch($id, $data)
    {
        try {

            return parent::patch($id, $data);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function update($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            return parent::update($id, $data);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var OrcamentosRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getRepository();
            if ($object = $repository->fetch($id, $this->getClinica())) {
                return $object;
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Orçamento não encontrado.'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch all or a subset of resources
     *
     * @param  \Zend\Stdlib\Parameters|array $params
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetchAll($params = [])
    {
        try {
            if (!$params->offsetExists('query')) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', []);
            }

            $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge($params->get('query'), [
                'clinica.id' => $this->getClinica()
            ]));

            return parent::fetchAll($params);
        } catch (\InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    private function getValidadeOrcamento($validade)
    {
        $now = date("Y-m-d 23:59:59"); // <-- pega data e hora atual
        $dateFinal = date('Y-m-d 23:59:59', strtotime($now. ' + ' .$validade.' days')); // <-- converte validade do orçamento da clinica e soma no date atual, com horario padrao 23:59
        $dateFinal = new \DateTime($dateFinal); //<-- Converte o retorno para o tipo DateTime

        return $dateFinal;
    }

    /**
     * Get clinica
     *
     * @return integer|ClinicasEntity
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    private function getClinica()
    {
        if ($id = (integer) $this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
            if (!$this->isGuest())
                return $id;

            /** @var ClinicasRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClinicasEntity::class);

            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            if ($clinica = $repository->getClinicaUser($id, $this->getUser())) {
                return $clinica;
            }
        }

        throw new \InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Clínica não encontrada'));
    }

    /**
     * Get user
     *
     * @return User
     */
    private function getUser()
    {
        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getAuthenticationIdentity()) {
            return $identity['user'];
        }

        throw new \InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Usuário não encontrado'));
    }

    private function isGuest() {
        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getName() == 'guest') {
            return true;
        }
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Orcamentos;

use Interop\Container\ContainerInterface;

/**
 * Class OrcamentosResourceFactory
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\Orcamentos
 */
class OrcamentosResourceFactory
{
    /**
     * @param ContainerInterface $services
     * @return OrcamentosResource
     * @throws \Psr\Container\ContainerExceptionInterface
     * @throws \Psr\Container\NotFoundExceptionInterface
     */
    public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $services)
    {
        /** @var \Zend\Log\Logger $logger */
        $logger = $services->get('log');

        /** @var \Zend\I18n\Translator\Translator $translator */
        $translator = $services->get('translator');

        /** @var \Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager $objectManager */
        $objectManager = $services->get(\Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager::class);

        $resource = new OrcamentosResource();
        $resource->setLogger($logger);
        $resource->setTranslator($translator);
        $resource->setObjectManager($objectManager);

        return $resource;
    }
}

<?php

namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\OrcamentosServicos;

use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\AbstractQuery;
use Doctrine\ORM\Query\Expr\Join;

class OrcamentosServicosRepository extends EntityRepository
{
    /**
    * Fetch all
    *
    * @param array|null $searchParam
    * @param array|null $orderBy
    * @return Query|object|array
    */
    public function fetchAll(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('orcamentosServicos');

        $qb ->addSelect('servico')
            ->addSelect('servicoServ')
            ->addSelect('partial clinica.{id, nomeFantasia, ativo}')
            ->addSelect('orcamento')
            ->addSelect('partial cliente.{id,nome,email,dataNascimento,genero,cpf,convenios,nomeDependentes,origem, ativo}')
            ->addSelect('venda')
            ->addSelect('agendas')
            ->addSelect('servicos')
            ->addSelect('orcamentoServicoAgenda')
            ->addSelect('servicoDetalhes')
            ->addSelect('partial servicoGlobal.{id, titulo}')
            ->addSelect('partial profissional .{id, nome, email, nomeConselho, numeroRegistro, cpf, genero, horarios, ativo}')
            ->addSelect('profissionalServicos')
            ->addSelect('clinicaServico')
            ->addSelect('servicoProf')
            ->addSelect('agendasProf')

            ->leftJoin('orcamentosServicos.servico','servico')
            ->leftJoin('servico.servico','servicoServ')
            ->leftJoin('servico.clinica','clinica')
            ->leftJoin('orcamentosServicos.orcamento','orcamento')
            ->leftJoin('orcamento.cliente','cliente')
            ->leftJoin('orcamento.venda','venda')
            ->leftJoin('venda.agendas', 'agendas', Join::WITH, $qb->expr()->neq('agendas.status', ':status'))
            ->leftJoin('agendas.servicos', 'servicos')
            ->leftJoin('servicos.orcamentoServico', 'orcamentoServicoAgenda')
            ->leftJoin('servicos.servico', 'servicoDetalhes')
            ->leftJoin('servicoDetalhes.servico', 'servicoGlobal')
            ->leftJoin('orcamentosServicos.profissional','profissional')
            ->leftJoin('profissional.profissionalServicos', 'profissionalServicos')
            ->leftJoin('profissionalServicos.clinicaServico', 'clinicaServico')
            ->leftJoin('clinicaServico.servico', 'servicoProf')
            ->leftJoin('profissional.agendas', 'agendasProf')
            ->setParameter(':status', 'Cancelado');

        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            // Compara os demais parametros passados na URL
            $this->mountRestrictions($qb, $searchParam['query']);
        }

        // Se for passado o orderBy monta a ordernação
        if (! is_null($orderBy)) {
            foreach ($orderBy as $key => $value) {
                $qb->addOrderBy($key, $value);
            }
        }  else {
            // Ordena por id DESC se não passar o parametro de ordenação
            $qb->addOrderBy('orcamentosServicos.id', 'DESC');
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
        ->setHydrationMode(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    /**
    * Fetch
    *
    * @param integer $id
    * @return Query|object|array
    * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
    */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('orcamentosServicos');

        $qb ->addSelect('servico')
            ->addSelect('servicoServ')
            ->addSelect('partial clinica .{id, nomeFantasia, ativo}')
            ->addSelect('orcamento')
            ->addSelect('partial cliente.{id,nome,email,dataNascimento,genero,cpf,convenios,nomeDependentes,origem, ativo}')
            ->addSelect('venda')
            ->addSelect('agendas')
            ->addSelect('servicos')
            ->addSelect('orcamentoServicoAgenda')
            ->addSelect('servicoDetalhes')
            ->addSelect('partial servicoGlobal.{id, titulo}')
            ->addSelect('partial profissional .{id, nome, email, nomeConselho, numeroRegistro, cpf, genero, horarios, ativo}')
            ->addSelect('profissionalServicos')
            ->addSelect('clinicaServico')
            ->addSelect('servicoProf')
            ->addSelect('agendasProf')

            ->leftJoin('orcamentosServicos.servico','servico')
            ->leftJoin('servico.servico','servicoServ')
            ->leftJoin('servico.clinica','clinica')
            ->leftJoin('orcamentosServicos.orcamento','orcamento')
            ->leftJoin('orcamento.cliente','cliente')
            ->leftJoin('orcamento.venda','venda')
            ->leftJoin('venda.agendas', 'agendas', Join::WITH, $qb->expr()->neq('agendas.status', ':status'))
            ->leftJoin('agendas.servicos', 'servicos')
            ->leftJoin('servicos.orcamentoServico', 'orcamentoServicoAgenda')
            ->leftJoin('servicos.servico', 'servicoDetalhes')
            ->leftJoin('servicoDetalhes.servico', 'servicoGlobal')
            ->leftJoin('orcamentosServicos.profissional','profissional')
            ->leftJoin('profissional.profissionalServicos', 'profissionalServicos')
            ->leftJoin('profissionalServicos.clinicaServico', 'clinicaServico')
            ->leftJoin('clinicaServico.servico', 'servicoProf')
            ->leftJoin('profissional.agendas', 'agendasProf')
            ->setParameter(':status', 'Cancelado');

        $qb->where($qb->expr()->eq('orcamentosServicos.id', ':id'))
        ->setParameter(':id', $id);

        return $qb->getQuery()
        ->getOneOrNullResult(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\OrcamentosServicos;

use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use Application\Rest\AbstractResourceListener;
use Application\Entity\User;
use DoctrineModule\Stdlib\Hydrator\DoctrineObject as Hydrator;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;

class OrcamentosServicosResource extends AbstractResourceListener
{

    /**
     * Update a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function update($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            if (! $this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                /** @var OrcamentosServicosEntity $servico */
                if ($orcamentoServico = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id])) {
                    return true;
                }
                return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Serviço não encontrado.'));

            }
            return parent::update($id, $data);

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var OrcamentosServicosRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getRepository();
            if ($object = $repository->fetch($id)) {
                return $object;
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Orçamento não encontrado.'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch all or a subset of resources
     *
     * @param  \Zend\Stdlib\Parameters|array $params
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetchAll($params = [])
    {
        try {
            if (!$params->offsetExists('query')) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', []);
            }

            $params->offsetSet('query', $params->get('query'));

            return parent::fetchAll($params);
        } catch (\InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get user
     *
     * @return User
     */
    private function getUser()
    {
        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getAuthenticationIdentity()) {
            return $identity['user'];
        }

        throw new \InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Usuário não encontrado'));
    }

}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Profissionais;

use Application\Entity\User;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\ProfissionalServicos\ProfissionalServicosEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\ProfissionalIntervalos\ProfissionalIntervalosEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Agendas\AgendasEntity;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\ArrayCollection;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\Collection;
use Telefone\Entity\Telefone;

class ProfissionaisEntity
{
    const TIPOCOMISSAO_FIXA = 'Fixa';
    const TIPOCOMISSAO_PERCENTUAL = 'Percentual';

    const GENERO_FEMININO = 'Feminino';
    const GENERO_MASCULINO = 'Masculino';
    const GENERO_OUTRO = 'Outro ou não informado';

    const TIPOVINCULO_CLT = 'CLT';
    const TIPOVINCULO_PJ = 'Contrato PJ';
    const TIPOVINCULO_TERCEIRIZADO = 'Terceirizado';
    const TIPOVINCULO_OUTROS = 'Outros';

    /**
     * @var integer
     */
    protected $id;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $nome;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $email;

    /**
     * @var \DateTime
     */
    protected $dataNascimento;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $cpf;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $genero;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $tipoVinculo;

    /**
     * @var bool
     */
    protected $ativo = true;

    /**
     * @var User
     */
    protected $user;

    /**
     * @var Collection
     */
    protected $telefones;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $nomeConselho;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $numeroRegistro;

    /**
     * @var array
     */
    protected $foto;

    /**
     * @var array
     */
    protected $oldFoto;

    /**
     * @var array
     */
    protected $horarios;

    /**
     * @var ClinicasEntity
     */
    protected $clinicas;

    /**
     * @var ClinicasEntity
     */
    protected $clinica;

    /**
     * @var ProfissionalServicosEntity
     */
    protected $profissionalServicos;

    /**
     * @var ProfissionalIntervalosEntity
     */
    protected $profissionalIntervalos;

    /**
     * @var AgendasEntity
     */
    protected $agendas;

    /**
     * ProfissionaisEntity constructor.
     */
    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->telefones = new ArrayCollection();
        $this->clinicas = new ArrayCollection();
        $this->profissionalServicos = new ArrayCollection();
        $this->profissionalIntervalos = new ArrayCollection();
        $this->agendas = new ArrayCollection();
    }

    /**
     * Get id
     *
     * @return int
     */
    public function getId(): int
    {
        return $this->id;
    }

    /**
     * Get nome
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getNome(): string
    {
        return $this->nome;
    }

    /**
     * Set nome
     *
     * @param string $nome
     * @return ProfissionaisEntity
     */
    public function setNome(string $nome): ProfissionaisEntity
    {
        $this->nome = $nome;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get email
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getEmail(): string
    {
        return $this->email;
    }

    /**
     * Set email
     *
     * @param string $email
     * @return ProfissionaisEntity
     */
    public function setEmail(string $email): ProfissionaisEntity
    {
        $this->email = $email;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return \DateTime|null
     */
    public function getDataNascimento(): ?\DateTime
    {
        return $this->dataNascimento;
    }

    /**
     * Set data nascimento
     *
     * @param \DateTime|null $dataNascimento
     * @return ProfissionaisEntity
     */
    public function setDataNascimento(\DateTime $dataNascimento = null): ProfissionaisEntity
    {
        $this->dataNascimento = $dataNascimento;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get cpf
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getCpf(): string
    {
        return $this->cpf;
    }

    /**
     * Set cpf
     *
     * @param string|null $cpf
     * @return ProfissionaisEntity
     */
    public function setCpf(string $cpf = null): ProfissionaisEntity
    {

     * @return ProfissionaisEntity
     */
    public function setGenero(string $genero): ProfissionaisEntity
    {

        if (!in_array($genero, array(self::GENERO_FEMININO, self::GENERO_MASCULINO, self::GENERO_OUTRO))) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException("Gênero inválido");
        }
        $this->genero = $genero;
        return $this;

    {

        if (!in_array($tipoVinculo, array(self::TIPOVINCULO_CLT, self::TIPOVINCULO_PJ, self::TIPOVINCULO_TERCEIRIZADO, self::TIPOVINCULO_OUTROS))) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException("Tipo Vínculo inválido");
