<?php

namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Profissionais;

use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\AbstractQuery;

/**
 * Class ProfissionaisRepository
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\Profissionais
 */
class ProfissionaisRepository extends EntityRepository
{
    /**
     * Fetch All
     *
     * @param array|null $searchParam
     * @param array|null $orderBy
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|object
     */
    public function fetchAll(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('profissionais');

        // Verifica se existe o parametro clinica
        if(isset($searchParam['query']) && isset($searchParam['query']['profissionais.clinica'])) {
          //foreach para percorrer o array contendo as clinicas
          foreach ( $searchParam['query']['profissionais.clinica'] as $clinicasDoProfissional) {
            //Filtra onde pelas clinicas os profissionais
            $qb->orWhere(
              $qb->expr()->eq('clinicas.id', $clinicasDoProfissional)   
            ); 
          }
        } else if(isset($searchParam['query']) && isset($searchParam['query']['profissionais.id'])) {
            $qb->andWhere(
              $qb->expr()->eq('profissionais.id', $searchParam['query']['profissionais.id'])
            );
        }
        // Remove o parametro clinica do Array para não compara-lo novamente no mountRestrictions()
        unset($searchParam['query']['profissionais.clinica']);

        //Traz na consulta os dados das tabelas relacionadas
        $qb ->select('partial profissionais.{id, nome, email, dataNascimento, cpf, genero, tipoVinculo, ativo, nomeConselho, numeroRegistro, horarios, foto}')
            ->addSelect('partial user.{id, username}')
            ->addSelect('roles')
            ->addSelect('telefones')
            ->addSelect('partial clinicas.{id, nomeFantasia}')
            ->addSelect('profissionalServicos')
            ->addSelect('clinicaServico')
            ->addSelect('partial servico.{id, titulo}')
            ->addSelect('profissionalIntervalos')
            ->addSelect('agendas')
            ->addSelect('venda')
            ->addSelect('partial orcamento.{id, dataHora, dataValidade, gerouVenda, ativo}')
            ->addSelect('pagamentos')
            ->addSelect('orcamentosServicos')
            ->addSelect('servicoOrc')
            ->addSelect('partial servicoDetalhe.{id, titulo}')

            ->innerJoin('profissionais.user', 'user')
            ->innerJoin('user.roles', 'roles')
            ->leftJoin('profissionais.telefones', 'telefones')
            ->leftJoin('profissionais.clinicas', 'clinicas')
            ->leftJoin('profissionais.profissionalServicos', 'profissionalServicos')
            ->leftJoin('profissionalServicos.clinicaServico', 'clinicaServico')
            ->leftJoin('clinicaServico.servico', 'servico')
            ->leftJoin('profissionais.profissionalIntervalos', 'profissionalIntervalos')
            ->leftJoin('profissionais.agendas', 'agendas')
            ->leftJoin('agendas.venda', 'venda')
            ->leftJoin('venda.orcamento', 'orcamento')
            ->leftJoin('venda.pagamentos', 'pagamentos')
            ->leftJoin('orcamento.orcamentosServicos', 'orcamentosServicos')
            ->leftJoin('orcamentosServicos.servico', 'servicoOrc')
            ->leftJoin('servicoOrc.servico', 'servicoDetalhe')
            ;

        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            $this->mountRestrictions($qb, $searchParam['query']);
        }

        if (! is_null($orderBy)) {
            foreach ($orderBy as $key => $value) {
                $qb->addOrderBy($key, $value    );
            }
        } else {
            // Ordena por id DESC se não passar o parametro de ordenação
            $qb->addOrderBy('profissionais.id', 'DESC');
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->setHydrationMode(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    /**
     * Fetch
     *
     * @param int $id
     * @param null $clinica
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|mixed|object
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetch($id, $clinica = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('profissionais');

        $qb ->select('partial profissionais.{id, nome, email, dataNascimento, cpf, genero, tipoVinculo, ativo, nomeConselho, numeroRegistro, horarios, foto}')
            ->addSelect('partial user.{id, username}')
            ->addSelect('roles')
            ->addSelect('telefones')
            ->addSelect('partial clinicas.{id, nomeFantasia}')
            ->addSelect('profissionalServicos')
            ->addSelect('clinicaServico')
            ->addSelect('partial servico.{id, titulo}')
            ->addSelect('profissionalIntervalos')
            ->addSelect('agendas')
            ->addSelect('venda')
            ->addSelect('partial orcamento.{id, dataHora, dataValidade, gerouVenda, ativo}')
            ->addSelect('pagamentos')
            ->addSelect('orcamentosServicos')
            ->addSelect('servicoOrc')
            ->addSelect('servicoDetalhe')

            ->innerJoin('profissionais.user', 'user')
            ->innerJoin('user.roles', 'roles')
            ->leftJoin('profissionais.telefones', 'telefones')
            ->leftJoin('profissionais.clinicas', 'clinicas')
            ->leftJoin('profissionais.profissionalServicos', 'profissionalServicos')
            ->leftJoin('profissionalServicos.clinicaServico', 'clinicaServico')
            ->leftJoin('clinicaServico.servico', 'servico')
            ->leftJoin('profissionais.profissionalIntervalos', 'profissionalIntervalos')
            ->leftJoin('profissionais.agendas', 'agendas')
            ->leftJoin('agendas.venda', 'venda')
            ->leftJoin('venda.orcamento', 'orcamento')
            ->leftJoin('venda.pagamentos', 'pagamentos')
            ->leftJoin('orcamento.orcamentosServicos', 'orcamentosServicos')
            ->leftJoin('orcamentosServicos.servico', 'servicoOrc')
            ->leftJoin('servicoOrc.servico', 'servicoDetalhe')
        ;
        $qb->where($qb->expr()->eq('profissionais.id', ':id'))
            ->setParameter(':id', $id);

        if (null !== $clinica) {
            $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->orX(
                $qb->expr()->eq('clinica.id', ':clinica'),
                $qb->expr()->eq('profissionais.clinica', ':clinica')
            ))->setParameter(':clinica', $clinica);
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->getOneOrNullResult(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Profissionais;

use Application\Entity\Role;
use Application\Entity\User;
use Application\Rest\AbstractUserResourceListener;
use Application\Service\OAuth2ClientService;
use Aws\S3\S3Client;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Usuarios\UsuariosRepository;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\ArrayCollection;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;
use DoctrineModule\Stdlib\Hydrator\DoctrineObject as Hydrator;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasRepository;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Usuarios\UsuariosEntity;

class ProfissionaisResource extends AbstractUserResourceListener
{
    /**
     * @var OAuth2ClientService
     */
    protected $oAuth2ClientService;

    /**
     * Default role
     *
     * @var string
     */
    protected $defaultUserRole = Role::ROLE_PROFISSIONAL;

    /**
     * @var S3Client
     */
    private $s3Client;

    /**
     * Create
     *
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return array|ApiProblem
     */
    public function create($data)
    {
        try {
            $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
            /** @var ProfissionaisEntity $object */
            $object = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), new $this->entityClass());

            // Criptogra senha do usuário
            $object->getUser()->setPassword(
                $this->oAuth2ClientService->createPasswordHash(
                    $this->getInputFilter()->get('user')->getValue('password')
                )
            );

            $this->oAuth2ClientService->create($object->getUser());

            // Added user role
            if ($object->getUser()->getRoles()->isEmpty()) {
                $object->getUser()->addRoles($this->getUserRole());
            }

            $object->getUser()->setPrimeiroLogin(true);

            if ($this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
                /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
                $clinica = $this->getObjectManager()->find(ClinicasEntity::class, $this->getClinica());
                if ($clinica != null) {
                    $object->setClinica($clinica);
                    $clinica->addProfissionais($object);
                }
            }

            $this->getObjectManager()->persist($object);
            $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

            return $this->getRepository()->fetch($object->getId());
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Patch (partial in-place update) a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function patch($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            /** @var ProfissionaisEntity $object */
            if ($object = $this->getRepository()->find($id)) {
                $roles = clone $object->getUser()->getRoles();
                $password = $object->getUser()->getPassword();
                $intervalosNaoFixos = $this->manterIntevalosNaoFixos($object);

                $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
                /** @var mixed $object */
                $objectValues = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), $object);

                if (
                    $this->getInputFilter()->get('user')->has('password') &&
                    null !== $this->getInputFilter()->get('user')->getValue('password')
                ) {
                    if (method_exists($objectValues, 'getUser')) {
                        /** @var User $user */
                        $user = $objectValues->getUser();

                        // Criptogra senha do usuário
                        $user->setPassword(
                            $this->oAuth2ClientService->createPasswordHash(
                                $this->getInputFilter()->get('user')->getValue('password')
                            )
                        );

                        $this->oAuth2ClientService->create($user);

                        $this->getObjectManager()->persist($user);
                    }
                } else {
                    $objectValues->getUser()->setPassword($password);
                }

                // Added user role
                if ($object->getUser()->getRoles()->isEmpty()) {
                    if (! $roles->isEmpty()) {
                        $object->getUser()->setRoles($roles);
                    } else {
                        $object->getUser()->addRoles($this->getUserRole());
                    }
                }                

                $objectValues->addProfissionalIntervalos($intervalosNaoFixos);

                if($objectValues->getFoto()['tmp_name'])
                    $this->putObjectAcl($objectValues->getFoto()['tmp_name']);

                $this->getObjectManager()->persist($objectValues);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                if (null !== $objectValues->getOldFoto()) {
                    $this->deleteObject($objectValues->getOldFoto()['tmp_name']);
                }

                return $this->getRepository()->fetch($id);
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Register not found.'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch all or a subset of resources
     *
     * @param  \Zend\Stdlib\Parameters|array $params
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetchAll($params = [])
    {
        try {
            $params = $this->getClinicasProfissional($params);

            return parent::fetchAll($params);
        } catch (\InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Fetch a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var ProfissionaisRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getRepository();
            if (! $this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                if ($object = $repository->fetch($id)) {
                    return $object;
                }

                return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Profissional não encontrado.'));
            }
            try {
                if ($object = $this->getRepository()->fetch($id)) {
                    if(isset($object) && isset($object['foto']) && isset($object['foto']['tmp_name'])) {
                        $object['foto']['url'] = str_replace('s3://','//s3.amazonaws.com/',$object['foto']['tmp_name']);
                    }
                    return $object;
                }
    
                return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Register not found'));
            } catch (Exception $e) {
                $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);
    
                return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
            }
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get clinica
     *
     * @return integer|ClinicasEntity
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    private function getClinica()
    {
        if ($id = (integer) $this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
            if (! $this->isGuest())
                return $id;

            /** @var ClinicasRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClinicasEntity::class);

            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            if ($clinica = $repository->getClinicaUser($id, $this->getUser())) {
                return $clinica;
            }
        }

        throw new \InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Clínica não encontrada'));
    }

    /**
     * Get user
     *
     * @return User
     */
    private function getUser()
    {
        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getAuthenticationIdentity()) {
            return $identity['user'];
        }

        throw new \InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Usuário não encontrado'));
    }

    /**
     * @return bool
     */
    private function isGuest() {
        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getName() == 'guest') {
            return true;
        }

        return false;
    }

    private function manterIntevalosNaoFixos($profissional) {
        $profissionaisIntervalos = new ArrayCollection();

        foreach ($profissional->getProfissionalIntervalos() as $profInter) {
            if ($profInter->getTipo() != 'Fixo') {
                $profissionaisIntervalos[] = $profInter;
            }
        }

        return $profissionaisIntervalos;
    }

    /**
     * Retorna um array de clínicas nas quais o profissional possui relacionamento
     *
     * @param $params
     * @return mixed
     */
    private function getClinicasProfissional($params)
    {
        if (!$params->offsetExists('query')) {
            $params->offsetSet('query', []);
        }

        // Se o usuário for administrador retorna o ID da URL se houver
        if ($this->getUser()->getRoles()->first()->getRoleId() === Role::ROLE_ADMIN) {
            if ($clinica = $this->event->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
                $params->offsetSet(
                    'query',
                    ArrayUtils::merge(
                        $params->get('query'),
                        [
                            'profissionais.clinica' => [ (int)$clinica ]
                        ]
                    )
                );

                return $params;
            }

            return $params;
        }

        /** @var ProfissionaisRepository $repository */
        $repository = $this->getRepository();

        if ($this->getUser()->getRoles()->first()->getRoleId() !== Role::ROLE_PROFISSIONAL) {
            /** @var UsuariosRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(UsuariosEntity::class);
        }

        if ($userLogado = $repository->findOneBy(['user' => $this->getUser()->getId()])) {
            $clinicas = [];
            foreach ($userLogado->getClinicas() as $clinica) {
                $clinicas[] = $clinica->getId();
            };

            if (count($clinicas) > 0) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge($params->get('query'), ['profissionais.clinica' => $clinicas]));
            } else {
                $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge($params->get('query'), ['profissionais.id' => $userLogado->getId()]));
            }

            return $params;
        }

        $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge($params->get('query'), ['profissionais.id' => 0]));

        return $params;
    }

    /**
     * Set S3 Client
     *
     * @param S3Client $s3Client
     */
    public function setS3Client(S3Client $s3Client)
    {
        $this->s3Client = $s3Client;
    }

    /**
     * Put object acl
     *
     * @param string $file
     */
    private function putObjectAcl(string $file)
    {
        $this->s3Client->putObjectAcl([
            'ACL' => 'public-read',
            'Bucket' => $_ENV['AWS_S3_ASSETS_BUCKET'],
            'Key' => str_replace(
                's3://' . $_ENV['AWS_S3_ASSETS_BUCKET'] . '/',
                '',
                $file
            )
        ]);
    }

    /**
     * Delete object
     *
     * @param string $file
     */
    private function deleteObject(string $file)
    {
        $this->s3Client->deleteObject([
            'Bucket' => $_ENV['AWS_S3_ASSETS_BUCKET'],
            'Key' => str_replace(
                's3://' . $_ENV['AWS_S3_ASSETS_BUCKET'] . '/',
                '',
                $file
            ),
            'Quiet' => true,
        ]);
    }

}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Profissionais;

use Interop\Container\ContainerInterface;

/**
 * Class ProfissionaisResourceFactory
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\Profissionais
 */
class ProfissionaisResourceFactory
{
    /**
     * @param ContainerInterface $services
     * @return ProfissionaisResource
     * @throws \Psr\Container\ContainerExceptionInterface
     * @throws \Psr\Container\NotFoundExceptionInterface
     */
    public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $services)
    {
        /** @var \Zend\Log\Logger $logger */
        $logger = $services->get('log');

        /** @var \Zend\I18n\Translator\Translator $translator */
        $translator = $services->get('translator');

        /** @var \Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager $objectManager */
        $objectManager = $services->get(\Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager::class);

        /** @var \Application\Service\OAuth2ClientService $oAuth2ClientService */
        $oAuth2ClientService = $services->get(\Application\Service\OAuth2ClientService::class);

        /** @var \Aws\Sdk $awsSdk */
        $awsSdk = $services->get(\Aws\Sdk::class);

        $resource = new ProfissionaisResource();
        $resource->setLogger($logger);
        $resource->setTranslator($translator);
        $resource->setObjectManager($objectManager);
        $resource->setOAuth2ClientService($oAuth2ClientService);
        $resource->setS3Client($awsSdk->createS3());

        return $resource;
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\ProfissionalIntervalos;

use Clinica\V1\Rest\Profissionais\ProfissionaisEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;

/**
 * Class ProfissionalIntervalosEntity
 */
class ProfissionalIntervalosEntity
{

    const TIPO_FIXO     = 'Fixo';
    const TIPO_VARIAVEL = 'Variável';

    const MOTIVO_ALMOCO     = 'Almoço';
    const MOTIVO_MEDICO     = 'Ausência médica';
    const MOTIVO_FALTA      = 'Falta';
    const MOTIVO_FERIAS     = 'Férias';
    const MOTIVO_FOLGA      = 'Folga';
    const MOTIVO_LANCHE     = 'Lanche';
    const MOTIVO_FECHAMENTO = 'Fechamento de agenda';
    const MOTIVO_INTERVALO  = 'Intervalo programado';

    const DIASEMANA_SEG     = 'Segunda-feira';
    const DIASEMANA_TER     = 'Terça-feira';
    const DIASEMANA_QUA     = 'Quarta-feira';
    const DIASEMANA_QUI     = 'Quinta-feira';
    const DIASEMANA_SEX     = 'Sexta-feira';
    const DIASEMANA_SAB     = 'Sábado';
    const DIASEMANA_DOM     = 'Domingo';

    /**
     * @var int
     */
    protected $id;

    /**
     * @var ClinicasEntity
     */
    protected $clinica;

    /**
     * @var ProfissionaisEntity
     */
    protected $profissional;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $tipo;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $motivo;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $diaSemanaTipoFixo;

    /**
     * @var \DateTime
     */
    protected $dataHoraInicio;

    /**
     * @var \DateTime
     */
    protected $dataHoraFim;

    /**
     * @return int
     */
    public function getId(): int
    {
        return $this->id;
    }

    /**
     * @return ClinicasEntity
     */
    public function getClinica(): ClinicasEntity
    {
        return $this->clinica;
    }

    /**
     * @param ClinicasEntity $clinica
     * @return ProfissionalIntervalosEntity
     */
    public function setClinica(ClinicasEntity $clinica): ProfissionalIntervalosEntity
    {
        $this->clinica = $clinica;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return ProfissionaisEntity
     */
    public function getProfissional(): ProfissionaisEntity
    {
        return $this->profissional;
    }

    /**
     * @param ProfissionaisEntity $profissional
     * @return ProfissionalIntervalosEntity
     */
    public function setProfissional(ProfissionaisEntity $profissional): ProfissionalIntervalosEntity
    {
        $this->profissional = $profissional;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get tipo
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getTipo(): string
    {
        return $this->tipo;
    }

    /**
     * Set tipo
     *
     * @param string $tipo
     * @return ProfissionalIntervalosEntity
     */
    public function setTipo(string $tipo): ProfissionalIntervalosEntity
    {
        if (!in_array($tipo, array(self::TIPO_FIXO, self::TIPO_VARIAVEL))) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException("Tipo de intervalo inválido");
        }
        $this->tipo = $tipo;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get motivo
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getMotivo(): string
    {
        return $this->motivo;
    }

    /**
     * Set motivo
     *
     * @param string $motivo
     * @return ProfissionalIntervalosEntity
     */
    public function setMotivo(string $motivo): ProfissionalIntervalosEntity
    {
        if (!in_array($motivo, array(self::MOTIVO_ALMOCO, self::MOTIVO_MEDICO, self::MOTIVO_FALTA, self::MOTIVO_FERIAS, self::MOTIVO_FOLGA, self::MOTIVO_LANCHE, self::MOTIVO_FECHAMENTO, self::MOTIVO_INTERVALO))) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException("Motivo de intervalo inválido");
        }
        $this->motivo = $motivo;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get diaSemanaTipoFixo
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getDiaSemanaTipoFixo(): string
    {
        return $this->diaSemanaTipoFixo;
    }

    /**
     * Set diaSemanaTipoFixo
     *
     * @param string $diaSemanaTipoFixo
     * @return ProfissionalIntervalosEntity
     */
    public function setDiaSemanaTipoFixo(string $diaSemanaTipoFixo = null): ProfissionalIntervalosEntity
    {
        if (!in_array($diaSemanaTipoFixo, array(self::DIASEMANA_SEG, self::DIASEMANA_TER, self::DIASEMANA_QUA, self::DIASEMANA_QUI, self::DIASEMANA_SEX, self::DIASEMANA_SAB, self::DIASEMANA_DOM, null))) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException("Dia da semana inválido para Intervalo Fixo");
        }
        $this->diaSemanaTipoFixo = $diaSemanaTipoFixo;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return \DateTime
     */
    public function getDataHoraInicio(): \DateTime
    {
        return $this->dataHoraInicio;
    }


    /**
     * @param \DateTime $dataHoraInicio
     * @return ProfissionalIntervalosEntity
     */
    public function setDataHoraInicio(\DateTime $dataHoraInicio): ProfissionalIntervalosEntity
    {
        $this->dataHoraInicio = $dataHoraInicio;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return \DateTime
     */
    public function getDataHoraFim(): \DateTime
    {
        return $this->dataHoraFim;
    }


    /**
     * @param \DateTime $dataHoraFim
     * @return ProfissionalIntervalosEntity
     */
    public function setDataHoraFim(\DateTime $dataHoraFim): ProfissionalIntervalosEntity
    {
        $this->dataHoraFim = $dataHoraFim;
        return $this;
    }
    
}

<?php

namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\ProfissionalIntervalos;

use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\AbstractQuery;

/**
 * Class ProfissionalIntervalosRepository
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\ProfissionalIntervalos
 */
class ProfissionalIntervalosRepository extends EntityRepository
{
    /**
     * Fetch All
     *
     * @param array|null $searchParam
     * @param array|null $orderBy
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|object
     */
    public function fetchAll(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('profissionalIntervalos');

        // Verifica se existe o parametro clinica
        if(isset($searchParam['query']) && isset($searchParam['query']['profissionalIntervalos.profissional'])) {
            if(isset($searchParam['query']['profissionalIntervalos.clinica'])) {
                // Verifica se é comissão do Profissional com o Servico e a Clinica
                $qb->where($qb->expr()->eq('profissionalIntervalos.profissional', ':profissional'))
                    ->setParameter(':profissional', $searchParam['query']['profissionalIntervalos.profissional']);

                // Remove os parametros profissional, clinica, clinicaServico do Array para não compara-lo novamente no mountRestrictions()
                unset($searchParam['query']['profissionalIntervalos.profissional']);

            } else {
                // Verifica se é o profissional
                $qb->andWhere(
                    $qb->expr()->orX(
                        $qb->expr()->eq('profissionalIntervalos.profissional', $searchParam['query']['profissionalIntervalos.profissional'])
                    )
                );

                // Remove o parametro profissional do Array para não compara-lo novamente no mountRestrictions()
                unset($searchParam['query']['profissionalIntervalos.profissional']);
            }
        }

        //Traz na consulta os dados das tabelas relacionadas
        $qb ->addSelect('partial profissional .{id, nome, email, cpf, genero, ativo, foto}')
            ->addSelect('partial user.{id, username}')
            ->addSelect('partial clinica .{id, nomeFantasia, ativo}')

            ->leftJoin('profissionalIntervalos.profissional', 'profissional')
            ->leftJoin('profissional.user', 'user')
            ->leftJoin('profissionalIntervalos.clinica', 'clinica');

        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            $this->mountRestrictions($qb, $searchParam['query']);
        }

        if (! is_null($orderBy)) {
            foreach ($orderBy as $key => $value) {
                $qb->addOrderBy($key, $value);
            }
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->setHydrationMode(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    /**
     * Fetch
     *
     * @param int $id
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|mixed|object
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('profissionalIntervalos');

        //Traz na consulta os dados das tabelas relacionadas
        $qb ->addSelect('partial profissional .{id, nome, email, cpf, genero, ativo, foto}')
            ->addSelect('partial user.{id, username}')
            ->addSelect('partial clinica .{id, nomeFantasia, ativo}')

            ->leftJoin('profissionalIntervalos.profissional', 'profissional')
            ->leftJoin('profissional.user', 'user')
            ->leftJoin('profissionalIntervalos.clinica', 'clinica');

        $qb->where($qb->expr()->eq('profissionalIntervalos.id', ':id'))
            ->setParameter(':id', $id);

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->getOneOrNullResult(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    public function getIntervalosProfissionalDoDia($clinica_id, $profissional_id, $data_hora, $dia_semana)
    {
        $sql = 'SELECT pi.*
                FROM profissional_has_intervalo pi
                WHERE pi.clinica_id = :clinica_id 
                      AND pi.profissional_id = :profissional_id 
                      AND ((pi.dia_semana_tipo_fixo LIKE "'.$dia_semana.'" 
                            AND TIME("'.$data_hora.'") BETWEEN TIME(pi.data_hora_inicio) AND TIME(pi.data_hora_fim))
                          OR 
                          CONVERT("'.$data_hora.'", DATETIME) BETWEEN pi.data_hora_inicio AND pi.data_hora_fim)
                  ';

        return $this->_em->getConnection()->fetchAll($sql, [
                'clinica_id' => $clinica_id,
                'profissional_id' => $profissional_id
            ]
        );
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\ProfissionalIntervalos;

use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException;
use Zend\Stdlib\Parameters;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use Application\Rest\AbstractResourceListener;
use Application\Entity\User;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Profissionais\ProfissionaisEntity;
use DoctrineModule\Stdlib\Hydrator\DoctrineObject as Hydrator;
use Exception;
use InvalidArgumentException;

/**
 * Class ProfissionalIntervalosResource
 *
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\ProfissionalIntervalos
 */
class ProfissionalIntervalosResource extends AbstractResourceListener
{

    /**
     * Create a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function create($data)
    {
        try {
            if (! $clinica = $this->getClinica($this->getInputFilter()->getValue('clinica'))) {
                return new ApiProblem(404, "Clínica não encontrada.");
            }

            $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ProfissionaisEntity::class);
            if (! $profissional = $repository->find($this->getInputFilter()->getValue('profissional'))) {
                return new ApiProblem(404, "Profissional não encontrado.");
            }

            $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
            $profissionalIntervalos = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), new $this->entityClass());

            $this->getObjectManager()->persist($profissionalIntervalos);
            $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

            return $this->getRepository()->fetch($profissionalIntervalos->getId());
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function update($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            if (! $clinica = $this->getClinica($this->getInputFilter()->getValue('clinica'))) {
                return new ApiProblem(404, "Clínica não encontrada.");
            }

            /** @var ProfissionaisEntity $profissional */
            if (
                ! $profissional = $this->getObjectManager()->find(
                    ProfissionaisEntity::class,
                    $this->getInputFilter()->getValue('profissional')
                )
            ) {
                return new ApiProblem(404, "Profissional não encontrado.");
            }

            $object = $this->getUser()->isProfissional() ?
                $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id, 'profissional' => $profissional->getId()]) :
                $this->getRepository()->find($id);

            if (null !== $object) {
                $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
                $object = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), $object);

                $this->getObjectManager()->persist($object);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return $this->getRepository()->fetch($id);
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Intervalo do Profissional não encontrado.'));
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Delete a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @return bool|ApiProblem
     */
    public function delete($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var ProfissionalIntervalosEntity $entity */
            if ($entity = $this->getRepository()->find($id)) {
                if (
                    $this->getUser()->isAdmin() ||
                    (
                        $this->getUser()->isClinica() &&
                        null !== $this->getClinica($entity->getClinica()->getId())
                    ) ||
                    (
                        $this->getUser()->isProfissional() &&
                        $entity->getProfissional()->getUser()->getId() === $this->getUser()->getId()
                    )
                ) {
                    $this->getObjectManager()->remove($entity);
                    $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                    return new ApiProblem(200, "Removido o Intervalo do Profissional.");
                }
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, "Intervalo do Profissional não encontrado.");
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var ProfissionalIntervalosEntity $entity */
            if ($entity = $this->getRepository()->find($id)) {
                if (
                    $this->getUser()->isAdmin() ||
                    (
                        $this->getUser()->isClinica() &&
                        null !== $this->getClinica($entity->getClinica()->getId())
                    ) ||
                    (
                        $this->getUser()->isProfissional() &&
                        $entity->getProfissional()->getUser()->getId() === $this->getUser()->getId()
                    )
                ) {
                    return $this->getRepository()->fetch($entity->getId());
                }
            }

            return new ApiProblem(
                404,
                $this->getTranslator()->translate('Intervalo do Profissional não encontrado.')
            );
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch all or a subset of resources
     *
     * @param  Parameters|array $params
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     * @throws NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetchAll($params = [])
    {
        try {
            if (!$params->offsetExists('query')) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', []);
            }

            if ($profissional = (integer) $this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('profissional', null)) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge($params->get('query'), [
                    'profissionalIntervalos.profissional' => $profissional
                ]));
            }

            if (array_key_exists('clinica.id', $params->offsetGet('query'))) {
                if (null === $this->getClinica($params->offsetGet('query')['clinica.id'])) {
                    return new ApiProblem(403, 'Usuário não vinculado a Clínica');
                }
            }

            if (
                (null === $profissional || $profissional === 0) &&
                ! array_key_exists('clinica.id', $params->offsetGet('query'))
            ) {
                return new ApiProblem(404, 'Informe a clínica ou o profissional.');
            }

            return parent::fetchAll($params);
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get clinica
     *
     * @param $id
     * @return ClinicasEntity|object|null
     * @throws NonUniqueResultException
     */
    private function getClinica($id): ?ClinicasEntity
    {
        /** @var ClinicasRepository $repository */
        $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClinicasEntity::class);

        if ($this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
            return $repository->find($id);
        }

        if ($this->getUser()->isProfissional()) {
            return $repository->getClinicaProfissional((integer)$id, $this->getUser());
        }

        /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
        if ($clinica = $repository->getClinicaUser((integer)$id, $this->getUser())) {
            return $clinica;
        }

        return null;
    }

    /**
     * Get user
     *
     * @return User
     */
    private function getUser()
    {
        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getAuthenticationIdentity()) {
            return $identity['user'];
        }

        throw new InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Usuário não encontrado'));
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\ProfissionalServicos;

use Clinica\V1\Rest\ClinicasServicos\ClinicasServicosEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Servicos\ServicosEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Profissionais\ProfissionaisEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\ArrayCollection;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\Collection;

/**
 * Class ProfissionalServicosEntity
 */
class ProfissionalServicosEntity
{

    const TIPOCOMISSAO_FIXA = 'Fixa';
    const TIPOCOMISSAO_PERCENTUAL = 'Percentual';

    /**
     * @var int
     */
    protected $id;

    /**
     * @var ClinicasEntity
     */
    protected $clinica;

    /**
     * @var ProfissionaisEntity
     */
    protected $profissional;

    /**
     * @var ClinicasServicosEntity
     */
    protected $clinicaServico;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $tipoComissao;

    /**
     * @var float
     */
    protected $valorComissao;

    /**
     * @return int
     */
    public function getId(): int
    {
        return $this->id;
    }

    /**
     * @return ClinicasEntity
     */
    public function getClinica(): ClinicasEntity
    {
        return $this->clinica;
    }

    /**
     * @param ClinicasEntity $clinica
     * @return ProfissionalServicosEntity
     */
    public function setClinica(ClinicasEntity $clinica): ProfissionalServicosEntity
    {
        $this->clinica = $clinica;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return ProfissionaisEntity
     */
    public function getProfissional(): ProfissionaisEntity
    {
        return $this->profissional;
    }

    /**
     * @param ProfissionaisEntity $profissional
     * @return ProfissionalServicosEntity
     */
    public function setProfissional(ProfissionaisEntity $profissional): ProfissionalServicosEntity
    {
        $this->profissional = $profissional;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return ClinicasServicosEntity
     */
    public function getClinicaServico(): ClinicasServicosEntity
    {
        return $this->clinicaServico;
    }

    /**
     * @param ClinicasServicosEntity $clinicaServico
     * @return ProfissionalServicosEntity
     */
    public function setClinicaServico(ClinicasServicosEntity $clinicaServico): ProfissionalServicosEntity
    {
        $this->clinicaServico = $clinicaServico;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get tipoComissao
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getTipoComissao(): string
    {
        return $this->tipoComissao;
    }

    /**
     * Set tipoComissao
     *
     * @param string $tipoComissao
     * @return ProfissionalServicosEntity
     */
    public function setTipoComissao(string $tipoComissao): ProfissionalServicosEntity
    {
        if (!in_array($tipoComissao, array(self::TIPOCOMISSAO_FIXA, self::TIPOCOMISSAO_PERCENTUAL))) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException("Tipo de comissão inválida");
        }
        $this->tipoComissao = $tipoComissao;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return mixed
     */
    public function getValorComissao()
    {
        return $this->valorComissao;
    }

    /**
     * @param float $valorComissao
     * @return ProfissionalServicosEntity
     */
    public function setValorComissao(float $valorComissao = null): ProfissionalServicosEntity
    {
        $this->valorComissao = $valorComissao;
        return $this;
    }
}

<?php

namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\ProfissionalServicos;

use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\AbstractQuery;

/**
 * Class ProfissionalServicosRepository
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\ProfissionalServicos
 */
class ProfissionalServicosRepository extends EntityRepository
{
    /**
     * Fetch All
     *
     * @param array|null $searchParam
     * @param array|null $orderBy
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|object
     */
    public function fetchAll(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('profissionalServicos');

        // Verifica se existe o parametro clinica
        if(isset($searchParam['query']) && isset($searchParam['query']['profissionalServicos.profissional'])) {
            if(isset($searchParam['query']['profissionalServicos.clinica']) && isset($searchParam['query']['profissionalServicos.clinicaServico'])) {
                // Verifica se é comissão do Profissional com o Servico e a Clinica
                $qb->where($qb->expr()->eq('profissionalServicos.profissional', ':profissional'))
                    ->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('profissionalServicos.clinica', ':clinica'))
                    ->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('profissionalServicos.clinicaServico', ':clinicaServico'))
                    ->setParameter(':profissional', $searchParam['query']['profissionalServicos.profissional'])
                    ->setParameter(':clinica', $searchParam['query']['profissionalServicos.clinica'])
                    ->setParameter(':clinicaServico', $searchParam['query']['profissionalServicos.clinicaServico']);

                // Remove os parametros profissional, clinica, clinicaServico do Array para não compara-lo novamente no mountRestrictions()
                unset($searchParam['query']['profissionalServicos.profissional']);
                unset($searchParam['query']['profissionalServicos.clinica']);
                unset($searchParam['query']['profissionalServicos.clinicaServico']);

            } else {
                // Verifica se é o profissional
                $qb->andWhere(
                    $qb->expr()->orX(
                        $qb->expr()->eq('profissionalServicos.profissional', $searchParam['query']['profissionalServicos.profissional'])
                    )
                );

                // Remove o parametro profissional do Array para não compara-lo novamente no mountRestrictions()
                unset($searchParam['query']['profissionalServicos.profissional']);
            }
        }

        //Traz na consulta os dados das tabelas relacionadas
        $qb ->addSelect('partial profissional .{id, nome, email, cpf, genero, ativo, foto}')
            ->addSelect('partial user.{id, username}')
            ->addSelect('partial clinica .{id, nomeFantasia, ativo}')
            ->addSelect('clinicaServico')
            ->addSelect('partial servico. {id, titulo}')

            ->leftJoin('profissionalServicos.profissional', 'profissional')
            ->leftJoin('profissional.user', 'user')
            ->leftJoin('profissionalServicos.clinica', 'clinica')
            ->leftJoin('profissionalServicos.clinicaServico', 'clinicaServico')
            ->leftJoin('clinicaServico.servico', 'servico');

        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            $this->mountRestrictions($qb, $searchParam['query']);
        }

        if (! is_null($orderBy)) {
            foreach ($orderBy as $key => $value) {
                $qb->addOrderBy($key, $value);
            }
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->setHydrationMode(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    /**
     * Fetch
     *
     * @param int $id
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|mixed|object
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('profissionalServicos');

        //Traz na consulta os dados das tabelas relacionadas
        $qb ->addSelect('partial profissional .{id, nome, email, cpf, genero, ativo, foto}')
            ->addSelect('partial user.{id, username}')
            ->addSelect('partial clinica .{id, nomeFantasia}')
            ->addSelect('clinicaServico')
            ->addSelect('partial servico. {id, titulo}')

            ->leftJoin('profissionalServicos.profissional', 'profissional')
            ->leftJoin('profissional.user', 'user')
            ->leftJoin('profissionalServicos.clinica', 'clinica')
            ->leftJoin('profissionalServicos.clinicaServico', 'clinicaServico')
            ->leftJoin('clinicaServico.servico', 'servico');


        $qb->where($qb->expr()->eq('profissionalServicos.id', ':id'))
            ->setParameter(':id', $id);

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->getOneOrNullResult(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }
}

<?php

namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\ProfissionalServicos;

use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException;
use Zend\Stdlib\Parameters;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use Application\Rest\AbstractResourceListener;
use Application\Entity\User;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use DoctrineModule\Stdlib\Hydrator\DoctrineObject as Hydrator;
use Exception;
use InvalidArgumentException;

class ProfissionalServicosResource extends AbstractResourceListener
{

    /**
     * Create a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function create($data)
    {
        try {
            if (!$clinica = $this->getClinica($this->getInputFilter()->getValue('clinica'))) {
                throw new InvalidArgumentException('Usuário não vinculado a Clínica');
            }

            $total = $this->getRepository()->count([
                'profissional' => $this->getInputFilter()->getValue('profissional'),
                'clinica' => $clinica->getId(),
                'clinicaServico' => $this->getInputFilter()->getValue('clinicaServico')
            ]);

            if ($total > 0) {
                throw new InvalidArgumentException('Comissão do Profissional já cadastrada.');
            }

            $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
            $profissionalServicos = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), new $this->entityClass());

            $this->getObjectManager()->persist($profissionalServicos);
            $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

            return $this->getRepository()->fetch($profissionalServicos->getId());
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function update($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            if (!$clinica = $this->getClinica($this->getInputFilter()->getValue('clinica'))) {
                throw new InvalidArgumentException('Usuário não vinculado a Clínica');
            }

            return parent::update($id, $data);
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Delete a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @return bool|ApiProblem
     */
    public function delete($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var ProfissionalServicosEntity $profissionalServicos */
            if ($profissionalServicos = $this->getRepository()->find($id)) {

                if (!$clinica = $this->getClinica($profissionalServicos->getClinica()->getId())) {
                    throw new InvalidArgumentException('Usuário não vinculado a Clínica');
                }

                $this->getObjectManager()->remove($profissionalServicos);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return new ApiProblem(200, "Removido o relacionamento do Serviço com o Profissional.");
            } else {
                return new ApiProblem(404, "Relacionamento do Serviço com o Profissional não encontrado.");
            }
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
        try {
            return parent::fetch($id);
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch all or a subset of resources
     *
     * @param Parameters|array $params
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetchAll($params = [])
    {
        try {
            if (!$params->offsetExists('query')) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', []);
            }

            if ($profissional = (integer)$this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('profissional')) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge($params->get('query'), [
                    'profissionalServicos.profissional' => $profissional
                ]));
            }

            return parent::fetchAll($params);
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get clinica
     *
     * @param $id
     * @return ClinicasEntity|object|null
     * @throws NonUniqueResultException
     */
    private function getClinica($id)
    {
        /** @var ClinicasRepository $repository */
        $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClinicasEntity::class);

        if ($this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
            return $repository->find($id);
        }

        /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
        if ($clinica = $repository->getClinicaUser((integer)$id, $this->getUser())) {
            return $clinica;
        }

        return null;
    }

    /**
     * Get user
     *
     * @return User
     */
    private function getUser()
    {
        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getAuthenticationIdentity()) {
            return $identity['user'];
        }

        throw new InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Usuário não encontrado'));
    }
}

<?php

namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Segmentos;

use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\Query;
use Doctrine\ORM\AbstractQuery;

class SegmentosRepository extends EntityRepository
{
    /**
     * Fetch all
     *
     * @param array|null $searchParam
     * @param array|null $orderBy
     * @return Query|object|array
     */
    public function fetchAll(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('segmentos');

        $qb ->where($qb->expr()->eq('segmentos.ativo',':ativo'));
        $qb ->setParameter(':ativo',true);

        if (isset($searchParam['query']['termo'])) {
            $qb->andWhere(
                $qb->expr()->orX(
                    $qb->expr()->like('segmentos.nome', ':termo')
                )
            )->setParameter(':termo', '%' . $searchParam['query']['termo'] . '%');
            unset($searchParam['query']['termo']);
        }

        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            $this->mountRestrictions($qb, $searchParam['query']);
        }

        if (!is_null($orderBy)) {
            foreach ($orderBy as $key => $value) {
                $qb->addOrderBy($key, $value);
            }
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->setHydrationMode(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    /**
     * Fetch
     *
     * @param integer $id
     * @return Query|object|array
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('segmentos');

        $qb ->where($qb->expr()->eq('segmentos.id',':id'));
        $qb ->setParameter(':id', $id);

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->getOneOrNullResult(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

}

<?php

namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\ServicoCategorias;

use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\Query;
use Doctrine\ORM\AbstractQuery;

class ServicoCategoriasRepository extends EntityRepository
{
    /**
     * Fetch all
     *
     * @param array|null $searchParam
     * @param array|null $orderBy
     * @return Query|object|array
     */
    public function fetchAll(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null)
    {

        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('servicoCategorias');


        //Traz na consulta os dados da clinica
        $qb ->addSelect('partial clinica.{id, nomeFantasia}')
            ->leftJoin('servicoCategorias.clinica', 'clinica');

            // Verifica se existe o parametro clinica
            if (isset($searchParam['query']) && isset($searchParam['query']['servicoCategorias.clinica'])) {
                // Verifica se é a clinica OU se clinica é NULL
                $qb->where(
                    $qb->expr()->orX(
                        $qb->expr()->eq('servicoCategorias.clinica', $searchParam['query']['servicoCategorias.clinica']),
                        $qb->expr()->isNull('servicoCategorias.clinica')
                    )
                );
            } elseif (isset($searchParam['query']) && ! $searchParam['query']['clinica.id']) {
                // Verifica se clinica é NULL
                $qb->where(
                    $qb->expr()->isNull('servicoCategorias.clinica')
                );
            }
        // Remove o parametro clinica do Array para não compara-lo novamente no mountRestrictions()
        unset($searchParam['query']['servicoCategorias.clinica']);

        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            // Compara os demais parametros passados na URL
            $this->mountRestrictions($qb, $searchParam['query']);
        }

        // Se for passado o orderBy monta a ordernação
        if (! is_null($orderBy)) {
            foreach ($orderBy as $key => $value) {
                $qb->addOrderBy($key, $value);
            }
        }  else {
            // Ordena por id DESC se não passar o parametro de ordenação
            $qb->addOrderBy('servicoCategorias.id', 'DESC');
        }


        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->setHydrationMode(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    /**
     * Fetch
     *
     * @param integer $id
     * @return Query|object|array
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetch($id, $clinica = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('servicoCategorias');

        $qb ->addSelect('partial clinica.{id, nomeFantasia}')
            ->leftJoin('servicoCategorias.clinica', 'clinica');

        $qb->where($qb->expr()->eq('servicoCategorias.id', ':id'))
            ->setParameter(':id', $id);

        if (null !== $clinica) {
            $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->orX(
                $qb->expr()->eq('clinica.id', ':clinica'),
                $qb->expr()->eq('servicoCategorias.clinica', ':clinica')
            ))->setParameter(':clinica', $clinica);
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->getOneOrNullResult(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\ServicoCategorias;

use Application\Rest\AbstractResourceListener;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use Application\Entity\User;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasRepository;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;
use Doctrine\DBAL\Exception\ForeignKeyConstraintViolationException;

/**
 * Class ServicoCategoriasResource
 *
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\ServicoCategorias
 */
class ServicoCategoriasResource extends AbstractResourceListener
{

    /**
     * Create
     *
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return array|ApiProblem
     */
    public function create($data)
    {
        try {
            if (! $this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                if ($this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
                    $this->getInputFilter()->get('clinica')->setValue($this->getClinica());
                }
            }

            return parent::create($data);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Delete a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @return bool|ApiProblem
     */
    public function delete($id)
    {
        try {
            if (! $this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                /** @var ServicoCategoriasEntity $servicoCategoria */
                if ($servicoCategoria = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id, 'clinica' => $this->getClinica()])) {

                    $this->getObjectManager()->remove($servicoCategoria);
                    $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                    return true;
                }

                return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Categoria do serviço não encontrada.'));
            } else {
                return parent::delete($id);
            }
        } catch (ForeignKeyConstraintViolationException $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->info($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Categoria sendo utilizada em um serviço.'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var ServicoCategoriasRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getRepository();
            if (! $this->isGuest()) {
                if (!$this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {

                    if ($object = $repository->fetch($id, $this->getClinica())) {
                        return $object;
                    }

                    return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Categoria não encontrada.'));
                }
            }
            return parent::fetch($id);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch all or a subset of resources
     *
     * @param  \Zend\Stdlib\Parameters|array $params
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetchAll($params = [])
    {
        try {
            if (! $this->isGuest()) {
                if (!$this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                    if (!$params->offsetExists('query')) {
                        $params->offsetSet('query', []);
                    }

                    if ($this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
                        $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge($params->get('query'), [
                            'servicoCategorias.clinica' => $this->getClinica() instanceof ClinicasEntity ?
                                $this->getClinica()->getId() : $this->getClinica()
                        ]));
                    }

                }
            }

            return parent::fetchAll($params);
        } catch (\InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Patch (partial in-place update) a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function patch($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            if (! $this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                /** @var ServicoCategoriasEntity $servicoCategoria */
                if ($servicoCategoria = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id, 'clinica' => $this->getClinica()])) {
                    return parent::patch($id, $data);
                }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Categoria não encontrada.'));
            }
            return parent::patch($id, $data);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function update($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            if (! $this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                /** @var ServicoCategoriasEntity $servicoCategorias */
                if ($servicoCategorias = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id, 'clinica' => $this->getClinica()])) {
                    return true;
                }

                return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Categoria não encontrada.'));
            }
            return parent::update($id, $data);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get clinica
     *
     * @return ClinicasEntity
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    private function getClinica()
    {
        if ($id = (integer) $this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
            if (! $this->isGuest())
                return $id;

            /** @var ClinicasRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClinicasEntity::class);

            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            if ($clinica = $repository->getClinicaUser($id, $this->getUser())) {
                return $clinica;
            }
        }

        throw new \InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Clínica não encontrada'));
    }

    /**
     * Get user
     *
     * @return User
     */
    private function getUser()
    {

        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getAuthenticationIdentity()) {
            return $identity['user'];
        }

        throw new \InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Usuário não encontrado'));
    }

    private function isGuest() {
        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getName() == 'guest') {
            return true;
        }
    }
}

<?php

namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\ServicoMateriais;

use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\AbstractQuery;
use Application\Entity\Role;
use Application\Entity\User;

/**
 * Class ServicosRepository
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\Servicos
 */
class ServicoMateriaisRepository extends EntityRepository
{
    /**
     * Fetch All
     *
     * @param array|null $searchParam
     * @param array|null $orderBy
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|object
     */
    public function fetchAll(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('servicoMateriais');


        //Traz na consulta os dados das tabelas relacionadas
        $qb ->addSelect('partial servico .{id, titulo}')
            ->addSelect('partial material .{id, nomeMaterial}')
            //->addSelect('partial clinica.{id}')

            ->leftJoin('servicoMateriais.material', 'material')
            ->leftJoin('servicoMateriais.servico', 'servico')
           // ->leftJoin('servicos.clinica', 'clinica')
        ;


        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            $this->mountRestrictions($qb, $searchParam['query']);
        }

        if (! is_null($orderBy)) {
            foreach ($orderBy as $key => $value) {
                $qb->addOrderBy($key, $value    );
            }
        } else {
            // Ordena por id DESC se não passar o parametro de ordenação
            $qb->addOrderBy('servicoMateriais.id', 'DESC');
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->setHydrationMode(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    /**
     * Fetch
     *
     * @param int $id
     * @param null $clinica
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|mixed|object
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('servicoMateriais');

        //Traz na consulta os dados das tabelas relacionadas
        $qb ->addSelect('partial servico .{id, titulo}')
            ->addSelect('partial material .{id, nomeMaterial}')
            //->addSelect('partial clinica.{id}')

            ->leftJoin('servicoMateriais.material', 'material')
            ->leftJoin('servicoMateriais.servico', 'servico')
            // ->leftJoin('servicos.clinica', 'clinica')
        ;

        $qb->where($qb->expr()->eq('servicoMateriais.id', ':id'))
            ->setParameter(':id', $id);

//        if (null !== $clinica) {
//            $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->orX(
//                $qb->expr()->eq('clinicas.id', ':clinica'),
//                $qb->expr()->eq('servicos.clinica', ':clinica')
//            ))->setParameter(':clinica', $clinica);
//        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->getOneOrNullResult(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }
}
