<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Servicos;

use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\ClinicasServicos\ClinicasServicosEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\ServicoCategorias\ServicoCategoriasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Profissionais\ProfissionaisEntity;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\ArrayCollection;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\Collection;

class ServicosEntity
{
    /**
     * @var int
     */
    protected $id;

    /**
     * @var ServicoCategoriasEntity
     */
    protected $categoria;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $titulo;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $descricao;

    /**
     * @var int
     */
    protected $tempoMedioDuracao;

    /**
     * @var bool
     */
    protected $agendamentoExterno;

    /**
     * @var ClinicasEntity
     */
    protected $clinica;

    /**
     * @var ClinicasEntity
     */
    protected $clinicas;

    /**
     * @var ProfissionaisEntity
     */
    protected $profissionais;

    /**
     * @var Collection
     */
    protected $clinicaServicos;

    /**
     * @var bool
     */
    protected $ativo = true;

    /**
     * ServicosEntity constuctor.
     */
    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->clinicas = new ArrayCollection();
        $this->profissionais = new ArrayCollection();
        $this->clinicaServicos = new ArrayCollection();
    }

    /**
     * @return int
     */
    public function getId(): int
    {
        return $this->id;
    }

    /**
     * @return ServicoCategoriasEntity
     */
    public function getCategoria(): ServicoCategoriasEntity
    {
        return $this->categoria;
    }

    /**
     * @param ServicoCategoriasEntity $categoria
     * @return ServicosEntity
     */
    public function setCategoria(ServicoCategoriasEntity $categoria): ServicosEntity
    {
        $this->categoria = $categoria;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return string
     */
    public function getTitulo(): string
    {
        return $this->titulo;
    }

    /**
     * @param string $titulo
     * @return ServicosEntity
     */
    public function setTitulo(string $titulo): ServicosEntity
    {
        $this->titulo = $titulo;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return string
     */
    public function getDescricao(): string
    {
        return $this->descricao;
    }

    /**
     * @param string $descricao
     * @return ServicosEntity
     */
    public function setDescricao(string $descricao): ServicosEntity
    {
        $this->descricao = $descricao;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return int
     */
    public function getTempoMedioDuracao(): int
    {
        return $this->tempoMedioDuracao;
    }

    /**
     * @param int $tempoMedioDuracao
     * @return ServicosEntity
     */
    public function setTempoMedioDuracao(int $tempoMedioDuracao): ServicosEntity
    {
        $this->tempoMedioDuracao = $tempoMedioDuracao;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isAgendamentoExterno(): bool
    {
        return $this->agendamentoExterno;
    }

    /**
     * @param bool $agendamentoExterno
     * @return ServicosEntity
     */

    public function setAgendamentoExterno(bool $agendamentoExterno): ServicosEntity
    {
        $this->agendamentoExterno = $agendamentoExterno;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return ClinicasEntity
     */
    public function getClinica()
    {
        return $this->clinica;
    }

    /**
     * @param ClinicasEntity $clinica
     * @return ServicosEntity
     */
    public function setClinica(ClinicasEntity $clinica = null): ServicosEntity
    {
        $this->clinica = $clinica;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isAtivo(): bool
    {
        return $this->ativo;
    }

    /**
     * @param bool $ativo
     * @return ServicosEntity
     */
    public function setAtivo(bool $ativo = true): ServicosEntity
    {
        $this->ativo = $ativo;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Add clinicas
     *
     * @param ClinicasEntity|Collection $clinicas
     * @return ServicosEntity
     */
    public function addClinicas($clinicas): ServicosEntity
    {
        if ($clinicas instanceof ClinicasEntity) {
            $this->clinicas->add($clinicas);
        } elseif ($clinicas instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            foreach ($clinicas as $clinica) {
                $this->clinicas->add($clinica);
            }
        } else {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Object must be an instance of Collection or ClinicasEntity.');
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get clinicas
     *
     * @return Collection
     */
    public function getClinicas(): Collection
    {
        return $this->clinicas;
    }

    /**
     * Add clinicas
     *
     * @param ClinicasEntity|Collection $clinicas
     * @return ServicosEntity
     */
    public function removeClinicas($clinicas): ServicosEntity
    {
        if ($clinicas instanceof ClinicasEntity) {
            $this->clinicas->removeElement($clinicas);
        } elseif ($clinicas instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            foreach ($clinicas as $clinica) {
                $this->clinicas->removeElement($clinica);
            }
        } else {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Object must be an instance of Collection or ClinicasEntity.');
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Set clinica
     *
     * @param Collection $clinica
     * @return ServicosEntity
     */
    public function setClinicas(Collection $clinicas): ServicosEntity
    {
        $this->clinicas = $clinicas;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Add profissionais
     *
     * @param $profissionais
     * @return ServicosEntity
     */
    public function addProfissionais($profissionais): ServicosEntity
    {
        if ($profissionais instanceof ProfissionaisEntity) {
            $this->profissionais->add($profissionais);
        } elseif ($profissionais instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var ProfissionaisEntity $profissional */
            foreach ($profissionais as $profissional) {
                $this->profissionais->add($profissional);
            }
        } else {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Object must be an instance of Collection or ProfissionaisEntity.');
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get profissionais
     *
     * @return Collection
     */
    public function getProfissionais(): Collection
    {
        return $this->profissionais;
    }

    /**
     * Remove profissionais
     *
     * @param $profissionais
     * @return ServicosEntity
     */
    public function removeProfissionais($profissionais): ServicosEntity
    {
        if ($profissionais instanceof ProfissionaisEntity) {
            $this->profissionais->removeElement($profissionais);
        } elseif ($profissionais instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var ProfissionaisEntity $profissional */
            foreach ($profissionais as $profissional) {
                $this->profissionais->removeElement($profissional);
            }
        } else {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Object must be an instance of Collection or ProfissionaisEntity.');
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Set profissionais
     *
     * @param Collection $profissionais
     * @return ServicosEntity
     */
    public function setProfissionais(Collection $profissionais): ServicosEntity
    {
        $this->profissionais = $profissionais;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @param $clinicaServicos
     * @return ServicosEntity
     */
    public function addClinicaServicos($clinicaServicos) : ServicosEntity
    {
        if ($clinicaServicos instanceof Collection) {
            foreach ($clinicaServicos as $clinicaServico) {
                $this->clinicaServicos->add($clinicaServico);
            }
        } elseif ($clinicaServicos instanceof ClinicasServicosEntity) {
            $this->clinicaServicos->add($clinicaServicos);
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return Collection
     */
    public function getClinicaServicos(): Collection
    {
        return $this->clinicaServicos;
    }

    /**
     * @param $clinicaServicos
     * @return ServicosEntity
     */
    public function removeClinicaServicos($clinicaServicos): ServicosEntity
    {
        if ($clinicaServicos instanceof Collection) {
            foreach ($clinicaServicos as $clinicaServico) {
                $this->clinicaServicos->removeElement($clinicaServico);
            }
        } elseif ($clinicaServicos instanceof ClinicasServicosEntity) {
            $this->clinicaServicos->removeElement($clinicaServicos);
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @param Collection $clinicaServicos
     * @return ServicosEntity
     */
    public function setClinicaServicos(Collection $clinicaServicos): ServicosEntity
    {
        $this->clinicaServicos = $clinicaServicos;
        return $this;
    }

}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Servicos;

use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\AbstractQuery;
use Application\Entity\Role;

/**
 * Class ServicosRepository
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\Servicos
 */
class ServicosRepository extends EntityRepository
{
    /**
     * Fetch All
     *
     * @param array|null $searchParam
     * @param array|null $orderBy
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|object
     */
    public function fetchAll(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('servicos');

        // Retorna apenas serviços de agendamento externo, pra quem não é GUEST.
        if (
            isset($searchParam['query']['role']) &&
            (
                $searchParam['query']['role'] === Role::ROLE_GUEST ||
                $searchParam['query']['role'] === Role::ROLE_CLIENTE
            )
        ) {
            $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('servicos.ativo', ':ativo'))
                ->setParameter(':ativo', true);

            // Por motivos de segurança não permitir passar o parâmetro ativo para clientes e convidados
            if (isset($searchParam['query']['ativo'])) {
                unset($searchParam['query']['ativo']);
            }
        }
        unset($searchParam['query']['role']);

        // Retorna os serviços que não possuam clínica ou que a clínica seja a informada
        if (isset($searchParam['query']) && isset($searchParam['query']['servicos.clinica'])) {
            // Verifica se é a clinica OU se clinica é NULL
            $qb->andWhere(
                $qb->expr()->orX(
                    $qb->expr()->eq('servicos.clinica', $searchParam['query']['servicos.clinica']),
                    $qb->expr()->isNull('servicos.clinica')
                )
            );

        }

        // Retorna somente serviços que não possuam clínica
        if (isset($searchParam['query']) && !isset($searchParam['query']['servicos.clinica'])) {
            // Verifica se clinica é NULL
            $qb->andWhere(
                $qb->expr()->orX(
                    $qb->expr()->isNull('servicos.clinica')
                )
            );
        }

        // Remove o parametro clinica do Array para não compara-lo novamente no mountRestrictions()
        unset($searchParam['query']['servicos.clinica']);

        // Traz na consulta os dados das tabelas relacionadas
        $qb->addSelect('categoria')
            ->addSelect('partial clinica.{id}')
            ->addSelect('clinicaServicos')
            ->leftJoin('servicos.categoria', 'categoria')
            ->leftJoin('servicos.clinica', 'clinica')
            ->leftJoin('servicos.clinicaServicos', 'clinicaServicos');


        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            $this->mountRestrictions($qb, $searchParam['query']);
        }

        if (!is_null($orderBy)) {
            foreach ($orderBy as $key => $value) {
                $qb->addOrderBy($key, $value);
            }
        } else {
            // Ordena por id DESC se não passar o parametro de ordenação
            $qb->addOrderBy('servicos.id', 'DESC');
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->setHydrationMode(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    /**
     * Fetch
     *
     * @param int $id
     * @param null $clinica
     * @param boolean $onlyActive
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|mixed|object
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetch($id, $clinica = null, $onlyActive = false)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('servicos');

        $qb->addSelect('categoria')
            ->addSelect('partial clinica.{id}')
            ->addSelect('clinicaServicos')
            ->leftJoin('servicos.categoria', 'categoria')
            ->leftJoin('servicos.clinica', 'clinica')
            ->leftJoin('servicos.clinicaServicos', 'clinicaServicos')
            ->where($qb->expr()->eq('servicos.id', ':id'))
            ->setParameter(':id', $id);

        if (null !== $clinica) {
            $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->orX(
                $qb->expr()->eq('clinica.id', ':clinica'),
                $qb->expr()->isNull('clinica'),
                $qb->expr()->eq('servicos.clinica', ':clinica')
            ))->setParameter(':clinica', $clinica);

            if ($onlyActive) {
                $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('servicos.ativo', ':ativo'))
                    ->setParameter(':ativo', true);
            }
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->getOneOrNullResult(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }
}

<?php

namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Servicos;

use Application\Entity\Role;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\ClinicasServicos\ClinicasServicosEntity;
use Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException;
use Zend\Stdlib\Parameters;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use Application\Rest\AbstractResourceListener;
use DoctrineModule\Stdlib\Hydrator\DoctrineObject as Hydrator;
use Application\Entity\User;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasRepository;
use Doctrine\DBAL\Exception\ForeignKeyConstraintViolationException;
use Exception;
use InvalidArgumentException;

class ServicosResource extends AbstractResourceListener
{
    /**
     * Create a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function create($data)
    {
        try {
            $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
            /** @var ServicosEntity $servico */
            $servico = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), new $this->entityClass());

            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            if ($clinica = $this->getClinica()) {
                $servico->setClinica($clinica);

                $link = new ClinicasServicosEntity();
                $link->setClinica($servico->getClinica())
                    ->setServico($servico)
                    ->setDescricao($servico->getDescricao())
                    ->setAgendamentoExterno($servico->isAgendamentoExterno())
                    ->setTempoMedioDuracao($servico->getTempoMedioDuracao())
                    ->setCategoria($servico->getCategoria())
                    ->setAtivo(true);

                $this->getObjectManager()->persist($link);
            }

            if (null === $clinica && ! $this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                return new ApiProblem(
                    401,
                    'Usuário não vinculado a Clínica.'
                );
            }

            $servico->setAtivo(true);

            $this->getObjectManager()->persist($servico);
            $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

            return $this->getRepository()->fetch($servico->getId());
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Delete a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @return bool|ApiProblem
     */
    public function delete($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var ServicosEntity $servico */
            if ($servico = $this->getRepository()->find($id)) {
                /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
                if ($clinica = $this->getClinica()) {
                    if ($this->getUser()->isAdmin() || $clinica->getId() === $servico->getClinica()->getId()) {
                        $clinica->removeServicos($servico);

                        $this->getObjectManager()->persist($clinica);

                        /** @var ClinicasServicosEntity $item */
                        foreach ($servico->getClinicaServicos() as $item) {
                            $this->getObjectManager()->remove($item);
                        }

                        $this->getObjectManager()->remove($servico);
                        $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                        return true;
                    }
                }

                if (null === $clinica && $this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                    $this->getObjectManager()->remove($servico);
                    $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                    return true;
                }
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Serviço não encontrado.'));
        } catch (ForeignKeyConstraintViolationException $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->info($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Serviço sendo usado'));
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
        try {
            $role = Role::ROLE_GUEST;

            try {
                /** @var User $user */
                if ($user = $this->getUser()) {
                    $role = $user->getRole()->first();
                }

                if ($user->isAdmin()) {
                    return parent::fetch($id);
                }

                if ($clinica = $this->getClinica()) {
                    $clinica = $clinica->getId();
                }
            } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
                $clinica = (integer)$this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica', null);
            }

            /** @var ServicosRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getRepository();

            if (
                $object = $repository->fetch(
                    $id, // ID do Registro
                    $clinica, // ID da Clínica
                    $role !== Role::ROLE_CLIENTE && $role !== Role::ROLE_GUEST
                )
            ) {
                return $object;
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Serviço não encontrado.'));
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch all or a subset of resources
     *
     * @param Parameters|array $params
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     * @throws NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetchAll($params = [])
    {
        try {
            if (!$params->offsetExists('query')) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', []);
            }

            try {
                /** @var User $user */
                if ($user = $this->getUser()) {
                    $role = $user->getRole()->first();
                }

                if ($clinica = $this->getClinica()) {
                    $clinica = $clinica->getId();
                }
            } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
                /** @var string $role */
                $role = Role::ROLE_GUEST;
                $clinica = (integer)$this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica', null);
            }

            if (null !== $clinica) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge(
                    $params->get('query'), [
                        'role' => $role,
                        'servicos.clinica' => $clinica
                    ]
                ));
            } else {
                $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge(
                    $params->get('query'),
                    [
                        'role' => $role
                    ]
                ));
            }

            return parent::fetchAll($params);
        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Patch (partial in-place update) a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function patch($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            if ($clinica = $this->getClinica()) {
                /** @var ServicosEntity $servico */
                if ($servico = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id, 'clinica' => $clinica])) {
                    $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
                    /** @var ServicosEntity $servico */
                    $servico = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), $servico);

                    if (! $servico->getClinicaServicos()->isEmpty()) {
                        /** @var ClinicasServicosEntity $clinicaServicos */
                        $clinicaServicos = $servico->getClinicaServicos()->first();
                        $clinicaServicos->setDescricao($servico->getDescricao())
                            ->setDescricao($servico->getDescricao())
                            ->setAgendamentoExterno($servico->isAgendamentoExterno())
                            ->setTempoMedioDuracao($servico->getTempoMedioDuracao())
                            ->setCategoria($servico->getCategoria())
                            ->setAtivo($servico->isAtivo());

                        $this->getObjectManager()->persist($clinicaServicos);
                    }

                    $this->getObjectManager()->persist($servico);
                    $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                    return ($this->getRepository()->fetch($id));
                }

                return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Serviço não encontrado'));
            }

            if ($this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                return parent::patch($id, $data);
            }

            return new ApiProblem(401, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Acesso negado'));
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function update($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            if ($clinica = $this->getClinica()) {
                /** @var ServicosEntity $servico */
                if ($servico = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id, 'clinica' => $clinica])) {
                    $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
                    /** @var ServicosEntity $servico */
                    $servico = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), $servico);

                    if (! $servico->getClinicaServicos()->isEmpty()) {
                        /** @var ClinicasServicosEntity $clinicaServicos */
                        $clinicaServicos = $servico->getClinicaServicos()->first();
                        $clinicaServicos->setDescricao($servico->getDescricao())
                            ->setDescricao($servico->getDescricao())
                            ->setAgendamentoExterno($servico->isAgendamentoExterno())
                            ->setTempoMedioDuracao($servico->getTempoMedioDuracao())
                            ->setCategoria($servico->getCategoria())
                            ->setAtivo($servico->isAtivo());

                        $this->getObjectManager()->persist($clinicaServicos);
                    }

                    $this->getObjectManager()->persist($servico);
                    $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                    return ($this->getRepository()->fetch($id));
                }

                return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Serviço não encontrado'));
            }

            if ($this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                return parent::update($id, $data);
            }

            return new ApiProblem(401, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Acesso negado'));
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get clinica
     *
     * @return ClinicasEntity|object|null
     * @throws NonUniqueResultException
     */
    private function getClinica(): ?ClinicasEntity
    {
        if ($id = (integer)$this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
            /** @var ClinicasRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClinicasEntity::class);

            if ($this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                return $repository->find($id);
            }

            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            if ($clinica = $repository->getClinicaUser($id, $this->getUser())) {
                return $clinica;
            }
        }

        return null;
    }

    /**
     * Get user
     *
     * @return User
     */
    private function getUser()
    {
        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getAuthenticationIdentity()) {
            return $identity['user'];
        }

        throw new InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Usuário não encontrado'));
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Servicos;

use Interop\Container\ContainerInterface;

/**
 * Class ServicosResourceFactory
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\Servicos
 */
class ServicosResourceFactory
{
    /**
     * @param ContainerInterface $services
     * @return ServicosResource
     * @throws \Psr\Container\ContainerExceptionInterface
     * @throws \Psr\Container\NotFoundExceptionInterface
     */
    public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $services)
    {
        /** @var \Zend\Log\Logger $logger */
        $logger = $services->get('log');

        /** @var \Zend\I18n\Translator\Translator $translator */
        $translator = $services->get('translator');

        /** @var \Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager $objectManager */
        $objectManager = $services->get(\Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager::class);

        $resource = new ServicosResource();
        $resource->setLogger($logger);
        $resource->setTranslator($translator);
        $resource->setObjectManager($objectManager);

        return $resource;
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\TabelaPrecos;

use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\TabelaServicos\TabelaServicosEntity;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\ArrayCollection;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\Collection;

/**
 * Class TabelaPrecosEntity
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\TabelaPrecos
 */
class TabelaPrecosEntity
{
    /**
     * @var int
     */
    protected $id;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $titulo;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $descricao;

    /**
     * @var bool
     */
    protected $ativo = true;
    /**
     * @var \DateTime
     */
    protected $dataValidade;

    /**
     * @var ClinicasEntity
     */
    protected $clinica;

    /**
     * @var bool
     */
    protected $exibirSite;

    /**
     * @var Collection
     */
    protected $tabelaServicos;

    /**
     * TabelaPrecosEntity constructor.
     */
    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->tabelaServicos = new ArrayCollection();
    }

    /**
     * @return int
     */
    public function getId(): int
    {
        return $this->id;
    }

    /**
     * @return string
     */
    public function getTitulo(): string
    {
        return $this->titulo;
    }

    /**
     * @param string $titulo
     * @return TabelaPrecosEntity
     */
    public function setTitulo(string $titulo): TabelaPrecosEntity
    {
        $this->titulo = $titulo;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return string
     */
    public function getDescricao(): string
    {
        return $this->descricao;
    }

    /**
     * @param string $descricao
     * @return TabelaPrecosEntity
     */
    public function setDescricao(string $descricao = null): TabelaPrecosEntity
    {
        $this->descricao = $descricao;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isAtivo(): bool
    {
        return $this->ativo;
    }

    /**
     * @param bool $ativo
     * @return TabelaPrecosEntity
     */
    public function setAtivo(bool $ativo): TabelaPrecosEntity
    {
        $this->ativo = $ativo;
        return $this;
    }

    // /**
    //  * @return \DateTime
    //  */
    public function getDataValidade()/*: \DateTime*/
    {
        return $this->dataValidade;
    }

    /**
     * @param \DateTime $dataValidade
     * @return TabelaPrecosEntity
     */
    public function setDataValidade(\DateTime $dataValidade = null): TabelaPrecosEntity
    {
        $this->dataValidade = $dataValidade;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return ClinicasEntity
     */
    public function getClinica(): ClinicasEntity
    {
        return $this->clinica;
    }

    /**
     * @param ClinicasEntity $clinica
     * @return TabelaPrecosEntity
     */
    public function setClinica(ClinicasEntity $clinica): TabelaPrecosEntity
    {
        $this->clinica = $clinica;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isExibirSite(): bool
    {
        return $this->exibirSite;
    }

    /**
     * @param bool $exibirSite
     * @return TabelaPrecosEntity
     */
    public function setExibirSite(bool $exibirSite = null): TabelaPrecosEntity
    {
        $this->exibirSite = $exibirSite;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @param $tabelaServicos
     * @return TabelaPrecosEntity
     */
    public function addTabelaServicos($tabelaServicos) : TabelaPrecosEntity
    {
        if ($tabelaServicos instanceof Collection) {
            foreach ($tabelaServicos as $tabelaServico) {
                $this->tabelaServicos->add($tabelaServico);
            }
        } elseif ($tabelaServicos instanceof TabelaServicosEntity) {
            $this->tabelaServicos->add($tabelaServicos);
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return Collection
     */
    public function getTabelaServicos(): Collection
    {
        return $this->tabelaServicos;
    }

    /**
     * @param $tabelaServicos
     * @return TabelaPrecosEntity
     */
    public function removeTabelaServicos($tabelaServicos): TabelaPrecosEntity
    {
        if ($tabelaServicos instanceof Collection) {
            foreach ($tabelaServicos as $tabelaServico) {
                $this->tabelaServicos->removeElement($tabelaServico);
            }
        } elseif ($tabelaServicos instanceof TabelaServicosEntity) {
            $this->tabelaServicos->removeElement($tabelaServicos);
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @param Collection $tabelaServicos
     * @return TabelaPrecosEntity
     */
    public function setTabelaServicos(Collection $tabelaServicos): TabelaPrecosEntity
    {
        $this->tabelaServicos = $tabelaServicos;
        return $this;
    }
    
}

<?php

namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\TabelaPrecos;

use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\AbstractQuery;
use Application\Entity\Role;

class TabelaPrecosRepository extends EntityRepository
{
    /**
     * Fetch all
     *
     * @param array|null $searchParam
     * @param array|null $orderBy
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|object
     */
    public function fetchAll(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('tabelaPreco');

        $qb->addSelect('tabelaServicos')
            ->addSelect('partial clinicasServicos.{id, descricao}')
            ->addSelect('partial servico.{id, titulo}')
            ->innerJoin('tabelaPreco.clinica', 'clinica')
            ->leftJoin('tabelaPreco.tabelaServicos', 'tabelaServicos')
            ->leftJoin('tabelaServicos.clinicasServicos', 'clinicasServicos')
            ->leftJoin('clinicasServicos.servico', 'servico');

        if (
            isset($searchParam['query']['role']) &&
            (
                $searchParam['query']['role'] === Role::ROLE_CLIENTE ||
                $searchParam['query']['role'] === Role::ROLE_GUEST
            )
        ) {
            $qb->where($qb->expr()->eq('tabelaPreco.ativo', ':ativo'))
                ->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('tabelaPreco.exibirSite', ':ativo'))
                ->setParameter(':ativo', true);
        }
        unset($searchParam['query']['role']);

        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            $this->mountRestrictions($qb, $searchParam['query']);
        }

        if (!is_null($orderBy)) {
            foreach ($orderBy as $key => $value) {
                $qb->addOrderBy($key, $value);
            }
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->setHydrationMode(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    /**
     * Fetch
     *
     * @param int $id
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|mixed|object
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetch($id, $clinica = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('tabelaPreco');

        $qb->addSelect('tabelaServicos')
            ->addSelect('partial clinicasServicos.{id, descricao}')
            ->addSelect('partial servico.{id, titulo}')
            ->leftJoin('tabelaPreco.tabelaServicos', 'tabelaServicos')
            ->leftJoin('tabelaServicos.clinicasServicos', 'clinicasServicos')
            ->leftJoin('clinicasServicos.servico', 'servico');

        $qb->where($qb->expr()->eq('tabelaPreco.id', ':id'))
            ->setParameter(':id', $id);

        if (null !== $clinica) {
            $qb->innerJoin('tabelaPreco.clinica', 'clinica')
                ->andWhere($qb->expr()->eq('clinica.id', ':clinica'))
                ->setParameter(':clinica', $clinica);
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->getOneOrNullResult(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\TabelaPrecos;

use Clinica\V1\Rest\ClinicasServicos\ClinicasServicosEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\TabelaServicos\TabelaServicosEntity;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use Application\Rest\AbstractResourceListener;
use DoctrineModule\Stdlib\Hydrator\DoctrineObject as Hydrator;
use Application\Entity\User;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasRepository;
use Doctrine\DBAL\Exception\ForeignKeyConstraintViolationException;

/**
 * Class TabelaPrecosResource
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\TabelaPrecos
 */
class TabelaPrecosResource extends AbstractResourceListener
{
    /**
     * Create
     *
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|mixed|object|ApiProblem
     */
    public function create($data)
    {
        try {
            $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
            $obj = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), new $this->entityClass());

            $clinica = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClinicasEntity::class);
            if(count($clinica->fetch($this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica'))) == 0) {
                return new ApiProblem(404, "Clínica não encontrada.");
            }

            if ($this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
                $clinica = $this->getObjectManager()->find(ClinicasEntity::class, $this->getClinica());
                if ($clinica != null) {
                    $obj->setClinica($clinica);
                }

                foreach ($obj->getTabelaServicos() as $tabelaServico) {
                    $tabelaServico->setTabela($obj);
                }
                $searchParams = [];
                $Params->query = [
                    'tabelaPreco.exibirSite' => true,
                    'tabelaPreco.clinica' => $this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')
                ];

                $result = parent::fetchAll($Params);
                $exibirSite = $this->getInputFilter()->getValue('exibirSite');

                if ($exibirSite == true && count($result) > 0) {
                    return new ApiProblem(422, $this->getTranslator()->translate('É possível exibir apenas uma tabela no site.'));
                }
            }
            $this->objectManager->persist($obj);
            $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

            return $this->getRepository()->fetch($obj->getId());
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var TabelaPrecosRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getRepository();

            if (! $identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getName() == 'guest') {
                if (! $this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                    if ($object = $repository->fetch($id, $this->getClinica())) {
                        return $object;
                    }

                    return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Tabela de Preços não encontrada.'));
                }
            }
            return parent::fetch($id);

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch all or a subset of resources
     *
     * @param  \Zend\Stdlib\Parameters|array $params
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetchAll($params = [])
    {
        try {
            if (!$params->offsetExists('query')) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', []);
            }

            $clinica = (integer) $this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica');

            $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge($params->get('query'), [
                'clinica.id' => $clinica
            ]));

            /** @var string $role */
            $role = 'guest';

            if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getAuthenticationIdentity()) {
                $role = $this->getUser()->getRole()->first();
            }

            if ($clinica && $clinica != null) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge($params->get('query'), ['role' => $role, 'tabelaPreco.clinica' => $clinica]));
            } else {
                $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge($params->get('query'), ['role' => $role]));
            }

            return parent::fetchAll($params);
        } catch (\InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function update($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            /** @var TabelaPrecosRepository $tabela */
            if ($tabela = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id, 'clinica' => $this->getClinica()])) {

                return parent::update($id, $data);
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Tabela de Preços não encontrada.'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * patch
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|mixed|object|ApiProblem
     */
    public function patch($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            if ($tabela = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id, 'clinica' => $this->getClinica()])) {
                $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
                $tabela = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), $tabela);

                foreach ($tabela->getTabelaServicos() as $tabelaServico) {
                    $tabelaServico->setTabela($tabela);
                }

                $this->objectManager->persist($tabela);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return $this->getRepository()->fetch($id, $this->getClinica());
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Register not found'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    public function delete($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var TabelaPrecosEntity $tabela */
            if ($tabela = $this->getRepository()->find($id)) {
                $tabela->setAtivo(false);

                $this->getObjectManager()->persist($tabela);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return true;
            }
            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Tabela de Preços não encontrada.'));

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get clinica
     *
     * @return integer|ClinicasEntity
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    private function getClinica()
    {
        if ($id = (integer) $this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
            if (!$this->isGuest())
                return $id;

            /** @var ClinicasRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClinicasEntity::class);

            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            if ($clinica = $repository->getClinicaUser($id, $this->getUser())) {
                return $clinica;
            }
        }

        throw new \InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Clínica não encontrada'));
    }

    /**
     * Get user
     *
     * @return User
     */
    private function getUser()
    {
        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getAuthenticationIdentity()) {
            return $identity['user'];
        }

        throw new \InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Usuário não encontrado'));
    }

    private function isGuest() {
        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getName() == 'guest') {
            return true;
        }
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\TabelaPrecos;

use Interop\Container\ContainerInterface;
/**
 * Class TabelaPrecosResourceFactory
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\TabelaPrecos
 */

{

     * @param ContainerInterface $services
     * @return TabelaPrecosResource
     * @throws \Psr\Container\ContainerExceptionInterface
     * @throws \Psr\Container\NotFound'ExceptionInterface
     */
    public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $services)
    {
        /** @var \Zend\Log\Logger $logger */
        $logger = $services->get('log');

        /** @var \Zend\I18n\Translator\Translator $translator */
        $translator = $services->get('translator');

        /** @var \Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager $objectManager */
        $objectManager = $services->get(\Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager::class);

        $resource = new TabelaPrecosResource();
        $resource->setLogger($logger);
        $resource->setTranslator($translator);
        $resource->setObjectManager($objectManager);

        return $resource;
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\TabelaServicos;

use Clinica\V1\Rest\ClinicasServicos\ClinicasServicosEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Servicos\ServicosEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\TabelaPrecos\TabelaPrecosEntity;

class TabelaServicosEntity
{
    const APARTIR = 'A partir';
    const PRECOFIXO = 'Preco fixo';
    const GRATUITO = 'Gratuito';
    const SOBCONSULTA = 'Sob Consulta';

    /**
     * @var int
     */
    protected $id;

    /**
     * @var TabelaPrecosEntity
     */
    protected $tabela;

    /**
     * @var ClinicasServicosEntity
     */
    protected $clinicasServicos;

    /**
     * @var float
     */
    protected $precoServico;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $tipoPreco;

    /**
     * @return int
     */
    public function getId(): int
    {
        return $this->id;
    }

    /**
     * @return TabelaPrecosEntity
     */
    public function getTabela(): TabelaPrecosEntity
    {
        return $this->tabela;
    }

    /**
     * @param TabelaPrecosEntity $tabela
     * @return TabelaServicosEntity
     */
    public function setTabela(TabelaPrecosEntity $tabela): TabelaServicosEntity
    {
        $this->tabela = $tabela;
        return $this;
    }

    public function getClinicasServicos()
    {
        return $this->clinicasServicos;
    }

    /**
     * @param ClinicasServicosEntity $clinicasServicos
     * @return TabelaServicosEntity
     */
    public function setClinicasServicos(ClinicasServicosEntity $clinicasServicos): TabelaServicosEntity
    {
        $this->clinicasServicos = $clinicasServicos;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return float
     */
    public function getPrecoServico(): float
    {
        return $this->precoServico;
    }

    /**
     * @param float $precoServico
     * @return TabelaServicosEntity
     */
    public function setPrecoServico(float $precoServico = null): TabelaServicosEntity
    {
        $this->precoServico = $precoServico;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return string
     */
    public function getTipoPreco(): string
    {
        return $this->tipoPreco;
    }

    /**
     * @param string $tipoPreco
     * @return TabelaServicosEntity
     */
    public function setTipoPreco(string $tipoPreco): TabelaServicosEntity
    {
        if (!in_array($tipoPreco, array(self::APARTIR, self::PRECOFIXO, self::SOBCONSULTA, self::GRATUITO))) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException("Tipo de preço inválido");
        }

        $this->tipoPreco = $tipoPreco;
        return $this;
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Usuarios;

use Application\Entity\User;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\ArrayCollection;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\Collection;
use Telefone\Entity\Telefone;

class UsuariosEntity
{
    const GENERO_FEMININO = 'Feminino';
    const GENERO_MASCULINO = 'Masculino';
    const GENERO_OUTRO = 'Outro ou não informado';

    const TIPOVINCULO_CLT = 'CLT';
    const TIPOVINCULO_PJ= 'Contrato PJ';
    const TIPOVINCULO_TERCEIRIZADO = 'Terceirizado';
    const TIPOVINCULO_OUTROS = 'Outros';

    public static $clinicaSelecionada;

    /**
     * @var integer
     */
    protected $id;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $nome;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $email;

    /**
     * @var \DateTime
     */
    protected $dataNascimento;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $cpf;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $genero;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $tipoVinculo;

    /**
     * @var bool
     */
    protected $ativo = true;

    /**
     * @var User
     */
    protected $user;

    /**
     * @var Collection
     */
    protected $telefones;

    /**
     * @var ClinicasEntity
     */
    protected $clinicas;

    /**
     * @var ClinicasEntity
     */
    protected $clinica;

    /**
     * UsuariosEntity constructor.
     */
    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->telefones = new ArrayCollection();
        $this->clinicas = new ArrayCollection();
    }

    /**
     * Get id
     *
     * @return int
     */
    public function getId(): int
    {
        return $this->id;
    }

    /**
     * Get nome
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getNome(): string
    {
        return $this->nome;
    }

    /**
     * Set nome
     *
     * @param string $nome
     * @return UsuariosEntity
     */
    public function setNome(string $nome): UsuariosEntity
    {
        $this->nome = $nome;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get email
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getEmail(): string
    {
        return $this->email;
    }

    /**
     * Set email
     *
     * @param string $email
     * @return UsuariosEntity
     */
    public function setEmail(string $email): UsuariosEntity
    {
        $this->email = $email;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return \DateTime|null
     */
    public function getDataNascimento(): ?\DateTime
    {
        return $this->dataNascimento;
    }

    /**
     * Set data nascimento
     *
     * @param \DateTime|null $dataNascimento
     * @return UsuariosEntity
     */
    public function setDataNascimento(\DateTime $dataNascimento = null): UsuariosEntity
    {
        $this->dataNascimento = $dataNascimento;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get cpf
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getCpf(): ?string
    {
        return $this->cpf;
    }

    /**
     * Set cpf
     *
     * @param string|null $cpf
     * @return UsuariosEntity
     */
    public function setCpf(string $cpf = null): UsuariosEntity
    {
        $this->cpf = $cpf;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get genero
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getGenero(): string
    {
        return $this->genero;
    }

    /**
     * Set genero
     *
     * @param string $genero
     * @return UsuariosEntity
     */
    public function setGenero(string $genero): UsuariosEntity
    {

        if (!in_array($genero, array(self::GENERO_FEMININO, self::GENERO_MASCULINO, self::GENERO_OUTRO))) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException("Gênero inválido");
        }
        $this->genero = $genero;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get tipoVinculo
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getTipoVinculo(): string
    {
        return $this->tipoVinculo;
    }

    /**
     * Set tipoVinculo
     *
     * @param string $tipoVinculo
     * @return UsuariosEntity
     */
    public function setTipoVinculo(string $tipoVinculo): UsuariosEntity
    {

        if (!in_array($tipoVinculo, array(self::TIPOVINCULO_CLT, self::TIPOVINCULO_PJ, self::TIPOVINCULO_TERCEIRIZADO, self::TIPOVINCULO_OUTROS))) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException("Tipo Vínculo inválido");
        }
        $this->tipoVinculo = $tipoVinculo;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isAtivo(): bool
    {
        return $this->ativo;
    }

    /**
     * @param bool $ativo
     * @return UsuariosEntity
     */
    public function setAtivo(bool $ativo = true): UsuariosEntity
    {
        $this->ativo = $ativo;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get user
     *
     * @return User
     */
    public function getUser(): User
    {
        return $this->user;
    }

    /**
     * Set user
     *
     * @param User $user
     * @return UsuariosEntity
     */
    public function setUser(User $user): UsuariosEntity
    {
        $this->user = $user;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Add telefones
     *
     * @param Telefone|Collection $telefones
     * @return UsuariosEntity
     */
    public function addTelefones($telefones): UsuariosEntity
    {
        if ($telefones instanceof Collection) {
            foreach ($telefones as $telefone) {
                $this->telefones->add($telefone);
            }
        } elseif ($telefones instanceof Telefone) {
            $this->telefones->add($telefones);
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get telefones
     *
     * @return Collection
     */
    public function getTelefones(): Collection
    {
        return $this->telefones;
    }

    /**
     * Remove telefones
     *
     * @param Telefone|Collection $telefones
     * @return UsuariosEntity
     */
    public function removeTelefones($telefones): UsuariosEntity
    {
        if ($telefones instanceof Collection) {
            foreach ($telefones as $telefone) {
                $this->telefones->removeElement($telefone);
            }
        } elseif ($telefones instanceof Telefone) {
            $this->telefones->removeElement($telefones);
        } else {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Object must be an instance of Collection or Telefone.');
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Set telefones
     *
     * @param Collection $telefones
     * @return UsuariosEntity
     */
    public function setTelefones(Collection $telefones): UsuariosEntity
    {
        $this->telefones = $telefones;

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Add clinicas
     *
     * @param ClinicasEntity|Collection $clinicas
     * @return UsuariosEntity
     */
    public function addClinicas($clinicas): UsuariosEntity
    {
        if ($clinicas instanceof ClinicasEntity) {
            $this->clinicas->add($clinicas);
        } elseif ($clinicas instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            foreach ($clinicas as $clinica) {
                $this->clinicas->add($clinica);
            }
        } else {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Object must be an instance of Collection or ClinicasEntity.');
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Get clinicas
     *
     * @return Collection
     */
    public function getClinicas(): Collection
    {
        return $this->clinicas;
    }

    /**
     * Has clinica
     *
     * @param int $id
     * @return bool
     */
    public function hasClinica(int $id)
    {
        return $this->clinicas->exists(function (ClinicasEntity $clinica) use ($id) {
            return (int) $clinica->getId() === $id;
        });
    }

    /**
     * Add clinicas
     *
     * @param ClinicasEntity|Collection $clinicas
     * @return UsuariosEntity
     */
    public function removeClinicas($clinicas): UsuariosEntity
    {
        if ($clinicas instanceof ClinicasEntity) {
            $this->clinicas->removeElement($clinicas);
        } elseif ($clinicas instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            foreach ($clinicas as $clinica) {
                $this->clinicas->removeElement($clinica);
            }
        } else {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Object must be an instance of Collection or ClinicasEntity.');
        }

        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Set clinica
     *
     * @param Collection $clinicas
     * @return UsuariosEntity
     */
    public function setClinicas(Collection $clinicas): UsuariosEntity
    {
        $this->clinicas = $clinicas;
        return $this;
    }


    /**
     * @return ClinicasEntity
     */
    public function getClinica(): ClinicasEntity
    {
        return $this->clinica;
    }

    /**
     * @param ClinicasEntity $clinica
     * @return UsuariosEntity
     */
    public function setClinica(ClinicasEntity $clinica = null): UsuariosEntity
    {
        $this->clinica = $clinica;
        return $this;
    }
}

<?php

namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Usuarios;

use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\AbstractQuery;

/**
 * Class UsuariosRepository
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\Usuarios
 */
class UsuariosRepository extends EntityRepository
{
    /**
     * Fetch All
     *
     * @param array|null $searchParam
     * @param array|null $orderBy
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|object
     */
    public function fetchAll(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('usuarios');

        // Verifica se existe o parametro clinica
        if(isset($searchParam['query']) && isset($searchParam['query']['usuarios.clinica'])) {
          //foreach para percorrer o array contendo as clinicas
          foreach ( $searchParam['query']['usuarios.clinica'] as $clinicasDoUsuario) {
            //Filtra onde pelas clinicas os profissionais
            $qb->orWhere(
              $qb->expr()->eq('clinicas.id', $clinicasDoUsuario)   
            ); 
          }
        }

        // Remove o parametro clinica do Array para não compara-lo novamente no mountRestrictions()
        unset($searchParam['query']['usuarios.clinica']);

        //Traz na consulta os dados das tabelas relacionadas
        $qb ->select('partial usuarios.{id, nome, email, dataNascimento, cpf, genero, tipoVinculo, ativo}')
            ->addSelect('partial user.{id, username}')
            ->addSelect('roles')
            ->addSelect('telefones')
            ->addSelect('partial clinicas.{id, nomeFantasia}')

            ->innerJoin('usuarios.user','user')
            ->innerJoin('user.roles','roles')
            ->leftJoin('usuarios.telefones', 'telefones')
            ->leftJoin('usuarios.clinicas', 'clinicas');


        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            $this->mountRestrictions($qb, $searchParam['query']);
        }

        if (! is_null($orderBy)) {
            foreach ($orderBy as $key => $value) {
                $qb->addOrderBy($key, $value);
            }
        } else {
            // Ordena por id DESC se não passar o parametro de ordenação
            $qb->addOrderBy('usuarios.id', 'DESC');
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->setHydrationMode(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    /**
     * Fetch
     *
     * @param User $user
     * @param null $clinica
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|mixed|object
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetch($user, $clinica = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('usuarios');

        $qb ->select('partial usuarios.{id, nome, email, dataNascimento, cpf, genero, tipoVinculo, ativo}')
            ->addSelect('partial user.{id, username}')
            ->addSelect('roles')
            ->addSelect('telefones')
            ->addSelect('partial clinicas.{id, nomeFantasia}')

            ->innerJoin('usuarios.user','user')
            ->innerJoin('user.roles','roles')
            ->leftJoin('usuarios.telefones', 'telefones')
            ->leftJoin('usuarios.clinicas', 'clinicas');

        $qb->where($qb->expr()->eq('user.id', ':user'))
            ->setParameter(':user', $user->getId());

        if (null !== $clinica && 0 !== $clinica) {
            $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->orX(
                $qb->expr()->eq('clinicas.id', ':clinica')
            ))->setParameter(':clinica', $clinica);
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->getOneOrNullResult(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }
}

<?php

namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Usuarios;

use Application\Entity\Role;
use Application\Entity\User;
use Application\Rest\AbstractUserResourceListener;
use Application\Service\OAuth2ClientService;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Profissionais\ProfissionaisRepository;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;
use DoctrineModule\Stdlib\Hydrator\DoctrineObject as Hydrator;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasRepository;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Profissionais\ProfissionaisEntity;

class UsuariosResource extends AbstractUserResourceListener
{

    /**
     * @var OAuth2ClientService
     */
    protected $oAuth2ClientService;

    /**
     * Default role
     *
     * @var string
     */
    protected $defaultUserRole = Role::ROLE_RECEPCIONISTA;

    /**
     * Create
     *
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return array|ApiProblem
     */
    public function create($data)
    {
        try {
            $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
            /** @var UsuariosEntity $object */
            $object = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), new $this->entityClass());

            if (
                $this->getInputFilter()->get('user')->has('password') &&
                null !== $this->getInputFilter()->get('user')->get('password')->getValue() &&
                '' !== $this->getInputFilter()->get('user')->get('password')->getValue()
            ) {
                // Criptogra senha do usuário
                $object->getUser()->setPassword(
                    $this->oAuth2ClientService->createPasswordHash(
                        $this->getInputFilter()->get('user')->getValue('password')
                    )
                );
            }

            $this->oAuth2ClientService->create($object->getUser());

            // Added user role
            if ($object->getUser()->getRoles()->isEmpty()) {
                $object->getUser()->addRoles($this->getUserRole());
            }

            $object->getUser()->setPrimeiroLogin(true);

            if ($this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
                /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
                $clinica = $this->getObjectManager()->find(ClinicasEntity::class, $this->getClinica());
                if ($clinica != null) {
                    $object->setClinica($clinica);
                    $clinica->addUsuarios($object);
                }
            }

            $this->getObjectManager()->persist($object);
            $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

            return $this->getRepository()->fetch($this->getUser());
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Patch (partial in-place update) a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function patch($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            /** @var UsuariosEntity $object */
            if ($object = $this->getRepository()->find($id)) {
                $roles = clone $object->getUser()->getRoles();
                $password = $object->getUser()->getPassword();

                $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
                /** @var UsuariosEntity $object */
                $object = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), $object);

                if (
                    $this->getInputFilter()->get('user')->has('password') &&
                    null !== $this->getInputFilter()->get('user')->getValue('password')
                ) {
                    if (method_exists($object, 'getUser')) {
                        /** @var User $user */
                        $user = $object->getUser();

                        // Criptogra senha do usuário
                        $user->setPassword(
                            $this->oAuth2ClientService->createPasswordHash(
                                $this->getInputFilter()->get('user')->getValue('password')
                            )
                        );

                        $this->oAuth2ClientService->create($user);

                        $this->getObjectManager()->persist($user);
                    }
                } else {
                    $object->getUser()->setPassword($password);
                }

                // Added user role
                if ($object->getUser()->getRoles()->isEmpty()) {
                    if (! $roles->isEmpty()) {
                        $object->getUser()->setRoles($roles);
                    } else {
                        $object->getUser()->addRoles($this->getUserRole());
                    }
                }

                $this->getObjectManager()->persist($object);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return $this->getRepository()->fetch($this->getUser());
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Register not found.'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch all or a subset of resources
     *
     * @param \Zend\Stdlib\Parameters|array $params
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetchAll($params = [])
    {
        try {
            if (!$this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                $params = $this->getParamsUsuario($params);
            }

            return parent::fetchAll($params);
        } catch (\InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch a resource
     *
     * @param mixed $id
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var UsuariosRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getRepository();

            $user = $this->getUser();
            if($id != 'me') $user = $this->getThisUser($id);
            
            if (!$user->isAdmin()) {
                
                $object = $repository->fetch($user, $this->getClinica());
                if ($object) {
                    return $object;
                }

                return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Usuário não encontrado.'));
            }
            return $repository->fetch($user,null);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get clinica
     *
     * @return integer|ClinicasEntity
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    private function getClinica()
    {
        if ($id = $this->getClinicasUsuario()) {
            if (!$this->isGuest())
                return $id[0];

            /** @var ClinicasRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClinicasEntity::class);

            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            if ($clinica = $repository->getClinicaUser($id[0], $this->getUser())) {
                return $clinica;
            }
        }

        throw new \InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Clínica não encontrada'));
    }

    /**
     * Get this User
     *
     * @param int $id
     * @return User
     */
    private function getThisUser(int $id)
    {
        /** @var UsuariosRepository $repository */
        $repository = $this->getRepository();
        $usuario = $repository->findOneBy(['id' => $id]);
        
        /** @var User $user */
        if ($user = $usuario->getUser()) {
            return $user;
        }

        throw new InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Usuário não encontrado'));
    }


    /**
     * Get user
     *
     * @return User
     */
    private function getUser()
    {
        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getAuthenticationIdentity()) {
            return $identity['user'];
        }

        throw new \InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Usuário não encontrado'));
    }

    /**
     * @return bool
     */
    private function isGuest()
    {
        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getName() == 'guest') {
            return true;
        }

        return false;
    }

    /**
     * Retorna um array de clínicas nas quais o usuário possui relacionamento
     *
     * @return int[]
     */
    private function getClinicasUsuario()
    {
        // Se o usuário for administrador retorna o ID da URL
        if ($this->getUser()->getRoles()->first()->getRoleId() === Role::ROLE_ADMIN) {
            return [
                (int)$this->event->getRouteParam('clinica')
            ];
        }

        /** @var UsuariosRepository $repository */
        $repository = $this->getRepository();

        // Se usuário for profissional altera o repository
        if ($this->getUser()->getRoles()->first()->getRoleId() === Role::ROLE_PROFISSIONAL) {
            /** @var ProfissionaisRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ProfissionaisEntity::class);
        }

        /** @var UsuariosEntity|ProfissionaisEntity $userLogado */
        $userLogado = $repository->findOneBy([
            'user' => $this->getUser()->getId()
        ]);

        $clinicas = [];
        /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
        foreach ($userLogado->getClinicas() as $clinica) {
            $clinicas[] = $clinica->getId();
        };

        return $clinicas;
    }

    private function getParamsUsuario($params)
    {
        if (!$params->offsetExists('query')) {
            $params->offsetSet('query', []);
        }

        if ($clinicas = $this->getClinicasUsuario()) {
            $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge($params->get('query'), ['usuarios.clinica' => $clinicas]));
        }

        return $params;
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Usuarios;

use Interop\Container\ContainerInterface;

/**
 * Class UsuariosResourceFactory
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\Usuarios
 */
class UsuariosResourceFactory
{
    /**
     * @param ContainerInterface $services
     * @return UsuariosResource
     * @throws \Psr\Container\ContainerExceptionInterface
     * @throws \Psr\Container\NotFoundExceptionInterface
     */
    public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $services)
    {
        /** @var \Zend\Log\Logger $logger */
        $logger = $services->get('log');

        /** @var \Zend\I18n\Translator\Translator $translator */
        $translator = $services->get('translator');

        /** @var \Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager $objectManager */
        $objectManager = $services->get(\Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager::class);

        /** @var \Application\Service\OAuth2ClientService $oAuth2ClientService */
        $oAuth2ClientService = $services->get(\Application\Service\OAuth2ClientService::class);

        $resource = new UsuariosResource();
        $resource->setLogger($logger);
        $resource->setTranslator($translator);
        $resource->setObjectManager($objectManager);
        $resource->setOAuth2ClientService($oAuth2ClientService);

        return $resource;
    }
}

namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\VendaPagamentos;

use Clinica\V1\Rest\Vendas\VendasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;

class VendaPagamentosEntity
{
    /**
     * @var int
     */
    protected $id;

     * @var string

     */

     * @var ClinicasEntity
     */

    /**
     * @var VendasEntity

     */

    }

     */

    {
        $this->id = $id;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return string
     */
    public function getFormaPagamento(): string
    {
        return $this->formaPagamento;
    }

    /**
     * @param string $formaPagamento
     * @return VendaPagamentosEntity
     */
    public function setFormaPagamento(string $formaPagamento = null): VendaPagamentosEntity
    {
        $this->formaPagamento = $formaPagamento;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @return \DateTime
     */
    public function getDataHora(): \DateTime
    {
        return $this->dataHora;
    }

    /**
     * @param \DateTime $dataHora

     */
    public function setDataHora(\DateTime $dataHora = null): VendaPagamentosEntity
    {
        $this->dataHora = $dataHora;
        return $this;

    /**

     */

    {

    {

    /**
