<?php

namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\VendaPagamentos;

use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\Query;
use Doctrine\ORM\AbstractQuery;

class VendaPagamentosRepository extends EntityRepository
{
    /**
     * Fetch all
     *
     * @param array|null $searchParam
     * @param array|null $orderBy
     * @return Query|object|array
     */
    public function fetchAll(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('vendaPagamentos');


        //Traz na consulta os dados da clinica
        $qb ->addSelect('venda')
            ->addSelect('partial clinica.{id, nomeFantasia}')

            ->leftJoin('vendaPagamentos.venda', 'venda')
            ->leftJoin('vendaPagamentos.clinica', 'clinica');

            // Verifica se existe o parametro clinica
            if (isset($searchParam['query']) && isset($searchParam['query']['vendaPagamentos.clinica'])) {
                // Verifica se é a clinica OU se clinica é NULL
                $qb->where(
                    $qb->expr()->orX(
                        $qb->expr()->eq('vendaPagamentos.clinica', $searchParam['query']['vendaPagamentos.clinica']),
                        $qb->expr()->isNull('vendaPagamentos.clinica')
                    )
                );
            } elseif ((! $searchParam['query']['clinica.id'])) {
                // Verifica se clinica é NULL
                $qb->where(
                    $qb->expr()->isNull('vendaPagamentos.clinica')
                );
            }
        // Remove o parametro clinica do Array para não compara-lo novamente no mountRestrictions()
        unset($searchParam['query']['vendaPagamentos.clinica']);

        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            // Compara os demais parametros passados na URL
            $this->mountRestrictions($qb, $searchParam['query']);
        }

        // Se for passado o orderBy monta a ordernação
        if (! is_null($orderBy)) {
            foreach ($orderBy as $key => $value) {
                $qb->addOrderBy($key, $value);
            }
        }  else {
            // Ordena por id DESC se não passar o parametro de ordenação
            $qb->addOrderBy('vendaPagamentos.id', 'DESC');
        }


        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->setHydrationMode(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    /**
     * Fetch
     *
     * @param integer $id
     * @return Query|object|array
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetch($id, $clinica = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('vendaPagamentos');

        $qb ->addSelect('venda')
            ->addSelect('partial clinica.{id, nomeFantasia}')

            ->leftJoin('vendaPagamentos.venda', 'venda')
            ->leftJoin('vendaPagamentos.clinica', 'clinica');

        $qb->where($qb->expr()->eq('vendaPagamentos.id', ':id'))
            ->setParameter(':id', $id);

        if (null !== $clinica) {
            $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->orX(
                $qb->expr()->eq('clinica.id', ':clinica'),
                $qb->expr()->eq('vendaPagamentos.clinica', ':clinica')
            ))->setParameter(':clinica', $clinica);
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->getOneOrNullResult(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\VendaPagamentos;

use Application\Rest\AbstractResourceListener;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;
use Doctrine\DBAL\Exception\ForeignKeyConstraintViolationException;

/**
 * Class VendaPagamentosResource
 *
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\VendaPagamentos
 */
class VendaPagamentosResource extends AbstractResourceListener
{

    /**
     * Create
     *
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return array|ApiProblem
     */
    public function create($data)
    {
        try {
            if ($clinica = (integer) $this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
                $this->getInputFilter()->get('clinica')->setValue($clinica);
            }

            return parent::create($data);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Delete a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @return bool|ApiProblem
     */
    public function delete($id)
    {
        try {
            $clinica = (integer) $this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica');
           

            /** @var VendaPagamentosEntity $vendaPagamentos */
            if ($vendaPagamentos = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id, 'clinica' => $clinica])) {

                $this->getObjectManager()->remove($vendaPagamentos);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return true;
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Pagamento não encontrado.'));

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var VendaPagamentosRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getRepository();

            $clinica = (integer) $this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica');

            if ($object = $repository->fetch($id, $clinica)) {
                return $object;
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Pagamento não encontrado.'));

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch all or a subset of resources
     *
     * @param  \Zend\Stdlib\Parameters|array $params
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetchAll($params = [])
    {
        try {
            if (!$params->offsetExists('query')) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', []);
            }

            if ($clinica = (integer) $this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge($params->get('query'), [
                    'vendaPagamentos.clinica' => $clinica
                ]));
            }

            return parent::fetchAll($params);
        } catch (\InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Patch (partial in-place update) a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function patch($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            if ($clinica = (integer) $this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
                $this->getInputFilter()->get('clinica')->setValue($clinica);
            }
            if ($id = (integer) $this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('id')) {
                $this->getInputFilter()->get('id')->setValue($id);
            }

            /** @var VendaPagamentosEntity $vendaPagamentos */
            if ($vendaPagamentos = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id, 'clinica' => $clinica])) {
                return parent::patch($id, $data);
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Pagamento não encontrada.'));

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function update($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            return parent::update($id, $data);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Vendas;

use Clinica\V1\Rest\VendaPagamentos\VendaPagamentosEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Agendas\AgendasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Orcamentos\OrcamentosEntity;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\ArrayCollection;
use Doctrine\Common\Collections\Collection;

class VendasEntity
{

    /**
     * @var int
     */
    protected $id;

    /**
     * @var bool
     */
    protected $direta = true;

    /**
     * @var bool
     */
    protected $pago = true;

    /**
     * @var bool
     */
    protected $cancelado = false;

    /**
     * @var OrcamentosEntity
     */
    protected $orcamento;

    /**
     * @var VendaPagamentosEntity
     */
    protected $pagamentos;

    /**
     * @var AgendasEntity
     */
    protected $agendas;

    /**
     * @var VendasCategoriasEntity
     */
    protected $categorias;

    /**
     * @var
     */
    protected $estornado = false;

    /**
     * @var \DateTime
     */
    protected $dataHora;

    /**
     * VendasEntity constuctor.
     */
    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->pagamentos = new ArrayCollection();
        $this->agendas = new ArrayCollection();
        $this->categorias = new ArrayCollection();
    }

    /**
     * @return int
     */
    public function getId(): int
    {

    /**

    /**

    /**

     */
    public function addPagamentos($pagamentos): VendasEntity
    {
        if ($pagamentos instanceof VendaPagamentosEntity) {
            $this->pagamentos->add($pagamentos);
        } elseif ($pagamentos instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var VendaPagamentosEntity $pagamento */
            foreach ($pagamentos as $pagamento) {
                $this->pagamentos->add($pagamento);
            }
        } else {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Object must be an instance of Collection or VendaPagamentosEntity.');

        } elseif ($pagamentos instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var VendaPagamentosEntity $pagamento */
            foreach ($pagamentos as $pagamento) {

        } else {

    /**

    public function addAgendas($agendas): VendasEntity
    {
        if ($agendas instanceof AgendasEntity) {
            $this->agendas->add($agendas);
        } elseif ($agendas instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var AgendasEntity $agenda */
            foreach ($agendas as $agenda) {
                $this->agendas->add($agenda);

        } else {

    /**

    /**

        } elseif ($agendas instanceof Collection) {
            /** @var AgendasEntity $agenda */
            foreach ($agendas as $agenda) {

        } else {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Object must be an instance of Collection or AgendasEntity.');

    /**

    /**

    /**

    /**

            foreach ($categorias as $categoria) {

            }
        } else {

    /**

        return $this;
    }
}

<?php

namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Vendas;

use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\AbstractQuery;
use Doctrine\ORM\Query\Expr\Join;

/**
 * Class VendasRepository
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\Servicos
 */
class VendasRepository extends EntityRepository
{
    /**
     * Fetch All
     *
     * @param array|null $searchParam
     * @param array|null $orderBy
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|object
     */
    public function fetchAll(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('vendas');

        // Verifica se existe o parametro clinica
        if(isset($searchParam['query']) && isset($searchParam['query']['vendas.clinica'])) {
            // Verifica se é a clinica
            $qb->andWhere(
                $qb->expr()->eq('orcamento.clinica', $searchParam['query']['vendas.clinica'])
            );

            // Remove o parametro clinica do Array para não compara-lo novamente no mountRestrictions()
            unset($searchParam['query']['vendas.clinica']);
        }

        //Traz na consulta os dados das tabelas relacionadas
        $qb ->addSelect('categorias')
            ->addSelect('pagamentos')
            ->addSelect('orcamento')
            ->addSelect('clinica')
            ->addSelect('partial cliente.{id,nome,email,dataNascimento,genero,cpf,convenios,nomeDependentes,origem,ativo}')
            ->addSelect('telefonesCliente')
            ->addSelect('tabelaPreco')
            ->addSelect('profissionalAvaliador')
            ->addSelect('partial orcamentosServicos.{id,servico,profissional,preco,comissaoPaga}')
            ->addSelect('servico')
            ->addSelect('servicoOrcamento')
            ->addSelect('agendas')
            ->addSelect('servicos')
            ->addSelect('orcamentoServicoAgenda')
            ->addSelect('servicoAgendas')
            ->addSelect('partial servicoGlobal.{id, titulo}')
            ->addSelect('profissional')
            ->addSelect('profissionalIntervalos')

            ->leftJoin('vendas.categorias', 'categorias')
            ->leftJoin('vendas.pagamentos', 'pagamentos')
            ->leftJoin('vendas.orcamento', 'orcamento')
            ->leftJoin('orcamento.clinica', 'clinica')
            ->leftJoin('orcamento.cliente', 'cliente')
            ->leftJoin('cliente.telefones', 'telefonesCliente')
            ->leftJoin('orcamento.tabelaPreco', 'tabelaPreco')
            ->leftJoin('orcamento.profissionalAvaliador', 'profissionalAvaliador')
            ->leftJoin('orcamento.orcamentosServicos', 'orcamentosServicos')
            ->leftJoin('orcamentosServicos.servico', 'servico')
            ->leftJoin('servico.servico', 'servicoOrcamento')
            ->leftJoin('vendas.agendas', 'agendas', Join::WITH, $qb->expr()->neq('agendas.status', ':status'))
            ->leftJoin('agendas.servicos', 'servicos')
            ->leftJoin('servicos.orcamentoServico', 'orcamentoServicoAgenda')
            ->leftJoin('servicos.servico', 'servicoAgendas')
            ->leftJoin('servicoAgendas.servico', 'servicoGlobal')
            ->leftJoin('agendas.profissional', 'profissional')
            ->leftJoin('profissional.profissionalIntervalos', 'profissionalIntervalos')
            ->setParameter(':status', 'Cancelado');

        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            $this->mountRestrictions($qb, $searchParam['query']);
        }

        if (! is_null($orderBy)) {
            foreach ($orderBy as $key => $value) {
                $qb->addOrderBy($key, $value);
            }
        } else {
            // Ordena por id DESC se não passar o parametro de ordenação
            $qb->addOrderBy('vendas.id', 'DESC');
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->setHydrationMode(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    /**
     * Fetch
     *
     * @param int $id
     * @param null $clinica
     * @return array|\Doctrine\ORM\Query|mixed|object
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetch($id, $clinica = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('vendas');

        $qb ->addSelect('categorias')
            ->addSelect('pagamentos')
            ->addSelect('orcamento')
            ->addSelect('clinica')
            ->addSelect('partial cliente.{id,nome,email,dataNascimento,genero,cpf,convenios,nomeDependentes,origem,ativo}')
            ->addSelect('telefonesCliente')
            ->addSelect('tabelaPreco')
            ->addSelect('profissionalAvaliador')
            ->addSelect('orcamentosServicos')
            ->addSelect('servico')
            ->addSelect('partial tabelaServico.{id, tipoPreco}')
            ->addSelect('servicoOrcamento')
            ->addSelect('agendas')
            ->addSelect('servicos')
            ->addSelect('orcamentoServicoAgenda')
            ->addSelect('servicoAgendas')
            ->addSelect('partial servicoGlobal.{id, titulo}')
            ->addSelect('profissional')
            ->addSelect('profissionalIntervalos')

            ->leftJoin('vendas.categorias', 'categorias')
            ->leftJoin('vendas.pagamentos', 'pagamentos')
            ->leftJoin('vendas.orcamento', 'orcamento')
            ->leftJoin('orcamento.clinica', 'clinica')
            ->leftJoin('orcamento.cliente', 'cliente')
            ->leftJoin('cliente.telefones', 'telefonesCliente')
            ->leftJoin('orcamento.tabelaPreco', 'tabelaPreco')
            ->leftJoin('orcamento.profissionalAvaliador', 'profissionalAvaliador')
            ->leftJoin('orcamento.orcamentosServicos', 'orcamentosServicos')
            ->leftJoin('orcamentosServicos.servico', 'servico')
            ->leftJoin('orcamentosServicos.tabelaServico', 'tabelaServico')
            ->leftJoin('servico.servico', 'servicoOrcamento')
            ->leftJoin('vendas.agendas', 'agendas', Join::WITH, $qb->expr()->neq('agendas.status', ':status'))
            ->leftJoin('agendas.servicos', 'servicos')
            ->leftJoin('servicos.orcamentoServico', 'orcamentoServicoAgenda')
            ->leftJoin('servicos.servico', 'servicoAgendas')
            ->leftJoin('servicoAgendas.servico', 'servicoGlobal')
            ->leftJoin('agendas.profissional', 'profissional')
            ->leftJoin('profissional.profissionalIntervalos', 'profissionalIntervalos')
            ->setParameter(':status', 'Cancelado');

        $qb->where($qb->expr()->eq('vendas.id', ':id'))
            ->setParameter(':id', $id);

        if (null !== $clinica) {
            $qb->andWhere(
                $qb->expr()->eq('orcamento.clinica', ':clinica')
            )->setParameter(':clinica', $clinica);
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->getOneOrNullResult(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }


    public function getVendasNPagas($cliente_id, $clinica_id)
    {

        $sql = 'SELECT v.id as idVenda, v.pago, o.detalhes_condicao_pagamento, o.total, c.id as idCliente 
            FROM venda v 
            INNER JOIN orcamento o
            ON v.orcamento_id = o.id
            INNER JOIN cliente c
            ON o.cliente_id = c.id
            WHERE v.pago = false
            AND c.id = :cliente_id
            AND o.clinica_id = :clinica_id
            AND v.estornado = false';

        return $this->_em->getConnection()->fetchAll($sql, [
            'cliente_id' => $cliente_id,
            'clinica_id' => $clinica_id
        ]);
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Vendas;

use Clinica\V1\Rest\Orcamentos\OrcamentosEntity;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use Application\Rest\AbstractResourceListener;
use DoctrineModule\Stdlib\Hydrator\DoctrineObject as Hydrator;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasRepository;
use \DateTime;

class VendasResource extends AbstractResourceListener
{

    /**
     * Create
     *
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return array|ApiProblem
     */
    public function create($data)
    {
        try {
            $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
            /** @var VendasEntity $venda */
            $venda = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), new $this->entityClass());
            $venda->setDataHora(new DateTime());

            $this->objectManager->persist($venda);

            $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

            return $this->getRepository()->fetch($venda->getId());
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Patch (partial in-place update) a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function patch($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            if ($venda = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id])) {
                $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
                $venda = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), $venda);

                if($this->getInputFilter()->getValue('estornado')) {
                    foreach ($venda->getAgendas() as $agenda) {
                        if($agenda->getStatus() == 'Finalizado' || $agenda->getStatus() == 'Em atendimento') {
                            return new ApiProblem(422, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Não possível estornar essa venda pois contêm agendamentos: Finalizados ou Em atendimentos!'));
                        }
                    }

                    foreach ($venda->getAgendas() as $agenda) {
                        $agenda->setMotivoCancelamento('Venda estornada');
                        $agenda->setStatus('Cancelado');
                    }

                    $venda->removePagamentos($venda->getPagamentos());
                    $venda->setPago(false);
                    $venda->setEstornado(true);
                }

                $this->objectManager->persist($venda);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return $this->fetch($id);
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Register not found'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function update($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            if ($venda = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id])) {
                $hydrator = new Hydrator($this->getObjectManager());
                $venda = $hydrator->hydrate($this->getInputFilter()->getValues(), $venda);

                if($this->getInputFilter()->getValue('estornado')) {
                    foreach ($venda->getAgendas() as $agenda) {
                        if($agenda->getStatus() == 'Finalizado' || $agenda->getStatus() == 'Em atendimento') {
                            return new ApiProblem(422, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Não possível estornar essa venda pois contêm agendamentos: Finalizados ou Em atendimentos!'));
                        }
                    }

                    foreach ($venda->getAgendas() as $agenda) {
                        $agenda->setMotivoCancelamento('Venda estornada');
                        $agenda->setStatus('Cancelado');
                    }

                    $venda->removePagamentos($venda->getPagamentos());
                    $venda->setPago(false);
                    $venda->setEstornado(true);
                }

                $this->objectManager->persist($venda);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return $this->fetch($id);
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Register not found'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var VendasRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getRepository();
            if ($object = $repository->fetch($id, $this->getClinica())) {
                return $object;
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Orçamento não encontrado.'));
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch all or a subset of resources
     *
     * @param  \Zend\Stdlib\Parameters|array $params
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetchAll($params = [])
    {
        try {
            if (!$params->offsetExists('query')) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', []);
            }

            $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge($params->get('query'), [
                'clinica.id' => $this->getClinica()
            ]));

            //Verica se o cliente tem pendencias financeiras
            if (isset($params->query['checkPendencies']) && $params->query['checkPendencies']) {
                if ($this->checkPendencies($params)) {
                    return new ApiProblem(201, $this->getTranslator()->translate('O cliente possui pendências financeiras'), 'pendecies', 'Agendamento indisponivel');
                } else
                    return new ApiProblem(200, $this->getTranslator()->translate('O cliente não possui pendências financeiras'), 'pendecies', 'Agendamento disponivel');
            }

            return parent::fetchAll($params);
        } catch (\InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    private function checkPendencies($params) {

        $repository = $this->getRepository();
        //Retorna um array com os orçamentos do cliente
        $orcamentosClientes = $repository->getVendasNPagas($params->query['cliente.id'], $params->query['clinica.id']);

        foreach ($orcamentosClientes as $orcaCliente) {
            $detalhes = json_decode($orcaCliente['detalhes_condicao_pagamento']);
            $tamanhoArray = count($detalhes);

            //pega a data de validade da ultima parcela dentro do array detalhes
            $dataValidade = $detalhes[$tamanhoArray - 1]->dataVencimento;
            $dataValidade =  \DateTime::createFromFormat('d/m/Y', $dataValidade);
            $dataAtual = new \DateTime();

            //Venceu a última parcela
            if ($dataValidade < $dataAtual) {
                $valorPago = $this->checkPaymens($orcaCliente['idVenda']);
                //Verifica se foi pago o valor total do orçamento
                if($valorPago < $orcaCliente['total']) {
                    return true;
                }
            }
        }
        return false;
    }

    //Soma os registros de valor pago, baseado no id da venda
    private function checkPaymens($idVenda) {
        $venda = $this->getRepository()->find($idVenda);
        $totalPago = 0;
        foreach ($venda->getPagamentos() as $pagamento) {
            $totalPago = $totalPago + $pagamento->getValorPago();
        }

        return $totalPago;
    }

    /**
     * Get clinica
     *
     * @return integer|ClinicasEntity
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    private function getClinica()
    {
        if ($id = (integer) $this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
            if (!$this->isGuest())
                return $id;

            /** @var ClinicasRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClinicasEntity::class);

            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            if ($clinica = $repository->getClinicaUser($id, $this->getUser())) {
                return $clinica;
            }
        }

        throw new \InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Clínica não encontrada'));
    }

    /**
     * Get user
     *
     * @return User
     */
    private function getUser()
    {
        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getAuthenticationIdentity()) {
            return $identity['user'];
        }

        throw new \InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Usuário não encontrado'));
    }

    private function isGuest() {
        if ($identity = $this->getEvent()->getIdentity()->getName() == 'guest') {
            return true;
        }
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\Vendas;

use Interop\Container\ContainerInterface;

/**
 * Class VendasResourceFactory
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\Vendas
 */
class VendasResourceFactory
{
    /**
     * @param ContainerInterface $services
     * @return VendasResource
     * @throws \Psr\Container\ContainerExceptionInterface
     * @throws \Psr\Container\NotFoundExceptionInterface
     */
    public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $services)
    {
        /** @var \Zend\Log\Logger $logger */
        $logger = $services->get('log');

        /** @var \Zend\I18n\Translator\Translator $translator */
        $translator = $services->get('translator');

        /** @var \Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager $objectManager */
        $objectManager = $services->get(\Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager::class);

        $resource = new VendasResource();
        $resource->setLogger($logger);
        $resource->setTranslator($translator);
        $resource->setObjectManager($objectManager);

        return $resource;
    }
}

<?php

namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\VendasCategorias;

use Application\Repository\EntityRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\Query;
use Doctrine\ORM\AbstractQuery;

class VendasCategoriasRepository extends EntityRepository
{
    /**
     * Fetch all
     *
     * @param array|null $searchParam
     * @param array|null $orderBy
     * @return Query|object|array
     */
    public function fetchAll(array $searchParam = null, array $orderBy = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('vendasCategorias');


        //Traz na consulta os dados da clinica
        $qb ->addSelect('partial clinica.{id, nomeFantasia}')
            ->leftJoin('vendasCategorias.clinica', 'clinica');

            // Verifica se existe o parametro clinica
            if (isset($searchParam['query']) && isset($searchParam['query']['vendasCategorias.clinica'])) {
                // Verifica se é a clinica OU se clinica é NULL
                $qb->where(
                    $qb->expr()->orX(
                        $qb->expr()->eq('vendasCategorias.clinica', $searchParam['query']['vendasCategorias.clinica']),
                        $qb->expr()->isNull('vendasCategorias.clinica')
                    )
                );
            } elseif ((! $searchParam['query']['clinica.id'])) {
                // Verifica se clinica é NULL
                $qb->where(
                    $qb->expr()->isNull('vendasCategorias.clinica')
                );
            }
        // Remove o parametro clinica do Array para não compara-lo novamente no mountRestrictions()
        unset($searchParam['query']['vendasCategorias.clinica']);

        if (isset($searchParam['query'])) {
            // Compara os demais parametros passados na URL
            $this->mountRestrictions($qb, $searchParam['query']);
        }

        // Se for passado o orderBy monta a ordernação
        if (! is_null($orderBy)) {
            foreach ($orderBy as $key => $value) {
                $qb->addOrderBy($key, $value);
            }
        }  else {
            // Ordena por id DESC se não passar o parametro de ordenação
            $qb->addOrderBy('vendasCategorias.id', 'DESC');
        }


        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->setHydrationMode(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }

    /**
     * Fetch
     *
     * @param integer $id
     * @return Query|object|array
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetch($id, $clinica = null)
    {
        $qb = $this->createQueryBuilder('vendasCategorias');

        $qb ->addSelect('partial clinica.{id, nomeFantasia}')
            ->leftJoin('vendasCategorias.clinica', 'clinica');

        $qb->where($qb->expr()->eq('vendasCategorias.id', ':id'))
            ->setParameter(':id', $id);

        if (null !== $clinica) {
            $qb->andWhere($qb->expr()->orX(
                $qb->expr()->eq('clinica.id', ':clinica'),
                $qb->expr()->eq('vendasCategorias.clinica', ':clinica')
            ))->setParameter(':clinica', $clinica);
        }

        return $qb->getQuery()
            ->getOneOrNullResult(AbstractQuery::HYDRATE_ARRAY);
    }
}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rest\VendasCategorias;

use Application\Rest\AbstractResourceListener;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;

/**
 * Class VendasCategoriasResource
 *
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rest\VendasCategorias
 */
class VendasCategoriasResource extends AbstractResourceListener
{

    /**
     * Create
     *
     * @param mixed $data
     * @return array|ApiProblem
     */
    public function create($data)
    {
        try {
            if ($clinica = (integer) $this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
                $this->getInputFilter()->get('clinica')->setValue($clinica);
            }

            return parent::create($data);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Delete a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @return bool|ApiProblem
     */
    public function delete($id)
    {
        try {
            if ($clinica = (integer) $this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
                $this->getInputFilter()->get('clinica')->setValue($clinica);
            }

            /** @var VendasCategoriasEntity $vendasCategoria */
            if ($vendasCategoria = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id, 'clinica' => $clinica])) {

                $this->getObjectManager()->remove($vendasCategoria);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return true;
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Categoria não encontrada.'));

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function fetch($id)
    {
        try {
            /** @var VendasCategoriasRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getRepository();

            $clinica = (integer) $this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica');

            if ($object = $repository->fetch($id, $clinica)) {
                return $object;
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Categoria não encontrada.'));

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Fetch all or a subset of resources
     *
     * @param  \Zend\Stdlib\Parameters|array $params
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    public function fetchAll($params = [])
    {
        try {
            if (!$params->offsetExists('query')) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', []);
            }

            if ($clinica = (integer) $this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
                $params->offsetSet('query', ArrayUtils::merge($params->get('query'), [
                    'vendasCategorias.clinica' => $clinica
                ]));
            }

            return parent::fetchAll($params);
        } catch (\InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            return new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Patch (partial in-place update) a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function patch($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            if ($clinica = (integer) $this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('clinica')) {
                $this->getInputFilter()->get('clinica')->setValue($clinica);
            }

            /** @var VendasCategoriasEntity $vendasCategoria */
            if ($vendasCategoria = $this->getRepository()->findOneBy(['id' => $id, 'clinica' => $clinica])) {
                return parent::patch($id, $data);
            }

            return new ApiProblem(404, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Categoria não encontrada.'));

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * Update a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function update($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            return parent::update($id, $data);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

}

<?php
namespace Clinica\V1\Rpc\ClinicasFotos;

use Application\Entity\User;
use Aws\S3\S3Client;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasRepository;
use DoctrineModule\Persistence\ObjectManagerAwareInterface;
use DoctrineModule\Persistence\ProvidesObjectManager;
use Exception;
use InvalidArgumentException;
use Zend\Http\Response;
use Zend\I18n\Translator\TranslatorAwareInterface;
use Zend\I18n\Translator\TranslatorAwareTrait;
use Zend\InputFilter\InputFilter;
use Zend\Log\LoggerAwareInterface;
use Zend\Log\LoggerAwareTrait;
use Zend\Mvc\Controller\AbstractActionController;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblemResponse;

class ClinicasFotosController extends AbstractActionController implements
    LoggerAwareInterface,
    TranslatorAwareInterface,
    ObjectManagerAwareInterface
{
    use LoggerAwareTrait, TranslatorAwareTrait, ProvidesObjectManager;

    /**
     * @var ClinicasRepository
     */
    protected $repository;

    /**
     * @var S3Client
     */
    private $s3Client;

    /**
     * Action
     */
    public function clinicasFotosAction()
    {
        if ($this->getRequest()->isPost()) {
            return $this->create();
        }

        if ($this->getRequest()->isDelete()) {
            return $this->delete();
        }

        return new ApiProblemResponse(
            new ApiProblem(405, 'Method Not Allowed')
        );
    }

    /**
     * Create
     *
     * @return array|ApiProblemResponse
     */
    public function create()
    {
        /** @var InputFilter $inputFilter */
        $inputFilter = $this->getEvent()->getParam('ZF\ContentValidation\InputFilter');

        /** @var array $foto */
        $foto = $inputFilter->getValue('foto');

        try {
            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            $clinica = $this->getClinica();

            // Adiciona a foto ao array de fotos da Clínica
            $clinica->addFoto($foto);

            $this->getObjectManager()->persist($clinica);
            $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

            // Converte o arquivo para público
            $this->putObjectAcl($foto['tmp_name']);

            return [
                'foto' => $foto
            ];
        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->warn($e->getMessage());

            // Caso de falha remova o arquivo enviado
            $this->deleteObject($foto['tmp_name']);

            return new ApiProblemResponse(
                new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage())
            );
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e->getMessage());

            // Caso de falha remova o arquivo enviado
            $this->deleteObject($foto['tmp_name']);

            return new ApiProblemResponse(
                new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage())
            );
        }
    }

    /**
     * Delete
     *
     * @return Response|ApiProblemResponse
     */
    public function delete()
    {
        try {
            $id = $this->getEvent()->getRouteMatch()->getParam('id');

            $foto = sprintf(
                's3://%s/fotos/%s',
                $_ENV['AWS_S3_ASSETS_BUCKET'],
                $id
            );

            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            $clinica = $this->getClinica();

            // Adiciona a foto ao array de fotos da Clínica
            $clinica->removeFoto($foto);

            $this->getObjectManager()->persist($clinica);
            $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

            $this->deleteObject($foto);

            $response = new Response();
            $response->setStatusCode(204)
                     ->setContent('');

            return $response;
        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->warn($e->getMessage());

            return new ApiProblemResponse(
                new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage())
            );
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e->getMessage());

            return new ApiProblemResponse(
                new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage())
            );
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get clinica
     *
     * @return ClinicasEntity
     * @throws \Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException
     */
    private function getClinica(): ?ClinicasEntity
    {
        if ($id = (integer) $this->getEvent()->getRouteMatch()->getParam('clinica')) {
            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            if (($this->getUser()->isAdmin() && $clinica = $this->getRepository()->find($id)) ||
                ($clinica = $this->getRepository()->getClinicaUser($id, $this->getUser()))) {
                return $clinica;
            }
        }

        throw new InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Clínica não encontrada'));
    }

    /**
     * Get user
     *
     * @return User
     */
    private function getUser(): ?User
    {
        /** @var User $user */
        if ($user = $this->getIdentity()->getUser()) {
            return $user;
        }

        throw new InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Usuário não encontrado'));
    }

    /**
     * Get repository
     *
     * @return ClinicasRepository
     */
    protected function getRepository(): ClinicasRepository
    {
        if (null === $this->repository) {
            $this->repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClinicasEntity::class);
        }

        return $this->repository;
    }

    /**
     * Set S3 Client
     *
     * @param S3Client $s3Client
     */
    public function setS3Client(S3Client $s3Client)
    {
        $this->s3Client = $s3Client;
    }

    /**
     * Put object acl
     *
     * @param string $file
     */
    private function putObjectAcl(string $file)
    {
        $this->s3Client->putObjectAcl([
            'ACL' => 'public-read',
            'Bucket' => $_ENV['AWS_S3_ASSETS_BUCKET'],
            'Key' => str_replace(
                's3://' . $_ENV['AWS_S3_ASSETS_BUCKET'] . '/',
                '',
                $file
            )
        ]);
    }

    /**
     * Delete object
     *
     * @param string $file
     */
    private function deleteObject(string $file)
    {
        $this->s3Client->deleteObject([
            'Bucket' => $_ENV['AWS_S3_ASSETS_BUCKET'],
            'Key' => str_replace(
                's3://' . $_ENV['AWS_S3_ASSETS_BUCKET'] . '/',
                '',
                $file
            ),
            'Quiet' => true,
        ]);
    }
}

<?php

namespace Clinica\V1\Rpc\Historico;

use Application\Entity\User;
use Cliente\V1\Rest\Clientes\ClientesEntity;
use Cliente\V1\Rest\Clientes\ClientesRepository;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasRepository;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Orcamentos\OrcamentosEntity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Orcamentos\OrcamentosRepository;
use Doctrine\ORM\NonUniqueResultException;
use DoctrineModule\Persistence\ObjectManagerAwareInterface;
use DoctrineModule\Persistence\ProvidesObjectManager;
use Zend\I18n\Translator\TranslatorAwareInterface;
use Zend\I18n\Translator\TranslatorAwareTrait;
use Zend\Log\LoggerAwareInterface;
use Zend\Log\LoggerAwareTrait;
use Zend\Mvc\Controller\AbstractActionController;
use InvalidArgumentException;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use DateInterval;
use DateTime;
use Exception;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblemResponse;

/**
 * Class HistoricoController
 *
 * @package Clinica\V1\Rpc\Historico
 */
class HistoricoController extends AbstractActionController implements
    LoggerAwareInterface,
    TranslatorAwareInterface,
    ObjectManagerAwareInterface
{
    use LoggerAwareTrait, TranslatorAwareTrait, ProvidesObjectManager;

    /**
     * @var OrcamentosRepository
     */
    protected $repository;

    /**
     * @return array|ApiProblemResponse
     */
    public function historicoAction()
    {
        try {
            $today = new DateTime();
            $today->setTime(23, 59, 59);

            $start = new DateTime();
            $start = $start->sub(new DateInterval('P7D'));
            $start->setTime(0, 0, 0);

            if ($before = $this->params()->fromQuery('before', null)) {
                $before = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $before);
                $before->setTime(0, 0, 0);
            }

            if ($after = $this->params()->fromQuery('after', null)) {
                $after = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $after);
                $after->setTime(23, 59, 59);
            }

            return [
                'data' => $this->getOrcamentosRepository()->getClienteHistorico(
                    $before ? $before : $start,
                    $after ? $after : $today,
                    $this->getCliente(),
                    $this->getClinica()
                )
            ];
        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->info($e);

            return new ApiProblemResponse(
                new ApiProblem(404, $e->getMessage())
            );
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblemResponse(
                new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage())
            );
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get repository
     *
     * @return OrcamentosRepository
     */
    protected function getOrcamentosRepository()
    {
        if (null === $this->repository) {
            $this->repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(OrcamentosEntity::class);
        }

        return $this->repository;
    }

    /**
     * Get clinica
     *
     * @return ClinicasEntity|object
     * @throws NonUniqueResultException
     */
    private function getClinica()
    {
        if ($id = (integer)$this->params()->fromRoute('clinica')) {
            /** @var ClinicasRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClinicasEntity::class);

            if ($this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                return $repository->find($id);
            }

            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            if ($clinica = $repository->getClinicaUser($id, $this->getUser())) {
                return $clinica;
            }
        }

        if ($this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
            return null;
        }

        throw new InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Clínica não encontrada'));
    }

    /**
     * Get cliente
     *
     * @return ClientesEntity|object
     * @throws NonUniqueResultException
     */
    private function getCliente()
    {
        if ($id = (integer)$this->params()->fromRoute('cliente')) {
            /** @var ClientesRepository $repository */
            $repository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClientesEntity::class);

            if ($this->getUser()->isAdmin()) {
                return $repository->find($id);
            }

            /** @var ClientesEntity $cliente */
            if ($cliente = $repository->getClienteUser($id, $this->getUser())) {
                return $cliente;
            }
        }

        throw new InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Cliente não encontrado'));
    }

    /**
     * Get user
     *
     * @return User
     */
    private function getUser()
    {
        if ($identity = $this->getIdentity()->getAuthenticationIdentity()) {
            return $identity['user'];
        }

        throw new InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Usuário não encontrado'));
    }
}

namespace Endereco\Entity;

/**
 * Class Endereco
 *
 * @package Endereco\Entity
 */
class Endereco
{
    /**
     * @var integer
     */
    protected $id;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $cep;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $uf;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $cidade;

    /**
     * @var string
     */
    protected $bairro;

    /**

     */
    protected $logradouro;

     */
    protected $numero;

     */
    protected $complemento;

    /**
     * @return int
     */
    public function getId(): int
    {
        return $this->id;
    }

    /**
     * @return string
     */
    public function getCep(): string
    {
        return $this->cep;
    }

    /**
     * @param string $cep
     */
    public function setCep(string $cep)
    {
        $this->cep = $cep;
    }

    /**
     * @return string
     */
    public function getUf(): string
    {
        return $this->uf;
    }

    /**
     * @param string $uf
     */
    public function setUf(string $uf)
    {
        $this->uf = $uf;
    }

    /**
     * @return string
     */
    public function getCidade(): string
    {
        return $this->cidade;
    }

    /**
     * @param string $cidade
     */
    public function setCidade(string $cidade)
    {
        $this->cidade = $cidade;
    }

    /**
     * @return string
     */
    public function getBairro(): string
    {
        return $this->bairro;
    }

    /**
     * @param string $bairro
     */
    public function setBairro(string $bairro)
    {
        $this->bairro = $bairro;
    }

     */
    public function getLogradouro(): string
    {
        return $this->logradouro;
    }

    /**
     * @param string $logradouro
     */
    public function setLogradouro(string $logradouro)
    {
        $this->logradouro = $logradouro;
    }

    /**
     * @return string
     */
    public function getNumero(): string
    {
        return $this->numero;
    }

    /**
     * @param string $numero
     */
    public function setNumero(string $numero)
    {
        $this->numero = $numero;
    }

    /**
     * @return string
     */
    public function getComplemento(): string
    {
        return $this->complemento;
    }

    /**
     * @param string $complemento
     */
    public function setComplemento(string $complemento = null)
    {
        $this->complemento = $complemento;
    }

    /**
     * @return string
     */
    public function __toString()
    {
        if (null !== $this->getComplemento() && $this->getComplemento() !== '') {
            return sprintf(
                '%s, %s - %s, %s/%s - CEP: %s',
                $this->getLogradouro(),
                $this->getNumero(),
                $this->getComplemento(),
                $this->getCidade(),
                $this->getUf(),
                $this->getCep()
            );
        }

        return sprintf(
            '%s, %s, %s/%s - CEP: %s',
            $this->getLogradouro(),
            $this->getNumero(),
            $this->getCidade(),
            $this->getUf(),
            $this->getCep()
        );
    }
}

<?php
namespace User\V1\Rest\CriarSenha;

use Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager;
use Interop\Container\ContainerInterface;
use SlmMail\Mail\Transport\HttpTransport;
use Zend\ServiceManager\Factory\FactoryInterface;


class CriarSenhaResourceFactory implements FactoryInterface
{
    /**
     * @param ContainerInterface $container
     * @param string $requestedName
     * @param array|null $options
     * @return CriarSenhaResource|object
     */
    public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $container, $requestedName, array $options = null)
    {
        /** @var \Zend\Log\Logger $logger */
        $logger = $container->get('log');

        /** @var \Zend\I18n\Translator\Translator $translator */
        $translator = $container->get('translator');

        /** @var \Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager $objectManager */
        $objectManager = $container->get(EntityManager::class);

        /** @var HttpTransport $transport */
        $transport = $container->get('SlmMail\Mail\Transport\SesTransport');

        $resource = new CriarSenhaResource();
        $resource->setLogger($logger);
        $resource->setTranslator($translator);
        $resource->setObjectManager($objectManager);
        $resource->setTransport($transport);

        return $resource;
    }
}

<?php
namespace User\V1\Rest\RecuperarSenha;

use Application\Entity\User;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use DoctrineModule\Persistence\ProvidesObjectManager;
use Zend\I18n\Translator\TranslatorAwareInterface;
use Zend\I18n\Translator\TranslatorAwareTrait;
use Zend\Log\LoggerAwareInterface;
use Zend\Log\LoggerAwareTrait;
use Zend\Mail\Message;
use Zend\Mail\Transport\TransportInterface;
use Zend\Mime\Message as MimeMessage;
use Zend\Mime\Mime as MimeMime;
use Zend\Mime\Part as MimePart;
use Zend\Math\Rand;
use Application\Rest\AbstractUserResourceListener;
use ZF\OAuth2\Adapter\BcryptTrait;
use DoctrineModule\Persistence\ObjectManagerAwareInterface;


class RecuperarSenhaResource extends AbstractUserResourceListener implements
    LoggerAwareInterface,
    TranslatorAwareInterface,
    ObjectManagerAwareInterface
{
    use LoggerAwareTrait, TranslatorAwareTrait, ProvidesObjectManager, BcryptTrait;

    /**
     * @var TransportInterface
     */
    protected $transport;

    protected $tokenValido;

    public function create($data)
    {
        try{
            $user = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(User::class);

            $username = $this->getInputFilter()->getValue('username');
            $domain = $this->getInputFilter()->getValue('domain');

            //Verifica se existe usuario cadastrado com base no email informado.
            $usuarioAlterar = $user->findOneBy(['username' => $username]);

            if ($usuarioAlterar) {
                $tokenValido = $this->gerarToken();
                $usuarioAlterar->setTokenValido($tokenValido);

                $this->objectManager->persist($usuarioAlterar);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return $this->enviarEmail($username, $tokenValido, $domain);

            } else {
                return new ApiProblem(400, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Endereço de email não existe'));
            }

        } catch (\Exception $e){
            $this->getLogger()->info($e);

            return $e;
        }
    }

    /**
     * Patch (partial in-place update) a resource
     *
     * @param  mixed $id
     * @param  mixed $data
     * @return ApiProblem|mixed
     */
    public function patch($id, $data)
    {
        try {
            if ($usuarioAlterar = $this->validarToken()) {
                $pass = $this->getInputFilter()->getValue('password');

                $password = $this->getBcrypt()->create($pass);
                $usuarioAlterar->setPassword($password);

                $this->getObjectManager()->persist($usuarioAlterar);
                $this->getObjectManager()->flush();

                return $usuarioAlterar;

            } else{

                return new ApiProblem(400, $this->getTranslator()->translate('Código de verificação inválido'));
            }
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->getLogger()->emerg($e);

            return new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    public function enviarEmail($username, $tokenValido, $domain) {
        $url = $domain . '/recuperar-senha/' . $tokenValido;

        $message = $this->createMessage(
             'Para criar uma nova senha acesse - ' . $url
            ,
            'Recuperar Senha | SigoClinicas'
        );

        $message->setFrom($_ENV['EMAIL_CONTATO1'])
                ->setTo($username);
        $this->transport->send($message);
    }


    /**
     * @param TransportInterface $transport
     * @return RecuperarSenhaResource
     */
    public function setTransport(TransportInterface $transport): RecuperarSenhaResource
    {
        $this->transport = $transport;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * @param string $content
     * @param string $subject
     * @return Message
     */
    private function createMessage(string $content, string $subject) : Message
    {
        $html = new MimePart($content);
        $html->type = MimeMime::TYPE_HTML;
        $html->charset = 'utf-8';

        $body = new MimeMessage();
        $body->addPart($html);

        $message = new Message();
        $message->setSubject($subject)
            ->setBody($body);

        return $message;
    }

    public function gerarToken()
    {
        // Gerar um token.
        $token = Rand::getString(20, '0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ');

        return  $token;
    }


    public function validarToken() {
        if ($this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('token')){

            $user = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(User::class);
            $token = $this->getEvent()->getRouteParam('token');


            //Verifica se existe usuario cadastrado com base no email informado.
            $usuarioAlterar = $user->findOneBy(['tokenValido' => $token]);

            return $usuarioAlterar;
        }
    }

}

class RecuperarSenhaResourceFactory implements FactoryInterface
{
    /**
     * @param ContainerInterface $container
     * @param string $requestedName
     * @param array|null $options
     * @return RecuperarSenhaResource|object
     */
    public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $container, $requestedName, array $options = null)
    {
        /** @var \Zend\Log\Logger $logger */
        $logger = $container->get('log');

        /** @var \Zend\I18n\Translator\Translator $translator */
        $translator = $container->get('translator');

        /** @var \Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager $objectManager */
        $objectManager = $container->get(EntityManager::class);

        /** @var HttpTransport $transport */
        $transport = $container->get('SlmMail\Mail\Transport\SesTransport');

        $resource = new RecuperarSenhaResource();
        $resource->setLogger($logger);
        $resource->setTranslator($translator);
        $resource->setObjectManager($objectManager);
        $resource->setTransport($transport);

        return $resource;
    }
}

<?php

namespace User\V1\Rpc\Roles;

use Application\Entity\Role;
use Application\Entity\User;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasRepository;
use DoctrineModule\Persistence\ObjectManagerAwareInterface;
use DoctrineModule\Persistence\ProvidesObjectManager;
use Zend\I18n\Translator\TranslatorAwareInterface;
use Zend\I18n\Translator\TranslatorAwareTrait;
use Zend\Log\LoggerAwareInterface;
use Zend\Log\LoggerAwareTrait;
use Zend\Mvc\Controller\AbstractActionController;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblem;
use ZF\ApiProblem\ApiProblemResponse;
use ZF\OAuth2\Doctrine\Identity\AuthenticatedIdentity;
use Clinica\V1\Rest\Clinicas\ClinicasEntity;

class RolesController extends AbstractActionController implements
    LoggerAwareInterface,
    TranslatorAwareInterface,
    ObjectManagerAwareInterface
{
    use LoggerAwareTrait, TranslatorAwareTrait, ProvidesObjectManager;

    public function rolesAction()
    {
        try {
            $roles = [];
            /** @var Role $role */
            foreach ($this->getUser()->getRoles() as $role) {
                $roles[] = $role->getRoleId();
            }

            /** @var ClinicasRepository $repository */
            $clinicaRepository = $this->getObjectManager()->getRepository(ClinicasEntity::class);

            /** @var ClinicasEntity $clinica */
            $clinicas = [];
            foreach ($usuarios = $clinicaRepository->getClinicaAllUsers($this->getUser()->getId()) as $usuario) {
                $clinicas[] = $usuario['clinica_id'];
            }

            $userId = $this->getUser()->getId();
            $primeiroLogin = $this->getUser()->isPrimeiroLogin();

            return [
                'userId' => $userId,
                'nome' => $usuarios,
                'roles' => $roles,
                'clinicas' => $clinicas,
                'primeiroLogin' => $primeiroLogin
            ];
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            return new ApiProblemResponse(
                new ApiProblem(400, $e->getMessage())
            );
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get user
     *
     * @return User
     */
    private function getUser()
    {
        /** @var AuthenticatedIdentity $identity */
        if ($identity = $this->getIdentity()) {
            return $identity->getUser();
        }

        throw new \InvalidArgumentException($this->getTranslator()->translate('Usuário não encontrado'));
    }
}

<?php
namespace User\V1\Rpc\Roles;

use Interop\Container\ContainerInterface;

class RolesControllerFactory
{
    public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $controllers)
    {
        /** @var \Zend\I18n\Translator\Translator $translator */
        $translator = $controllers->get('translator');

        /** @var \Zend\Log\Logger $logger */
        $logger = $controllers->get('log');

        /** @var \Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager $objectManager */
        $objectManager = $controllers->get(\Doctrine\ORM\EntityManager::class);

        $controller = new RolesController();
        $controller->setLogger($logger);
        $controller->setTranslator($translator);
        $controller->setObjectManager($objectManager);

        return $controller;
    }
}

RewriteEngine On # The following rule allows authentication to work with fast-cgi RewriteRule .* - [E=HTTP_AUTHORIZATION:%{HTTP:Authorization}] # The following rule tells Apache that if the requested filename # exists, simply serve it. RewriteCond %{REQUEST_FILENAME} -s [OR] RewriteCond %{REQUEST_FILENAME} -l [OR] RewriteCond %{REQUEST_FILENAME} -d RewriteRule ^.*$ - [NC,L] # The following rewrites all other queries to index.php. The # condition ensures that if you are using Apache aliases to do # mass virtual hosting, the base path will be prepended to # allow proper resolution of the index.php file; it will work # in non-aliased environments as well, providing a safe, one-size # fits all solution. RewriteCond %{REQUEST_URI}::$1 ^(/.+)(.+)::\2$ RewriteRule ^(.*) - [E=BASE:%1] RewriteRule ^(.*)$ %{ENV:BASE}index.php [NC,L]

<?php
/**
 * @license   http://opensource.org/licenses/BSD-3-Clause BSD-3-Clause
 * @copyright Copyright (c) 2014-2016 Zend Technologies USA Inc. (http://www.zend.com)
 */

use Zend\Stdlib\ArrayUtils;
use ZF\Apigility\Application;

/**
 * This makes our life easier when dealing with paths. Everything is relative
 * to the application root now.
 */
chdir(dirname(__DIR__));

// Redirect legacy requests to enable/disable development mode to new tool
if (php_sapi_name() === 'cli'
    && $argc > 2
    && 'development' == $argv[1]
    && in_array($argv[2], ['disable', 'enable'])
) {
    // Windows needs to execute the batch scripts that Composer generates,
    // and not the Unix shell version.
    $script = defined('PHP_WINDOWS_VERSION_BUILD') && constant('PHP_WINDOWS_VERSION_BUILD')
        ? '.\\vendor\\bin\\zf-development-mode.bat'
        : './vendor/bin/zf-development-mode';
    system(sprintf('%s %s', $script, $argv[2]), $return);
    exit($return);
}

// Decline static file requests back to the PHP built-in webserver
if (php_sapi_name() === 'cli-server' && is_file(__DIR__ . parse_url($_SERVER['REQUEST_URI'], PHP_URL_PATH))) {
    return false;
}

if (! file_exists('vendor/autoload.php')) {
    throw new RuntimeException(
        'Unable to load application.' . PHP_EOL
        . '- Type `composer install` if you are developing locally.' . PHP_EOL
        . '- Type `vagrant ssh -c \'composer install\'` if you are using Vagrant.' . PHP_EOL
        . '- Type `docker-compose run apigility composer install` if you are using Docker.'
    );
}

// Setup autoloading
include 'vendor/autoload.php';

$appConfig = include 'config/application.config.php';

if (file_exists('config/development.config.php')) {
    $appConfig = ArrayUtils::merge(
        $appConfig,
        include 'config/development.config.php'
    );
}

// Run the application!
Application::init($appConfig)->run();
